#===========================================
# def add_entry(self, text_content, metadata=None)
#===========================================
    def add_entry(self, text_content, metadata=None):
        with self.lock:
            embedding = self.model.encode(text_content).tolist()
            if self.vector_db_type == "chromadb":
                entry_id = hashlib.sha256(text_content.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()
                self.collection.upsert(
                    embeddings=[embedding],
                    documents=[text_content],
                    metadatas=[metadata if metadata else {}],
                    ids=[entry_id]
                )
            elif self.vector_db_type == "faiss":
                entry_id = self.faiss_next_id
                self.faiss_index.add(np.array([embedding], dtype='float32'))
                self.faiss_data.append(text_content)
                self.faiss_ids.append(entry_id)
                self.faiss_next_id += 1
                self._save_faiss_index()
            
            self._save_metadata(entry_id, text_content, metadata)
            return entry_id
            


    def add_entry(self, text_content, metadata=None):
        with self.lock:
            embedding = self.model.encode(text_content).tolist()
            if self.vector_db_type == "chromadb":
                entry_id = hashlib.sha256(text_content.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()
                self.collection.add(
                    embeddings=[embedding],
                    documents=[text_content],
                    metadatas=[metadata if metadata else {}],
                    ids=[entry_id]
                )
            elif self.vector_db_type == "faiss":
                entry_id = self.faiss_next_id
                self.faiss_index.add(np.array([embedding], dtype='float32'))
                self.faiss_data.append(text_content)
                self.faiss_ids.append(entry_id)
                self.faiss_next_id += 1
                self._save_faiss_index()
            
            self._save_metadata(entry_id, text_content, metadata)
            return entry_id



    
    




#=======================================
# def add_entry(self, text, metadata=None)
#=======================================

    def add_entry(self, text, metadata=None):
        embedding = self.model.encode(text).tolist()
        with self.lock:
            self.collection.add(
                embeddings=[embedding],
                documents=[text],
                metadatas=[metadata or {}],
                ids=[hashlib.sha256(text.encode()).hexdigest()]
            )



    def add_entry(self, text, metadata=None):
        with self.lock:
            entry_id = hashlib.sha256(text.encode()).hexdigest()
            embedding = self.model.encode(text).tolist()
            # Simulation d'insertion vectorielle (ChromaDB/FAISS)
            conn = sqlite3.connect(self.metadata_db)
            conn.execute("INSERT OR REPLACE INTO entries VALUES (?, ?, ?)", 
                         (entry_id, text, json.dumps(metadata or {})))
            conn.commit(); conn.close()
            return entry_id          
            
            
            
            
            




#=======================================
# def add_function(self, code, name)
#=======================================  

    def add_function(self, code, name):
        with self.lock:
            try:
                # Validation et formatage
                ast.parse(code)
                formatted_code = black.format_str(code, mode=black.FileMode())
                formatted_code = isort.code(formatted_code)
                
                current_content = self.target_file.read_text()
                new_content = current_content + "\n\n" + formatted_code
                
                # Backup atomique
                backup = EVOLUT_HOME / f"source_backup_{int(time.time())}.py"
                self.target_file.rename(backup)
                self.target_file.write_text(new_content)
                
                with sqlite3.connect(self.db_file) as conn:
                    conn.execute("INSERT INTO modifications (timestamp, function_name, action, code_before, code_after, status) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)",
                                 (time.time(), name, "add", backup.read_text(), new_content, "applied"))
                return True
            except Exception as e:
                log(f"Erreur self-mod : {e}", level="error")
                return False










#=======================================
# def add_function(self, function_code)
#=======================================




#=======================================
# def add_function(self, function_code, function_name)
#=======================================

    def add_function(self, function_code, function_name):
        with self.lock:
            current_code = self.target_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
            lignes = current_code.splitlines(True)
            
            # Trouver un point d'insertion logique (avant main ou if __name__)
            index_insertion = -1
            for i, ligne in enumerate(lignes):
                if 'def main():' in ligne or 'if __name__ == "__main__":' in ligne:
                    index_insertion = i - 1
                    break
            
            if index_insertion == -1: # Si pas de main, insûôˋrer û  la fin
                index_insertion = len(lignes)

            code_a_inserer = f"\n{function_code}\n"
            lignes.insert(index_insertion, code_a_inserer)
            final_code = "".join(lignes)

            try:
                final_code = self._validate_and_format_code(final_code)
                self._save_code(final_code, "add_function", function_name)
                log(f"Fonction '{function_name}' ajoutûôˋe avec succûô´s.", level="info")
                return True
            except Exception as e:
                log(f"ûã¯chec de l'ajout de la fonction '{function_name}': {e}", level="error")
                return False
                
                

    def add_function(self, function_code, function_name):
        with self.lock:
            current_code = self.target_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
            lignes = current_code.splitlines(True)
            
            # Trouver un point d'insertion logique (avant main ou if __name__)
            index_insertion = -1
            for i, ligne in enumerate(lignes):
                if 'def main():' in ligne or 'if __name__ == "__main__":' in ligne:
                    index_insertion = i - 1
                    break
            
            if index_insertion == -1: # Si pas de main, insûˋrer û  la fin
                index_insertion = len(lignes)

            code_a_inserer = f"\n{function_code}\n"
            lignes.insert(index_insertion, code_a_inserer)
            final_code = "".join(lignes)

            try:
                final_code = self._validate_and_format_code(final_code)
                self._save_code(final_code, "add_function", function_name)
                log(f"Fonction '{function_name}' ajoutûˋe avec succû´s.", level="info")
                return True
            except Exception as e:
                log(f"ûchec de l'ajout de la fonction '{function_name}': {e}", level="error")
                return False












#=======================================
# def add_knowledge(self, concept_name, concept_type, risk_level, source)
#=======================================

    def add_knowledge(self, concept_name, concept_type, risk_level, source):
        if not self.graph.has_node(concept_name):
            self.graph.add_node(concept_name, type=concept_type, risk=risk_level, first_seen=time.time(), sources=[source])
        else:
            node_data = self.graph.nodes[concept_name]
            if source not in node_data.get('sources', []):
                node_data['sources'].append(source)
            node_data['risk'] = max(node_data['risk'], risk_level, key=lambda x: {'faible': 0, 'modere': 1, 'eleve': 2}.get(x, 0))
        self._save_graph_to_db()



    def add_knowledge(self, concept_name, concept_type, risk_level, source):
        if not self.graph.has_node(concept_name):
            self.graph.add_node(concept_name, type=concept_type, risk=risk_level, first_seen=time.time(), sources=[source])
        else:
            data = self.graph.nodes[concept_name]
            if source not in data.get('sources', []): data['sources'].append(source)
            data['risk'] = risk_level
        self._save_graph_to_db()



    






#=======================================
# def add_knowledge(self, concept, type, risk, source)
#=======================================






#=======================================
# def add_knowledge_tasks( concept_name, concept_type, risk_level, source)
#=======================================

def add_knowledge_tasks( concept_name, concept_type, risk_level, source):
        if not self.graph.has_node(concept_name):
            self.graph.add_node(concept_name, type=concept_type, risk=risk_level, first_seen=time.time(), sources=[source])
        else:
            node_data = self.graph.nodes[concept_name]
            if source not in node_data.get('sources', []):
                node_data['sources'].append(source)
            node_data['risk'] = max(node_data['risk'], risk_level, key=lambda x: {'faible': 0, 'modere': 1, 'eleve': 2}.get(x, 0))
        self._save_graph_to_db()

def add_new_capability(pattern):
    """Ajoute une nouvelle capacitûˋ basûˋe sur les patterns"""
    try:
        with open(__file__, 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            f.write(f"\n# NOUVELLE CAPACITû AJOUTûE AUTOMATIQUEMENT\n")
            f.write(f"def capacite_auto_{int(time.time())}():\n")
            f.write(f'    """Capacitûˋ auto-gûˋnûˋrûˋe basûˋe sur: {pattern}"""\n')
            f.write(f'    log("Nouvelle capacitûˋ auto-gûˋnûˋrûˋe exûˋcutûˋe")\n')

        log("ÞÏ˜ Nouvelle capacitûˋ ajoutûˋe au code")
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Erreur ajout capacitûˋ: {str(e)}")
                
        

def add_new_capability(pattern):
    """Ajoute une nouvelle capacitûôˋ basûôˋe sur les patterns."""
    function_name = f"capacite_auto_{hash(pattern) & 0xFFFFFFFF}"
    new_code = f'''
@suivi_performance_capacite
def {function_name}():
    """Capacitûôˋ auto-gûôˋnûôˋrûôˋe basûôˋe sur le pattern: {pattern[:100]}..."""
    log("Exûôˋcution d'une nouvelle capacitûôˋ auto-gûôˋnûôˋrûôˋe basûôˋe sur un pattern rûôˋussi.")
    return execute_commande_securisee("{pattern.replace('"', '\\"')}")
'''
    if self_modifier_v2.add_function(new_code, function_name):
        log(f"û¯é¡ôÏô˜ Nouvelle capacitûôˋ '{function_name}' ajoutûôˋe au code.")
    else:
        log(f"ûã¯chec de l'insertion de la capacitûôˋ '{function_name}'.", level="error")

def add_new_capability(pattern):
    """Ajoute une nouvelle capacitûˋ basûˋe sur les patterns."""
    function_name = f"capacite_auto_{hash(pattern) & 0xFFFFFFFF}"
    new_code = f'''
@suivi_performance_capacite
def {function_name}():
    """Capacitûˋ auto-gûˋnûˋrûˋe basûˋe sur le pattern: {pattern[:100]}..."""
    log("Exûˋcution d'une nouvelle capacitûˋ auto-gûˋnûˋrûˋe basûˋe sur un pattern rûˋussi.")
    return execute_commande_securisee("{pattern.replace('"', '\\"')}")
'''
    if self_modifier_v2.add_function(new_code, function_name):
        log(f"ÞÏ˜ Nouvelle capacitûˋ '{function_name}' ajoutûˋe au code.")

        log(f"ûchec de l'insertion de la capacitûˋ '{function_name}'.", level="error")



def add_new_capability(pattern):
    """Ajoute une nouvelle capacitûˋ basûˋe sur les patterns."""
    function_name = f"capacite_auto_{hash(pattern) & 0xFFFFFFFF}" # Nom unique basûˋ sur le hash
    new_code = f'''
@suivi_performance_capacite
def {function_name}():
    """Capacitûˋ auto-gûˋnûˋrûˋe basûˋe sur le pattern: {pattern[:100]}..."""
    log("Exûˋcution d'une nouvelle capacitûˋ auto-gûˋnûˋrûˋe basûˋe sur un pattern rûˋussi.")
    return execute_commande_securisee("{pattern.replace('"', '\\"')}")
'''
    try:
        # Formatage avec black et isort avant insertion
        formatted_code = black.format_str(new_code, mode=black.FileMode())
        formatted_code = isort.code(formatted_code)
        
        # Utilisation de l'AST pour valider le code avant insertion
        ast.parse(formatted_code)
        
        if inserer_code_strategique(formatted_code):
            log(f"ÞÏ˜ Nouvelle capacitûˋ '{function_name}' ajoutûˋe au code.")
            # pylint.run_main(['--disable=all', '--enable=E0602', __file__]) # Exemple de validation pylint
        else:
            log(f"ûchec de l'insertion de la capacitûˋ '{function_name}'.", level="error")
    except SyntaxError as e:
        log(f"Erreur de syntaxe dans la capacitûˋ auto-gûˋnûˋrûˋe '{function_name}': {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"Erreur ajout capacitûˋ '{function_name}': {str(e)}", level="error", exc_info=True)













#=======================================
# def add_observation(self, commande, resultat, succes, contexte_systeme)
#=======================================

    def add_observation(self, commande, resultat, succes, contexte_systeme):
        observation = {
            "timestamp": time.time(),
            "commande": commande,
            "resultat": resultat,
            "succes": succes,
            "contexte_systeme": contexte_systeme
        }
        self.observations.append(observation)
        conn = sqlite3.connect(self.db_file)
        cursor = conn.cursor()
        cursor.execute(
            "INSERT INTO observations (timestamp, commande, resultat, succes, contexte_systeme) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)",
            (observation["timestamp"], observation["commande"], observation["resultat"], observation["succes"],
             orjson.dumps(observation["contexte_systeme"]))
        )
        conn.commit()
        conn.close()
        self.update_causal_model()



    def add_observation(self, commande, resultat, succes, contexte_systeme):
        observation = {
            "timestamp": time.time(),
            "commande": commande,
            "resultat": resultat,
            "succes": succes,
            "contexte_systeme": contexte_systeme
        }
        self.observations.append(observation)
        conn = sqlite3.connect(self.db_file)
        cursor = conn.cursor()
        cursor.execute(
            "INSERT INTO observations (timestamp, commande, resultat, succes, contexte_systeme) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)",
            (observation["timestamp"], observation["commande"], observation["resultat"], observation["succes"],
             json.dumps(observation["contexte_systeme"]))
        )
        conn.commit()
        conn.close()
        self.update_causal_model()



    def add_observation(self, commande, resultat, succes, contexte_systeme):
        obs = {"timestamp": time.time(), "commande": commande, "succes": int(succes), "context": contexte_systeme}
        self.observations.append(obs)
        with sqlite3.connect(self.db_file) as conn:
            conn.execute("INSERT INTO observations (timestamp, commande, succes, context) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)", (obs["timestamp"], commande, succes, json.dumps(contexte_systeme)))
        if len(self.observations) >= 10: self.update_causal_model()



    






#=======================================
# def add_relation(self, concept1, relation_type, concept2)
#=======================================

    def add_relation(self, concept1, relation_type, concept2):
        self.graph.add_edge(concept1, concept2, type=relation_type)
        self._save_graph_to_db()






#=======================================
# def add_relation(self, concept1, relation_type, concept2, attributes=None)
#=======================================

    def add_relation(self, concept1, relation_type, concept2, attributes=None):
        if not self.graph.has_node(concept1):
            self.graph.add_node(concept1, type='unknown', first_seen=time.time())
        if not self.graph.has_node(concept2):
            self.graph.add_node(concept2, type='unknown', first_seen=time.time())
        
        edge_attributes = attributes if attributes is not None else {}
        edge_attributes['type'] = relation_type
        self.graph.add_edge(concept1, concept2, **edge_attributes)
        self._save_graph_to_db()

def add_to_blacklist_ci(command):
    global DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST
    clean_cmd = command.split()[0] + " "
    if clean_cmd not in DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST:
        DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST.append(clean_cmd)
        log(f"[LOCAL_CI] AUTO-PROTECTION: '{clean_cmd}' ajoutûôˋ û  la blacklist")

def add_to_blacklist(command):
    """Ajoute une commande û  la blacklist dynamique de maniûô´re thread-safe."""
    global DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST
    clean_cmd = command.split()[0] + " "

    with threading.Lock():
        if clean_cmd not in DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST:
            DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST.append(clean_cmd)
            log(f"û¯é¡ã¤ôÀû₤ô¡ô AUTO-PROTECTION: '{clean_cmd}' ajoutûôˋ û  la blacklist")
            update_comm(f"Nouvelle protection: commande '{clean_cmd}' maintenant bloquûôˋe")
        else:
            log(f"Commande '{clean_cmd}' dûôˋjû  dans la blacklist.", level="info")

def add_to_winning_patterns_ci(commande):
    """Ajoute une commande aux patterns gagnants, en ûôˋvitant les doublons et en analysant les similaritûôˋs."""
    winning_file = EVOLUT_HOME / "winning_patterns.log"

    if not is_valuable_command_ci(commande):
        return

    ligne_a_ecrire = f"{commande.strip()}\n"
    if ecrire_ligne_unique(winning_file, ligne_a_ecrire):
        log(f"[LOCAL_CI] û¯é¡é§ô₤ NOUVELLE COMMANDE GAGNANTE Dûã¯COUVERTE: {commande.strip()}")

    if ecrire_ligne_unique(winning_file, ligne_a_ecrire):
        log(f"û¯é¡é§ô₤ NOUVELLE COMMANDE GAGNANTE Dûã¯COUVERTE: {commande.strip()}")



    def add_to_winning_patterns(commande):
        log(f"STUB: add_to_winning_patterns('{commande}')")
        
        
        
def add_to_winning_patterns(commande):
    """Ajoute une commande aux patterns gagnants, en ûˋvitant les doublons et en analysant les similaritûˋs."""
    winning_file = EVOLUT_HOME / "winning_patterns.log"

    if not is_valuable_command(commande):
        return

    ligne_a_ecrire = f"{commande.strip()}\n"
    if ecrire_ligne_unique(winning_file, ligne_a_ecrire):
        log(f"Þ₤ NOUVELLE COMMANDE GAGNANTE DûCOUVERTE: {commande.strip()}")


        
        # Analyse de similaritûˋ avec DBSCAN pour regrouper les patterns gagnants
        # Ceci est un exemple conceptuel, nûˋcessiterait un embedding des commandes
        # commands_df = pd.read_csv(winning_file, header=None, names=['command'])
        # embeddings = sentence_transformer_model.encode(commands_df['command'].tolist())
        # clustering = DBSCAN(eps=0.5, min_samples=5).fit(embeddings)
        # commands_df['cluster'] = clustering.labels_
        # log(f"Patterns gagnants regroupûˋs en {commands_df['cluster'].nunique()} clusters.")













#=======================================
# def ajouter_probleme(self, fichier, type_probleme, details, severite)
#=======================================

    def ajouter_probleme(self, fichier, type_probleme, details, severite):
        """Ajoute un problû´me au rapport"""
        probleme = {
            'fichier': fichier,
            'type': type_probleme,
            'details': details,
            'severite': severite,
            'timestamp': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
        }
        
        self.rapport_complet.append(probleme)
        
        if fichier not in self.fichiers_problemes:
            self.fichiers_problemes[fichier] = []
        self.fichiers_problemes[fichier].append(probleme)

    def analyser_applications(self):
        """Analyse les applications"""
        resultat = "ÞÝ APPLICATIONS\n\n"
        apps_crash = execute_commande_securisee("logcat -d | grep -i 'fatal\\|crash' | tail -5")
        if apps_crash:
            resultat += f"Crashs rûˋcents:\n{apps_crash}\n"
            self.problemes_critiques.append("ÞÝ Applications qui plantent")
            self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("Þ Mettre û  jour les applications problûˋmatiques")
        return resultat



    def analyser_applications(self):
        """Analyse les applications"""
        log("ÞÝ Analyse des applications...")

        resultat = "ÞÝ APPLICATIONS\n\n"

        # Applications rûˋcentes
        apps_recentes = execute_commande_securisee("ps -A --sort=-pcpu | head -10")
        if apps_recentes:
            resultat += f"Applications rûˋcentes (CPU):\n{apps_recentes}\n"

        # Applications crashûˋes
        apps_crash = execute_commande_securisee("logcat -d | grep -i 'fatal\\|crash' | tail -5")
        if apps_crash:
            resultat += f"Crashs rûˋcents:\n{apps_crash}\n"
            self.problemes_critiques.append("ÞÝ Applications qui plantent")
            self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("Þ Mettre û  jour les applications problûˋmatiques")

        return resultat



    def analyser_applications(self):
        """Analyse les applications en utilisant psutil et re."""
        log("û¯é¡ãôÝ Analyse des applications...")
        resultat = "û¯é¡ãôÝ APPLICATIONS\n\n"

        processes = sorted(psutil.process_iter(['pid', 'name', 'cpu_percent']), key=lambda p: p.info['cpu_percent'], reverse=True)
        resultat += "Applications rûôˋcentes (CPU):\n"
        for p in processes[:10]:
            resultat += f"  - PID: {p.info['pid']}, Name: {p.info['name']}, CPU: {p.info['cpu_percent']}%\n"

        apps_crash_cmd = "logcat -d | grep -i 'fatal\\|crash' | tail -5"
        apps_crash_output = execute_commande_securisee(apps_crash_cmd)
        if apps_crash_output:
            resultat += f"Crashs rûôˋcents:\n{apps_crash_output}\n"
            self.problemes_critiques.append("û¯é¡ãôÝ Applications qui plantent")
            self.suggestions_amûôˋlioration.append("û¯é¡ãã Mettre û  jour les applications problûôˋmatiques")

        # Simulation d'analyse de performance graphique d'une application avec scikit-image
        try:
            # Crûôˋer une image de performance simulûôˋe (ex: un graphique)
            simulated_image_path = RAPPORTS_DIR / "simulated_app_performance.png"
            # Crûôˋer une image noire pour la simulation
            simulated_image = np.zeros((100, 100), dtype=np.uint8)
            ski_io.imsave(str(simulated_image_path), simulated_image)
            
            image = ski_io.imread(str(simulated_image_path))
            edges = ski_feature.canny(image)
            log(f"Skimage: Simulation d'analyse de performance graphique pour {simulated_image_path} (edges: {edges.sum()})", level="debug")
            # os.remove(simulated_image_path) # Nettoyer l'image simulûôˋe
        except Exception as e:
            log(f"Skimage simulation error: {e}", level="warning")

        return resultat

    def analyser_applications(self):
        """Analyse les applications en utilisant psutil et re."""
        log("ÞÝ Analyse des applications...")
        resultat = "ÞÝ APPLICATIONS\n\n"

        # Applications rûˋcentes (par utilisation CPU)
        processes = sorted(psutil.process_iter(['pid', 'name', 'cpu_percent']), key=lambda p: p.info['cpu_percent'], reverse=True)
        resultat += "Applications rûˋcentes (CPU):\n"
        for p in processes[:10]:
            resultat += f"  - PID: {p.info['pid']}, Name: {p.info['name']}, CPU: {p.info['cpu_percent']}%\n"

        # Applications crashûˋes (via logcat)
        apps_crash_cmd = "logcat -d | grep -i 'fatal\\|crash' | tail -5"
        apps_crash_output = execute_commande_securisee(apps_crash_cmd)
        if apps_crash_output:
            resultat += f"Crashs rûˋcents:\n{apps_crash_output}\n"
            self.problemes_critiques.append("ÞÝ Applications qui plantent")
            self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("Þ Mettre û  jour les applications problûˋmatiques")

        return resultat



    

    







#=======================================
# def analyser_batterie(self)
#=======================================


    def analyser_batterie(self):
        """Analyse l'ûˋtat de la batterie"""
        resultat = "Þ BATTERIE\n\n"
        batterie = execute_commande_securisee("dumpsys battery 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'level|scale|status|temperature'")
        if batterie:
            resultat += f"ûtat batterie:\n{batterie}\n"
            for line in batterie.split('\n'):
                if "level" in line and "scale" not in line:
                    try:
                        niveau = int(''.join(filter(str.isdigit, line.split(':')[1])))
                        if niveau <= self.alertes_seuil['batterie']:
                            self.problemes_critiques.append(f"Þ Batterie critique (< {self.alertes_seuil['batterie']}%)")
                            self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("Þ Brancher le chargeur rapidement")
                    except:
                        pass
        return resultat



    def analyser_batterie(self):
        """Analyse l'ûˋtat de la batterie"""
        log("Þ Analyse de la batterie...")

        resultat = "Þ BATTERIE\n\n"

        # Niveau de batterie
        batterie = execute_commande_securisee("dumpsys battery 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'level|scale|status|temperature'")
        if batterie:
            resultat += f"ûtat batterie:\n{batterie}\n"
        else:
            # Alternative
            batterie_alt = execute_commande_securisee("cat /sys/class/power_supply/battery/capacity 2>/dev/null")
            if batterie_alt:
                resultat += f"Niveau batterie: {batterie_alt.strip()}%\n"

        # Santûˋ batterie
        batterie_sante = execute_commande_securisee("cat /sys/class/power_supply/battery/health 2>/dev/null")
        if batterie_sante:
            resultat += f"Santûˋ batterie: {batterie_sante}\n"

        # Dûˋtection problû´mes
        if batterie:
            for line in batterie.split('\n'):
                if "level" in line and "scale" not in line:
                    try:
                        niveau = int(''.join(filter(str.isdigit, line.split(':')[1])))
                        if niveau < 20:
                            self.problemes_critiques.append("Þ Batterie trû´s faible (<20%)")
                            self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("Þ Brancher le chargeur rapidement")
                        elif niveau < 10:
                            self.problemes_critiques.append("Þ Batterie critique (<10%)")
                    except:
                        pass

        return resultat



    def analyser_batterie(self):
        """Analyse l'ûôˋtat de la batterie en utilisant psutil et numpy."""
        log("û¯é¡ãã¿ Analyse de la batterie...")
        resultat = "û¯é¡ãã¿ BATTERIE\n\n"

        battery = psutil.sensors_battery()
        if battery:
            resultat += f"Niveau: {battery.percent}%\n"
            resultat += f"ûã¯tat: {'Chargement' if battery.power_plugged else 'Dûôˋchargement'}\n"
            resultat += f"Temps restant: {str(datetime.timedelta(seconds=battery.secsleft)) if battery.secsleft != psutil.POWER_TIME_UNLIMITED else 'Illimitûôˋ'}\n"
            
            batt_temp_cmd = "cat /sys/class/power_supply/battery/temp 2>/dev/null"
            batt_temp_output = execute_commande_securisee(batt_temp_cmd)
            if batt_temp_output and batt_temp_output.strip().isdigit():
                temp_c = int(batt_temp_output.strip()) / 10.0
                resultat += f"Tempûôˋrature: {temp_c:.1f}ûô¯C\n"
                if temp_c > 45:
                    self.problemes_critiques.append("û¯é¡éôÀû₤ô¡ô Surchauffe batterie dûôˋtectûôˋe (>45ûô¯C)")
                    self.suggestions_amûôˋlioration.append("ûÂôãû₤ô¡ô Laisser refroidir le tûôˋlûôˋphone")
                elif temp_c > 40:
                    self.problemes_critiques.append("ûÂéÀ û₤ô¡ô Batterie chaude (>40ûô¯C)")

            if battery.percent < 20:
                self.problemes_critiques.append("û¯é¡ãã¿ Batterie trûô´s faible (<20%)")
                self.suggestions_amûôˋlioration.append("û¯é¡ãé Brancher le chargeur rapidement")
            elif battery.percent < 10:
                self.problemes_critiques.append("û¯é¡ãã¤ Batterie critique (<10%)")
        else:
            resultat += "Informations batterie non disponibles.\n"

        return resultat

#=======================================
# def analyser_contexte_systeme()
#=======================================

def analyser_contexte_systeme():
    """Analyse et retourne le contexte actuel du systû´me."""
    try:
        load_avg = os.getloadavg()
        return {
            "load_1m": load_avg[0],
            "heure": datetime.now().hour,
            "jour": datetime.now().weekday()
        }
    except Exception:
        return {"load_1m": 0.5, "heure": 12, "jour": 3}
        


def analyser_contexte_systeme():
    """Analyse et retourne le contexte actuel du systûô´me."""
    try:
        load_avg = os.getloadavg()
        return {
            "load_1m": load_avg[0],
            "heure": datetime.now().hour,
            "jour": datetime.now().weekday()
        }
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"Erreur lors de l'analyse du contexte systûô´me: {e}", level="error")
        return {"load_1m": 0.5, "heure": 12, "jour": 3}



def analyser_contexte_systeme():
    """Analyse et retourne le contexte actuel du systû´me."""
    try:
        load_avg = os.getloadavg()
        return {
            "load_1m": load_avg[0],
            "heure": datetime.now().hour,
            "jour": datetime.now().weekday()
        }
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"Erreur lors de l'analyse du contexte systû´me: {e}", level="error")
        return {"load_1m": 0.5, "heure": 12, "jour": 3}



def analyser_contexte_systeme():
    """Analyse et retourne le contexte actuel du systûô´me."""
    try:
        load_avg = os.getloadavg()
        return {
            "load_1m": load_avg[0],
            "heure": datetime.now().hour,
            "jour": datetime.now().weekday()
        }
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"Erreur lors de l'analyse du contexte systûô´me: {e}", level="error")
        return {"load_1m": 0.5, "heure": 12, "jour": 3}
with open('base_functions.py', 'r') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()

# Trouver oû¿ insûˋrer la dûˋfinition de log
insert_pos = 0
for i, line in enumerate(lines):
    if line.startswith('import ') or line.startswith('from '):
        insert_pos = i + 1
    elif line.strip() and not line.startswith('#') and insert_pos > 0:
        break

# Dûˋfinition de log

def analyser_contexte_systeme():
    return {"timestamp": time.time()}









#=======================================

    def analyser_contexte_systeme(self):

#=======================================
# def analyser_correlation_commande_ci(self, commande, resultats_recentes)
#=======================================

def analyser_correlation_commande_ci(self, commande, resultats_recentes):
        """
        Analyse comment une commande performe dans diffûôˋrents contextes en identifiant les diffûôˋrences.
        """
        if len(resultats_recentes) < 3:
            return None

        succes = [r for r in resultats_recentes if r["succes"]]
        echecs = [r for r in resultats_recentes if not r["succes"]]

        if not succes or not echecs:
            return None

        contexte_succes = [r["contexte_systeme"] for r in succes]
        contexte_echecs = [r["contexte_systeme"] for r in echecs]

        differences = self.trouver_differences_contextuelles(contexte_succes, contexte_echecs)

        if differences:
            correlation = CorrelationContexte(
                commande=commande,
                differences_contextuelles=differences,
                taux_succes=len(succes) / len(resultats_recentes),
                nombre_observations=len(resultats_recentes)
            )
            with self.lock:
                self.correlations_decouvertes.append(correlation)
                self._save_correlation_to_db(correlation)
            log(f"[LOCAL_CI] û¯é¡ãã CORRûã¯LATION Dûã¯TECTûã¯E pour '{commande}': {differences}")
            causal_reasoner.infer_causality(commande, differences)
            return correlation
        return None

#=======================================
# def analyser_correlation_commande(self, commande, resultats_recentes)

def analyser_correlation_commande(self, commande, resultats_recentes):
        """
        Analyse comment une commande performe dans diffûˋrents contextes
        """
        if len(resultats_recentes) < 3:
            return None

        succes = [r for r in resultats_recentes if r["succes"]]
        echecs = [r for r in resultats_recentes if not r["succes"]]

        if not succes or not echecs:
            return None

        # Analyser les diffûˋrences de contexte
        contexte_succes = [r["contexte_systeme"] for r in succes]
        contexte_echecs = [r["contexte_systeme"] for r in echecs]

        differences = self.trouver_differences_contextuelles(contexte_succes, contexte_echecs)

        if differences:
            correlation = {
                "commande": commande,
                "differences_contextuelles": differences,
                "taux_succes": len(succes) / len(resultats_recentes),
                "nombre_observations": len(resultats_recentes),
                "timestamp_decouverte": time.time()
            }

            self.correlations_decouvertes.append(correlation)
            # self.sauvegarder_correlation(correlation) # A implûˋmenter si persistance voulue

            return correlation

        return None



def analyser_correlation_commande(self, commande, resultats_recentes):
        """
        Analyse comment une commande performe dans diffûôˋrents contextes en identifiant les diffûôˋrences.
        """
        if len(resultats_recentes) < 3:
            return None

        succes = [r for r in resultats_recentes if r["succes"]]
        echecs = [r for r in resultats_recentes if not r["succes"]]

        if not succes or not echecs:
            return None

        contexte_succes = [r["contexte_systeme"] for r in succes]
        contexte_echecs = [r["contexte_systeme"] for r in echecs]

        differences = self.trouver_differences_contextuelles(contexte_succes, contexte_echecs)

        if differences:
            correlation = CorrelationContexte(
                commande=commande,
                differences_contextuelles=differences,
                taux_succes=len(succes) / len(resultats_recentes),
                nombre_observations=len(resultats_recentes)
            )
            with self.lock:
                self.correlations_decouvertes.append(correlation)
                self._save_correlation_to_db(correlation)
            log(f"û¯é¡ãã CORRûã¯LATION Dûã¯TECTûã¯E pour '{commande}': {differences}")
            causal_reasoner.infer_causality(commande, differences)
            return correlation
        return None

#=======================================
# def analyser_dangers_et_blacklister(self, content)
#=======================================


    def analyser_dangers_et_blacklister(self, content):
        """Ajoute û  la blacklist dynamique les commandes qui ûˋchouent ou sont dangereuses"""
        global DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST
        
        # Exemple: Blacklister les commandes qui ûˋchouent systûˋmatiquement
        echecs = re.findall(r"COMMANDE: (.*?)\n.*?CONCLUSION: ûCHEC", content, re.DOTALL)
        for cmd in echecs:
            cmd_base = cmd.split()[0] + " " if cmd.split() else cmd
            if cmd_base not in DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST and cmd_base not in IMMUTABLE_BLACKLIST:
                DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST.append(cmd_base)
                log(f"ÞÀÿ¡ AUTO-PROTECTION: '{cmd_base}' ajoutûˋ û  la blacklist (ûˋchec rûˋpûˋtûˋ)")






#=======================================
# def analyser_echecs_pour_patterns(self, content)
#=======================================

    def analyser_echecs_pour_patterns(self, content):
        """Extrait des patterns qui mû´nent systûˋmatiquement û  l'ûˋchec"""
        
        echecs_complets = re.findall(r"=== APPRENTISSAGE.*?COMMANDE: (.*?)\n.*?ERREUR_EXACTE: (.*?)\n.*?CONCLUSION: ûCHEC", content, re.DOTALL)
        
        for commande, erreur in echecs_complets:
            # Simple extraction du premier mot de la commande
            mot_cle = commande.split()[0]
            if mot_cle not in self.patterns_mortels and mot_cle not in IMMUTABLE_BLACKLIST:
                # Logique simplifiûˋe: si le mot-clûˋ apparaûÛt dans plus de 5 ûˋchecs, il devient un pattern mortel
                if content.count(f"COMMANDE: {mot_cle}") > 5 and content.count(f"CONCLUSION: ûCHEC") > 5:
                    self.patterns_mortels.add(mot_cle)
                    log(f"Þ¨ PATTERN MORTEL IDENTIFIû: {mot_cle}")








#=======================================
# def analyser_espace_stockage(self)
#=======================================


    def analyser_espace_stockage(self):
        """Analyse l'espace de stockage"""
        resultat = "Þƒ ESPACE DE STOCKAGE\n\n"
        df_result = execute_commande_securisee("df -h /data /system /sdcard 2>/dev/null")
        if df_result:
            resultat += f"Utilisation disque:\n{df_result}\n"
        
        # Dûˋtection problû´mes
        stockage_sdcard = execute_commande_securisee("df -h /sdcard 2>/dev/null | tail -1")
        if stockage_sdcard:
            parts = stockage_sdcard.split()
            if len(parts) >= 5:
                try:
                    utilisation = int(parts[4].replace('%', ''))
                    if utilisation >= self.alertes_seuil['stockage']:
                        self.problemes_critiques.append(f"Þ Stockage critique (> {self.alertes_seuil['stockage']}%)")
                        self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("Þÿ¡  Nettoyer le cache et les fichiers temporaires")
                except:
                    pass
        return resultat



    def analyser_espace_stockage(self):
        """Analyse l'espace de stockage"""
        log("Þƒ Analyse de l'espace de stockage...")

        resultat = "Þƒ ESPACE DE STOCKAGE\n\n"

        # Espace total
        df_result = execute_commande_securisee("df -h /data /system /sdcard 2>/dev/null")
        if df_result:
            resultat += f"Utilisation disque:\n{df_result}\n"

        # Analyse dûˋtaillûˋe
        stockage_data = execute_commande_securisee("du -sh /data/* 2>/dev/null | sort -hr | head -10")
        if stockage_data:
            resultat += f"\nPlus gros dossiers /data:\n{stockage_data}\n"

        # Dûˋtection problû´mes
        stockage_sdcard = execute_commande_securisee("df -h /sdcard 2>/dev/null | tail -1")
        if stockage_sdcard:
            parts = stockage_sdcard.split()
            if len(parts) >= 5:
                try:
                    utilisation = int(parts[4].replace('%', ''))
                    if utilisation > 90:
                        self.problemes_critiques.append("Þ Stockage presque plein (>90%)")
                        self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("Þÿ¡  Nettoyer le cache et les fichiers temporaires")
                    elif utilisation > 80:
                        self.problemes_critiques.append("ã ÿ¡  Stockage critique (>80%)")
                except:
                    pass

        return resultat



    def analyser_espace_stockage(self):
        """Analyse l'espace de stockage en utilisant psutil et pandas."""
        log("û¯é¡ãôƒ Analyse de l'espace de stockage...")
        resultat = "û¯é¡ãôƒ ESPACE DE STOCKAGE\n\n"

        disk_usage_root = psutil.disk_usage('/')
        disk_usage_data = psutil.disk_usage('/data')
        
        df_disk = pd.DataFrame({
            'Partition': ['/', '/data'],
            'Total (GB)': [disk_usage_root.total / (1024**3), disk_usage_data.total / (1024**3)],
            'Used (GB)': [disk_usage_root.used / (1024**3), disk_usage_data.used / (1024**3)],
            'Free (GB)': [disk_usage_root.free / (1024**3), disk_usage_data.free / (1024**3)],
            'Percent': [disk_usage_root.percent, disk_usage_data.percent]
        })
        resultat += f"Utilisation disque:\n{df_disk.to_string(index=False)}\n"

        stockage_data_cmd = "du -sh /data/* 2>/dev/null | sort -hr | head -10"
        stockage_data_output = execute_commande_securisee(stockage_data_cmd)
        if stockage_data_output:
            resultat += f"\nPlus gros dossiers /data:\n{stockage_data_output}\n"

        if disk_usage_data.percent > 90:
            self.problemes_critiques.append("û¯é¡ãã¤ Stockage /data presque plein (>90%)")
            self.suggestions_amûôˋlioration.append("û¯é¡ããû₤ô¡ô Nettoyer le cache et les fichiers temporaires")
        elif disk_usage_data.percent > 80:
            self.problemes_critiques.append("ûÂéÀ û₤ô¡ô Stockage /data critique (>80%)")

        return resultat

#=======================================
# def analyser_et_mettre_a_jour(self)
#=======================================

def analyser_et_mettre_a_jour(self):
        """Relit LEARNING_FILE pour mettre û  jour patterns, stratûˋgies et blacklist dynamique"""
        log("ÞÏ  Analyse intensive de LEARNING_FILE...")
        
        try:
            with open(LEARNING_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                content = f.read()
            
            # 1. Mise û  jour de la blacklist dynamique
            self.analyser_dangers_et_blacklister(content)
            
            # 2. Identification des solutions gagnantes
            self.identifier_solutions_gagnantes(content)
            
            # 3. Analyse des ûˋchecs pour patterns mortels
            self.analyser_echecs_pour_patterns(content)
            
            log(f"ã Analyse terminûˋe. Blacklist dynamique: {len(DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST)}, Solutions gagnantes: {len(self.solutions_gagnantes)}")
            
        except Exception as e:
            log(f"ã Erreur analyse LEARNING_FILE: {e}")









#=======================================
# def analyser_logs_systeme(self)
#=======================================

    def analyser_logs_systeme(self):
        """Analyse les logs systû´me"""
        resultat = "Þ LOGS SYSTûME\n\n"
        errors = execute_commande_securisee("logcat -d -s *:E | tail -10")
        if errors:
            resultat += f"Derniû´res erreurs:\n{errors}\n"
        return resultat



    def analyser_logs_systeme(self):
        """Analyse les logs systû´me"""
        log("Þ Analyse des logs systû´me...")

        resultat = "Þ LOGS SYSTûME\n\n"

        # Derniû´res erreurs systû´me
        errors = execute_commande_securisee("logcat -d -s *:E | tail -10")
        if errors:
            resultat += f"Derniû´res erreurs:\n{errors}\n"

        # Kernel messages
        dmesg = execute_commande_securisee("dmesg | tail -10")
        if dmesg:
            resultat += f"Messages kernel:\n{dmesg}\n"

        return resultat



    def analyser_logs_systeme(self):
        """Analyse les logs systûô´me en utilisant subprocess et re."""
        log("û¯é¡ãã¿ Analyse des logs systûô´me...")
        resultat = "û¯é¡ãã¿ LOGS SYSTûùME\n\n"

        errors_cmd = "logcat -d -s *:E | tail -10"
        errors_output = execute_commande_securisee(errors_cmd)
        if errors_output:
            resultat += f"Derniûô´res erreurs (logcat):\n{errors_output}\n"

        dmesg_cmd = "dmesg | tail -10"
        dmesg_output = execute_commande_securisee(dmesg_cmd)
        if dmesg_output:
            resultat += f"Messages kernel (dmesg):\n{dmesg_output}\n"

        return resultat



    def analyser_logs_systeme(self):
        """Analyse les logs systû´me en utilisant subprocess et re."""
        log("û¯é¡ãã¿ Analyse des logs systû´me...")
        resultat = "û¯é¡ãã¿ LOGS SYSTûME\n\n"

        errors_cmd = "logcat -d -s *:E | tail -10"
        errors_output = execute_commande_securisee(errors_cmd)
        if errors_output:
            resultat += f"Derniû´res erreurs (logcat):\n{errors_output}\n"

        dmesg_cmd = "dmesg | tail -10"
        dmesg_output = execute_commande_securisee(dmesg_cmd)
        if dmesg_output:
            resultat += f"Messages kernel (dmesg):\n{dmesg_output}\n"

        return resultat



    def analyser_logs_systeme(self):
        """Analyse les logs systû´me en utilisant subprocess et re."""

        return resultat



    



    



    
#=======================================
# def analyser_memoire_ram(self)

def analyser_memoire_ram(self):
        """Analyse la mûˋmoire RAM"""
        resultat = "ÞÏ  MûMOIRE RAM\n\n"
        mem_info = execute_commande_securisee("cat /proc/meminfo")
        if mem_info:
            resultat += f"Info mûˋmoire:\n{mem_info}\n"
        
        # Dûˋtection problû´mes mûˋmoire
        if "MemAvailable" in mem_info:
            total, available = 0, 0
            for line in mem_info.split('\n'):
                if "MemTotal" in line:
                    total = int(''.join(filter(str.isdigit, line.split(':')[1])))
                elif "MemAvailable" in line:
                    available = int(''.join(filter(str.isdigit, line.split(':')[1])))
            
            if total > 0 and available > 0:
                pourcentage_utilise = ((total - available) / total) * 100
                if pourcentage_utilise >= self.alertes_seuil['memoire']:
                    self.problemes_critiques.append(f"Þ Mûˋmoire RAM saturûˋe (> {self.alertes_seuil['memoire']}%)")
                    self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("ÞÏ Fermer les applications en arriû´re-plan")
        return resultat
        
        
        
    def analyser_memoire_ram(self):
        """Analyse la mûˋmoire RAM"""
        log("ÞÏ  Analyse de la mûˋmoire RAM...")

        resultat = "ÞÏ  MûMOIRE RAM\n\n"

        # Mûˋmoire totale et utilisûˋe
        mem_info = execute_commande_securisee("cat /proc/meminfo")
        if mem_info:
            resultat += f"Info mûˋmoire:\n{mem_info}\n"

        # Utilisation en temps rûˋel
        mem_usage = execute_commande_securisee("free -m 2>/dev/null || cat /proc/meminfo | grep -E 'MemTotal|MemFree|MemAvailable'")
        if mem_usage:
            resultat += f"\nUtilisation mûˋmoire:\n{mem_usage}\n"

        # Dûˋtection problû´mes mûˋmoire
        if "MemAvailable" in mem_info:
            try:
                total = 0
                available = 0
                for line in mem_info.split('\n'):
                    if "MemTotal" in line:
                        total = int(''.join(filter(str.isdigit, line.split(':')[1])))
                    elif "MemAvailable" in line:
                        available = int(''.join(filter(str.isdigit, line.split(':')[1])))

                if total > 0 and available > 0:
                    pourcentage_utilise = ((total - available) / total) * 100
                    if pourcentage_utilise > 90:
                        self.problemes_critiques.append("Þ Mûˋmoire RAM saturûˋe (>90%)")
                        self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("ÞÏ Fermer les applications en arriû´re-plan")
                    elif pourcentage_utilise > 80:
                        self.problemes_critiques.append("ã ÿ¡  Mûˋmoire RAM ûˋlevûˋe (>80%)")
            except:
                pass

        return resultat



    def analyser_memoire_ram(self):
        """Analyse la mûôˋmoire RAM en utilisant psutil et pandas."""
        log("û¯é¡ôÏ  Analyse de la mûôˋmoire RAM...")
        resultat = "û¯é¡ôÏ  Mûã¯MOIRE RAM\n\n"

        mem_info = psutil.virtual_memory()
        df_mem = pd.DataFrame({
            'Metric': ['Total', 'Available', 'Used', 'Free', 'Percent'],
            'Value (MB)': [mem_info.total // (1024*1024), mem_info.available // (1024*1024),
                           mem_info.used // (1024*1024), mem_info.free // (1024*1024),
                           mem_info.percent]
        })
        resultat += f"Info mûôˋmoire:\n{df_mem.to_string(index=False)}\n"

        if mem_info.percent > 90:
            self.problemes_critiques.append("û¯é¡ãã¤ Mûôˋmoire RAM saturûôˋe (>90%)")
            self.suggestions_amûôˋlioration.append("û¯é¡ãôÏ Fermer les applications en arriûô´re-plan")
        elif mem_info.percent > 80:
            self.problemes_critiques.append("ûÂéÀ û₤ô¡ô Mûôˋmoire RAM ûôˋlevûôˋe (>80%)")

        return resultat

#=======================================
# def analyser_pattern_erreur_ci(self, commande, erreur, contexte)
#=======================================

def analyser_pattern_erreur_ci(self, commande, erreur, contexte):
        """
        Analyse les patterns dans les erreurs rûôˋpûôˋtûôˋes en utilisant le clustering.
        """
        cle_pattern = f"ERROR_{commande.split()[0]}_{self.extraire_type_erreur(erreur)}"
        with self.lock:
            if cle_pattern not in self.patterns_decouverts:
                self.patterns_decouverts[cle_pattern] = PatternEchec(
                    commande=commande,
                    erreur=erreur,
                    contextes=[contexte]
                )
            pattern = self.patterns_decouverts[cle_pattern]
            pattern.occurrences += 1
            pattern.contextes.append(contexte)

            if pattern.occurrences >= 2:
                self.rechercher_solutions_pattern(pattern)
            self._save_pattern_to_db(cle_pattern, pattern)
        return pattern
        
        



        
        



#=======================================
# def analyser_pattern_erreur(self, commande, erreur, contexte)
#=======================================

    def analyser_pattern_erreur(self, commande, erreur, contexte):
        """
        Analyse les patterns dans les erreurs rûˋpûˋtûˋes
        """
        cle_pattern = f"{commande}_{erreur}"

        if cle_pattern not in self.patterns_decouverts:
            self.patterns_decouverts[cle_pattern] = {
                "commande": commande,
                "erreur": erreur,
                "premiere_occurrence": time.time(),
                "occurrences": 0,
                "contextes": [],
                "alternatives_testeess": [],
                "alternatives_reussies": []
            }

        pattern = self.patterns_decouverts[cle_pattern]
        pattern["occurrences"] += 1
        pattern["contextes"].append(contexte)

        # Si pattern rûˋpûˋtûˋ, chercher des solutions
        if pattern["occurrences"] >= 2:
            self.rechercher_solutions_pattern(pattern)

        return pattern



    def analyser_pattern_erreur(self, commande, erreur, contexte):
        """
        Analyse les patterns dans les erreurs rûôˋpûôˋtûôˋes en utilisant le clustering.
        """
        cle_pattern = f"ERROR_{commande.split()[0]}_{self.extraire_type_erreur(erreur)}"
        with self.lock:
            if cle_pattern not in self.patterns_decouverts:
                self.patterns_decouverts[cle_pattern] = PatternEchec(
                    commande=commande,
                    erreur=erreur,
                    contextes=[contexte]
                )
            pattern = self.patterns_decouverts[cle_pattern]
            pattern.occurrences += 1
            pattern.contextes.append(contexte)

            if pattern.occurrences >= 2:
                self.rechercher_solutions_pattern(pattern)
            self._save_pattern_to_db(cle_pattern, pattern)
        return pattern



    def analyser_pattern_erreur(self, commande, erreur, contexte):
        """
        Analyse les patterns dans les erreurs rûˋpûˋtûˋes en utilisant le clustering.
        """
        cle_pattern = f"ERROR_{commande.split()[0]}_{self.extraire_type_erreur(erreur)}"
        with self.lock:
            if cle_pattern not in self.patterns_decouverts:
                self.patterns_decouverts[cle_pattern] = PatternEchec(
                    commande=commande,
                    erreur=erreur,
                    contextes=[contexte]
                )
            pattern = self.patterns_decouverts[cle_pattern]
            pattern.occurrences += 1
            pattern.contextes.append(contexte)

            if pattern.occurrences >= 2:
                self.rechercher_solutions_pattern(pattern)
            self._save_pattern_to_db(cle_pattern, pattern)
        return pattern

#=======================================
# def analyser_patterns_contextuels(self)
#=======================================


    def analyser_patterns_contextuels(self):
        """
        Analyse les patterns rûôˋcurrents dans l'historique en utilisant le clustering.
        """
        with self.lock:
            echecs_recurrents = [c for c in self.historique_contextuel[-100:] if not c["succes"]]
            if len(echecs_recurrents) >= 3:
                self.identifier_echecs_recurrents(echecs_recurrents)

            succes_contextuels = [c for c in self.historique_contextuel[-50:] if c["succes"]]
            if succes_contextuels:
                self.identifier_contextes_favorables(succes_contextuels)



    def analyser_patterns_contextuels(self):
        """
        Analyse les patterns rûˋcurrents dans l'historique en utilisant le clustering.
        """
        with self.lock:
            echecs_recurrents = [c for c in self.historique_contextuel[-100:] if not c["succes"]]
            if len(echecs_recurrents) >= 3:
                self.identifier_echecs_recurrents(echecs_recurrents)

            succes_contextuels = [c for c in self.historique_contextuel[-50:] if c["succes"]]
            if succes_contextuels:
                self.identifier_contextes_favorables(succes_contextuels)



    def analyser_patterns_contextuels(self):
        """
        Analyse les patterns rûˋcurrents dans l'historique
        """
        # Analyser les ûˋchecs rûˋcurrents
        echecs_recurrents = []
        for contexte in self.historique_contextuel[-100:]:  # Derniers 100
            if not contexte["succes"]:
                echecs_recurrents.append(contexte)

        if len(echecs_recurrents) >= 3:  # Au moins 3 ûˋchecs similaires
            self.identifier_echecs_recurrents(echecs_recurrents)

        # Analyser les succû´s contextuels
        succes_contextuels = [c for c in self.historique_contextuel[-50:] if c["succes"]]
        if succes_contextuels:
            self.identifier_contextes_favorables(succes_contextuels)

def analyser_patterns_globaux(results, contexte):

def analyser_patterns_globaux(results, contexte):
    """Analyse globale des patterns aprû´s recherche"""
    total_sources = len(results)
    sources_reussies = len([r for r in results.values() if 'connaissances' in r and r['connaissances']['commandes']])

    if total_sources > 0:
        taux_reussite = (sources_reussies / total_sources) * 100

        # Þ₤ ANALYSE PAR CATûGORIE DE SOURCES
        categories_sources = {
            'android_securite': 0,
            'auto_amelioration': 0,
            'performance': 0
        }

        for site, data in results.items():
            if 'connaissances' in data and data['connaissances']['commandes']:
                if any(mot in site.lower() for mot in ['android', 'security', 'exploit', 'pentest']):
                    categories_sources['android_securite'] += 1
                elif any(mot in site.lower() for mot in ['ai', 'ml', 'genetic', 'self']):
                    categories_sources['auto_amelioration'] += 1
                elif any(mot in site.lower() for mot in ['performance', 'optimization', 'speed']):
                    categories_sources['performance'] += 1

        log(f"Þ ANALYSE GLOBALE: {taux_reussite:.1f}% de sources productives")
        log(f"Þ₤ RûPARTITION: Android/Sûˋcuritûˋ: {categories_sources['android_securite']}, "
            f"Auto-amûˋlioration: {categories_sources['auto_amelioration']}, "
            f"Performance: {categories_sources['performance']}")

        # Þ₤ APPRENTISSAGE DES SOURCES FIABLES
        if taux_reussite > 50:
            log("Þ Sources trû´s productives - Renforcement des patterns")
        elif taux_reussite < 20:
            log("ã ÿ¡  Faible productivitûˋ - Rûˋvision des sources nûˋcessaires")



def analyser_patterns_globaux(results, contexte):
    """Analyse globale des patterns aprûô´s recherche avec Pandas et NumPy."""
    total_sources = len(results)
    sources_reussies = len([r for r in results.values() if 'connaissances' in r and r['connaissances']['commandes']])

    if total_sources > 0:
        taux_reussite = (sources_reussies / total_sources) * 100

        categories_sources = {
            'android_securite': 0, 'auto_amelioration': 0, 'performance': 0,
            'reseau': 0, 'systeme': 0, 'exploit': 0
        }

        for site, data in results.items():
            if 'connaissances' in data and data['connaissances']['commandes']:
                if any(mot in site.lower() for mot in ['android', 'security', 'pentest']):
                    categories_sources['android_securite'] += 1
                if any(mot in site.lower() for mot in ['ai', 'ml', 'genetic', 'self', 'evolution']):
                    categories_sources['auto_amelioration'] += 1
                if any(mot in site.lower() for mot in ['performance', 'optimization', 'speed']):
                    categories_sources['performance'] += 1
                if any(mot in site.lower() for mot in ['network', 'reseau', 'wifi']):
                    categories_sources['reseau'] += 1
                if any(mot in site.lower() for mot in ['system', 'linux', 'kernel']):
                    categories_sources['systeme'] += 1
                if any(mot in site.lower() for mot in ['exploit', 'cve', 'vulnerability']):
                    categories_sources['exploit'] += 1

        df_categories = pd.DataFrame([categories_sources])
        log(f"Analyse globale des catûôˋgories de sources:\n{df_categories.to_string()}")

        log(f"û¯é¡ãé  ANALYSE GLOBALE: {taux_reussite:.1f}% de sources productives")
        log(f"û¯é¡é§ô₤ Rûã¯PARTITION: Android/Sûôˋcuritûôˋ: {categories_sources['android_securite']}, "
            f"Auto-amûôˋlioration: {categories_sources['auto_amelioration']}, "
            f"Performance: {categories_sources['performance']}")

        if taux_reussite > 50:
            log("û¯é¡é§ã¯ Sources trûô´s productives - Renforcement des patterns")
        elif taux_reussite < 20:
            log("ûÂéÀ û₤ô¡ô Faible productivitûôˋ - Rûôˋvision des sources nûôˋcessaires")

def analyser_patterns_globaux_web(results, contexte):
    """Analyse globale des patterns aprûô´s recherche avec Pandas et NumPy."""
    total_sources = len(results)
    sources_reussies = len([r for r in results.values() if 'connaissances' in r and r['connaissances']['commandes']])

    if total_sources > 0:
        taux_reussite = (sources_reussies / total_sources) * 100

        categories_sources = {
            'android_securite': 0, 'auto_amelioration': 0, 'performance': 0,
            'reseau': 0, 'systeme': 0, 'exploit': 0
        }

        for site, data in results.items():
            if 'connaissances' in data and data['connaissances']['commandes']:
                if any(mot in site.lower() for mot in ['android', 'security', 'pentest']):
                    categories_sources['android_securite'] += 1
                if any(mot in site.lower() for mot in ['ai', 'ml', 'genetic', 'self', 'evolution']):
                    categories_sources['auto_amelioration'] += 1
                if any(mot in site.lower() for mot in ['performance', 'optimization', 'speed']):
                    categories_sources['performance'] += 1
                if any(mot in site.lower() for mot in ['network', 'reseau', 'wifi']):
                    categories_sources['reseau'] += 1
                if any(mot in site.lower() for mot in ['system', 'linux', 'kernel']):
                    categories_sources['systeme'] += 1
                if any(mot in site.lower() for mot in ['exploit', 'cve', 'vulnerability']):
                    categories_sources['exploit'] += 1

        df_categories = pd.DataFrame([categories_sources])
        log(f"[LOCAL_WEB] Analyse globale des catûôˋgories de sources:\n{df_categories.to_string()}")

        log(f"[LOCAL_WEB] û¯é¡ãé  ANALYSE GLOBALE: {taux_reussite:.1f}% de sources productives")
        log(f"[LOCAL_WEB] û¯é¡é§ô₤ Rûã¯PARTITION: Android/Sûôˋcuritûôˋ: {categories_sources['android_securite']}, "
            f"Auto-amûôˋlioration: {categories_sources['auto_amelioration']}, "
            f"Performance: {categories_sources['performance']}")

        if taux_reussite > 50:
            log("[LOCAL_WEB] û¯é¡é§ã¯ Sources trûô´s productives - Renforcement des patterns")
        elif taux_reussite < 20:
            log("[LOCAL_WEB] ûÂéÀ û₤ô¡ô Faible productivitûôˋ - Rûôˋvision des sources nûôˋcessaires")







#=======================================
# def analyser_patterns_reussite()
#=======================================

def analyser_patterns_reussite():
    """Analyse les patterns qui fonctionnent le mieux"""
    try:
        with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "successful_commands.log", 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            commandes_reussies = f.readlines()

        # Analyse des commandes les plus efficaces
        categories = {}
        for cmd in commandes_reussies:
            cmd_lower = cmd.lower()
            if "find" in cmd_lower: categories["find"] = categories.get("find", 0) + 1
            if "grep" in cmd_lower: categories["grep"] = categories.get("grep", 0) + 1
            if "netstat" in cmd_lower: categories["reseau"] = categories.get("reseau", 0) + 1
            if "cat" in cmd_lower: categories["fichiers"] = categories.get("fichiers", 0) + 1
            if "ps" in cmd_lower: categories["processus"] = categories.get("processus", 0) + 1
        if categories:
            pattern_gagnant = max(categories, key=categories.get)
            log(f"Þ Patterns rûˋussite: {categories} ã Gagnant: {pattern_gagnant}")
            return pattern_gagnant
        else:
            log("Þ Aucun pattern dominant dûˋtectûˋ")
            return None

    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Analyse patterns: {e}")
        return None



def analyser_patterns_reussite():
    """Analyse les patterns qui fonctionnent le mieux."""
    try:
        with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "successful_commands.log", 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            commandes_reussies = f.readlines()

        categories = {}
        for cmd in commandes_reussies:
            cmd_lower = cmd.lower()
            if "find" in cmd_lower: categories["find"] = categories.get("find", 0) + 1
            if "grep" in cmd_lower: categories["grep"] = categories.get("grep", 0) + 1
            if "netstat" in cmd_lower: categories["reseau"] = categories.get("reseau", 0) + 1
            if "cat" in cmd_lower: categories["fichiers"] = categories.get("fichiers", 0) + 1
            if "ps" in cmd_lower: categories["processus"] = categories.get("processus", 0) + 1
        if categories:
            pattern_gagnant = max(categories, key=categories.get)
            log(f"û¯é¡ãé  Patterns rûôˋussite: {categories} ûÂã ã Gagnant: {pattern_gagnant}")

        else:

            return None

    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ûÂôé Analyse patterns: {e}", level="error")

def analyser_patterns_reussite():

        with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "successful_commands.log", 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:

            if "find" in cmd_lower: categories["find"] = categories.get("find", 0) + 1
            if "grep" in cmd_lower: categories["grep"] = categories.get("grep", 0) + 1
            if "netstat" in cmd_lower: categories["reseau"] = categories.get("reseau", 0) + 1
            if "cat" in cmd_lower: categories["fichiers"] = categories.get("fichiers", 0) + 1
            if "ps" in cmd_lower: categories["processus"] = categories.get("processus", 0) + 1

        if categories:
            pattern_gagnant = max(categories, key=categories.get)
            log(f"Þ Patterns rûˋussite: {categories} ã Gagnant: {pattern_gagnant}")
            return pattern_gagnant
        else:
            log("Þ Aucun pattern dominant dûˋtectûˋ")
            return None

    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Analyse patterns: {e}")
        return None

#=======================================
# def analyser_patterns_reussite_avance(commandes_reussies)
#=======================================

def analyser_patterns_reussite_avance(commandes_reussies):
    """Analyse VRAIMENT ce qui marche avec seuils stricts"""

    if len(commandes_reussies) < 20:
        return None

    patterns = {
        "exploration": 0, "reseau": 0, "analyse": 0,
        "securite": 0, "systeme": 0, "fichiers": 0
    }

    for cmd in commandes_reussies[-50:]:  # Seulement les 50 derniû´res
        cmd_lower = cmd.lower()

        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ["find", "locate", "search", "discover", "explore"]):
            patterns["exploration"] += 1
        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ["netstat", "ping", "curl", "wget", "ifconfig", "ip addr"]):
            patterns["reseau"] += 1
        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ["grep", "analyze", "scan", "inspect", "log"]):
            patterns["analyse"] += 1
        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ["ps", "dumpsys", "getprop", "systemctl", "process"]):
            patterns["systeme"] += 1
        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ["cat", "ls", "file", "stat", "read"]):
            patterns["fichiers"] += 1

    # SEUIL MINIMAL POUR CHAQUE PATTERN
    pattern_gagnant = max(patterns, key=patterns.get)
    if patterns[pattern_gagnant] >= 8:  # Au moins 8 occurrences
        log(f"Þ₤ Pattern dominant confirmûˋ: {pattern_gagnant} ({patterns[pattern_gagnant]}/50)")
        return pattern_gagnant

    log(f"Þ Aucun pattern suffisamment dominant (meilleur: {pattern_gagnant} û  {patterns[pattern_gagnant]}/50)")
    return None



def analyser_patterns_reussite_avance(commandes_reussies):
    """Analyse les patterns qui marchent vraiment avec des seuils stricts et des techniques de ML."""
    if len(commandes_reussies) < 20:
        return None

    patterns = {
        "exploration": 0, "reseau": 0, "analyse": 0,
        "securite": 0, "systeme": 0, "fichiers": 0
    }

    for cmd in commandes_reussies[-50:]:
        cmd_lower = cmd.lower()

        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ["find", "locate", "search", "discover", "explore"]):
            patterns["exploration"] += 1
        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ["netstat", "ping", "curl", "wget", "ifconfig", "ip addr"]):
            patterns["reseau"] += 1
        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ["grep", "analyze", "scan", "inspect", "log"]):
            patterns["analyse"] += 1
        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ["ps", "dumpsys", "getprop", "systemctl", "process"]):
            patterns["systeme"] += 1
        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ["cat", "ls", "file", "stat", "read"]):
            patterns["fichiers"] += 1

    pattern_gagnant = max(patterns, key=patterns.get)
    if patterns[pattern_gagnant] >= 8:
        log(f"û¯é¡é§ô₤ Pattern dominant confirmûôˋ: {pattern_gagnant} ({patterns[pattern_gagnant]}/50)")
        
        # Clustering des commandes rûôˋussies pour trouver des sous-patterns
        if len(commandes_reussies) >= 5:
            commands_df = pd.DataFrame({'command': commandes_reussies})
            vectorizer = TfidfVectorizer()
            X = vectorizer.fit_transform(commands_df['command'])
            
            # Utilisation de UMAP pour la rûôˋduction de dimension avant DBSCAN
            reducer = umap.UMAP(n_components=2, random_state=42)
            embeddings_2d = reducer.fit_transform(X.toarray())
            
            clustering = DBSCAN(eps=0.5, min_samples=2).fit(embeddings_2d)
            commands_df['cluster'] = clustering.labels_
            log(f"Commandes rûôˋussies regroupûôˋes en {commands_df['cluster'].nunique()} clusters.", level="debug")

        return pattern_gagnant

    log(f"û¯é¡ãô Aucun pattern suffisamment dominant (meilleur: {pattern_gagnant} û  {patterns[pattern_gagnant]}/50)", level="info")
    return None



def analyser_patterns_reussite_avance(commandes_reussies):
    """Analyse les patterns qui marchent vraiment avec des seuils stricts et des techniques de ML."""
    if len(commandes_reussies) < 20:
        return None

    patterns = {
        "exploration": 0, "reseau": 0, "analyse": 0,
        "securite": 0, "systeme": 0, "fichiers": 0
    }

    for cmd in commandes_reussies[-50:]:
        cmd_lower = cmd.lower()

        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ["find", "locate", "search", "discover", "explore"]):
            patterns["exploration"] += 1
        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ["netstat", "ping", "curl", "wget", "ifconfig", "ip addr"]):
            patterns["reseau"] += 1
        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ["grep", "analyze", "scan", "inspect", "log"]):
            patterns["analyse"] += 1
        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ["ps", "dumpsys", "getprop", "systemctl", "process"]):
            patterns["systeme"] += 1
        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ["cat", "ls", "file", "stat", "read"]):
            patterns["fichiers"] += 1

    pattern_gagnant = max(patterns, key=patterns.get)
    if patterns[pattern_gagnant] >= 8:
        log(f"Þ₤ Pattern dominant confirmûˋ: {pattern_gagnant} ({patterns[pattern_gagnant]}/50)")
        
        if len(commandes_reussies) >= 5:
            commands_df = pd.DataFrame({'command': commandes_reussies})
            vectorizer = TfidfVectorizer()
            X = vectorizer.fit_transform(commands_df['command'])
            
            reducer = umap.UMAP(n_components=2, random_state=42)
            embeddings_2d = reducer.fit_transform(X.toarray())
            
            clustering = DBSCAN(eps=0.5, min_samples=2).fit(embeddings_2d)
            commands_df['cluster'] = clustering.labels_
            log(f"Commandes rûˋussies regroupûˋes en {commands_df['cluster'].nunique()} clusters.", level="debug")

        return pattern_gagnant

    log(f"Þ Aucun pattern suffisamment dominant (meilleur: {pattern_gagnant} û  {patterns[pattern_gagnant]}/50)", level="info")
    return None

    if patterns[pattern_gagnant] >= 8:
        log(f"Þ₤ Pattern dominant confirmûˋ: {pattern_gagnant} ({patterns[pattern_gagnant]}/50)")

    return None

    """Analyse les patterns qui marchent vraiment avec des seuils stricts et des techniques de ML."""

# def analyser_performances(self)
