    def analyser_performances(self):
        """Analyse les performances gûˋnûˋrales"""
        resultat = "ãÀ PERFORMANCES\n\n"
        load_avg = execute_commande_securisee("cat /proc/loadavg")
        if load_avg:
            resultat += f"Charge systû´me: {load_avg}\n"
            try:
                load_1min = float(load_avg.split()[0])
                if load_1min > 3.0:
                    self.problemes_critiques.append("ãÀ Charge CPU trû´s ûˋlevûˋe")
                    self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("Þ Redûˋmarrer le tûˋlûˋphone")
            except:
                pass
        return resultat



    def analyser_performances(self):
        """Analyse les performances gûˋnûˋrales"""
        log("ãÀ Analyse des performances...")

        resultat = "ãÀ PERFORMANCES\n\n"

        # Charge CPU
        load_avg = execute_commande_securisee("cat /proc/loadavg")
        if load_avg:
            resultat += f"Charge systû´me: {load_avg}\n"

        # CPU info
        cpu_info = execute_commande_securisee("cat /proc/cpuinfo | grep -E 'processor|model name' | head -4")
        if cpu_info:
            resultat += f"Info CPU:\n{cpu_info}\n"

        # Frûˋquence CPU
        cpu_freq = execute_commande_securisee("cat /sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu0/cpufreq/scaling_cur_freq 2>/dev/null")
        if cpu_freq:
            try:
                resultat += f"Frûˋquence CPU: {int(cpu_freq)/1000:.1f} MHz\n"
            except:
                pass

        # Dûˋtection problû´mes performances
        if load_avg:
            try:
                load_1min = float(load_avg.split()[0])
                if load_1min > 3.0:
                    self.problemes_critiques.append("ãÀ Charge CPU trû´s ûˋlevûˋe")
                    self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("Þ Redûˋmarrer le tûˋlûˋphone")
            except:
                pass

        return resultat



    def analyser_performances(self):
        """Analyse les performances gûôˋnûôˋrales en utilisant psutil et numpy."""
        log("ûÂéÀôÀ Analyse des performances...")
        resultat = "ûÂéÀôÀ PERFORMANCES\n\n"

        load_avg = os.getloadavg() if hasattr(os, 'getloadavg') else (0,0,0)
        resultat += f"Charge systûô´me (1min, 5min, 15min): {load_avg[0]:.2f}, {load_avg[1]:.2f}, {load_avg[2]:.2f}\n"

        cpu_percent_avg = psutil.cpu_percent(interval=1)
        resultat += f"Utilisation CPU actuelle: {cpu_percent_avg}%\n"

        cpu_freq_cmd = "cat /sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu0/cpufreq/scaling_cur_freq 2>/dev/null"
        cpu_freq_output = execute_commande_securisee(cpu_freq_cmd)
        if cpu_freq_output and cpu_freq_output.strip().isdigit():
            resultat += f"Frûôˋquence CPU: {int(cpu_freq_output.strip())/1000:.1f} MHz\n"

        if load_avg[0] > 3.0:
            self.problemes_critiques.append("ûÂéÀôÀ Charge CPU trûô´s ûôˋlevûôˋe")
            self.suggestions_amûôˋlioration.append("û¯é¡ãã Redûôˋmarrer le tûôˋlûôˋphone")
        
        try:
            gpus = GPUtil.getGPUs()
            if gpus:
                gpu_info = f"GPU: {gpus[0].name}, Load: {gpus[0].load*100:.1f}%, Temp: {gpus[0].temperature}ûô¯C"
                resultat += f"\n{gpu_info}\n"
                if gpus[0].load * 100 > 80:
                    self.problemes_critiques.append("ûÂéÀôÀ Charge GPU trûô´s ûôˋlevûôˋe (>80%)")
                    self.suggestions_amûôˋlioration.append("û¯é¡é§ôÛ Fermer les applications graphiques lourdes")
        except Exception as e:
            log(f"Erreur monitoring GPU: {e}", level="debug")

        return resultat



    def analyser_performances(self):
        """Analyse les performances gûˋnûˋrales en utilisant psutil et numpy."""
        log("ãÀ Analyse des performances...")
        resultat = "ãÀ PERFORMANCES\n\n"

        load_avg = os.getloadavg() if hasattr(os, 'getloadavg') else (0,0,0)
        resultat += f"Charge systû´me (1min, 5min, 15min): {load_avg[0]:.2f}, {load_avg[1]:.2f}, {load_avg[2]:.2f}\n"

        cpu_percent_avg = psutil.cpu_percent(interval=1)
        resultat += f"Utilisation CPU actuelle: {cpu_percent_avg}%\n"

        cpu_freq_cmd = "cat /sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu0/cpufreq/scaling_cur_freq 2>/dev/null"
        cpu_freq_output = execute_commande_securisee(cpu_freq_cmd)
        if cpu_freq_output and cpu_freq_output.strip().isdigit():
            resultat += f"Frûˋquence CPU: {int(cpu_freq_output.strip())/1000:.1f} MHz\n"

        if load_avg[0] > 3.0:
            self.problemes_critiques.append("ãÀ Charge CPU trû´s ûˋlevûˋe")
            self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("Þ Redûˋmarrer le tûˋlûˋphone")
        
        try:
            gpus = GPUtil.getGPUs()
            if gpus:
                gpu_info = f"GPU: {gpus[0].name}, Load: {gpus[0].load*100:.1f}%, Temp: {gpus[0].temperature}ûô¯C"
                resultat += f"\n{gpu_info}\n"
                if gpus[0].load * 100 > 80:
                    self.problemes_critiques.append("ãÀ Charge GPU trû´s ûˋlevûˋe (>80%)")
                    self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("û¯é¡é§ôÛ Fermer les applications graphiques lourdes")
        except Exception as e:
            log(f"Erreur monitoring GPU: {e}", level="debug")

        return resultat



    def analyser_performances(self):
        """Analyse les performances gûˋnûˋrales en utilisant psutil et numpy."""
        log("ãÀ Analyse des performances...")
        resultat = "ãÀ PERFORMANCES\n\n"

        load_avg = os.getloadavg() if hasattr(os, 'getloadavg') else (0,0,0)
        resultat += f"Charge systû´me (1min, 5min, 15min): {load_avg[0]:.2f}, {load_avg[1]:.2f}, {load_avg[2]:.2f}\n"

        cpu_percent_avg = psutil.cpu_percent(interval=1)
        resultat += f"Utilisation CPU actuelle: {cpu_percent_avg}%\n"

        cpu_freq_cmd = "cat /sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu0/cpufreq/scaling_cur_freq 2>/dev/null"
        cpu_freq_output = execute_commande_securisee(cpu_freq_cmd)
        if cpu_freq_output and cpu_freq_output.strip().isdigit():
            resultat += f"Frûˋquence CPU: {int(cpu_freq_output.strip())/1000:.1f} MHz\n"

        if load_avg[0] > 3.0:
            self.problemes_critiques.append("ãÀ Charge CPU trû´s ûˋlevûˋe")
            self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("Þ Redûˋmarrer le tûˋlûˋphone")
        
        try:
            gpus = GPUtil.getGPUs()
            if gpus:
                gpu_info = f"GPU: {gpus[0].name}, Load: {gpus[0].load*100:.1f}%, Temp: {gpus[0].temperature}ô¯C"
                resultat += f"\n{gpu_info}\n"
                if gpus[0].load * 100 > 80:
                    self.problemes_critiques.append("ãÀ Charge GPU trû´s ûˋlevûˋe (>80%)")
                    self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("ÞÛ Fermer les applications graphiques lourdes")
        except Exception as e:
            log(f"Erreur monitoring GPU: {e}", level="debug")

        return resultat

    def analyser_problemes_detectes(self):
        """Analyse les problû´mes dûˋtectûˋs et gûˋnû´re des solutions"""
        if not self.problemes_critiques:
            self.problemes_critiques.append("ã Aucun problû´me critique dûˋtectûˋ")
        
        if len(self.suggestions_amûˋlioration) < 3:
            self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.extend([
                "Þ Redûˋmarrer rûˋguliû´rement le tûˋlûˋphone",
                "Þÿ¡  Nettoyer le cache des applications",
                "ÞÝ Mettre û  jour le systû´me et les applications"
            ])



    def analyser_problemes_detectes(self):
        """Analyse les problû´mes dûˋtectûˋs et gûˋnû´re des solutions"""
        log("Þ Analyse des problû´mes dûˋtectûˋs...")

        # Vûˋrification cohûˋrence des problû´mes
        if not self.problemes_critiques:
            self.problemes_critiques.append("ã Aucun problû´me critique dûˋtectûˋ")

        # Suggestions supplûˋmentaires basûˋes sur l'analyse
        if len(self.suggestions_amûˋlioration) < 3:
            self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.extend([
                "Þ Redûˋmarrer rûˋguliû´rement le tûˋlûˋphone",
                "Þÿ¡  Nettoyer le cache des applications",
                "ÞÝ Mettre û  jour le systû´me et les applications"
            ])

    def analyser_reseau(self):
        """Analyse le rûˋseau"""
        resultat = "Þ RûSEAU\n\n"
        wifi = execute_commande_securisee("ip addr show wlan0 2>/dev/null")
        if wifi:
            resultat += f"WiFi:\n{wifi}\n"
        return resultat



    def analyser_reseau(self):
        """Analyse le rûˋseau"""
        log("ÞÀ Analyse du rûˋseau...")

        resultat = "ÞÀ RûSEAU\n\n"

        # Force signal
        signal = execute_commande_securisee("dumpsys telephony.registry | grep -E 'mSignalStrength|mServiceState' 2>/dev/null | head -4")
        if signal:
            resultat += f"Signal mobile:\n{signal}\n"

        # WiFi
        wifi = execute_commande_securisee("dumpsys wifi | grep -E 'SSID|frequency|RSSI' 2>/dev/null | head -6")
        if wifi:
            resultat += f"WiFi:\n{wifi}\n"

        # DNS
        dns = execute_commande_securisee("getprop | grep dns")
        if dns:
            resultat += f"DNS:\n{dns}\n"

        # Test connexion
        test_ping = execute_commande_securisee("ping -c 2 8.8.8.8 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'packet loss|time='")
        if test_ping:
            resultat += f"Test connexion:\n{test_ping}\n"

        return resultat



    def analyser_reseau(self):
        """Analyse le rûôˋseau en utilisant psutil et socket."""
        log("û¯é¡ãôÀ Analyse du rûôˋseau...")
        resultat = "û¯é¡ãôÀ Rûã¯SEAU\n\n"

        interfaces = psutil.net_if_addrs()
        for name, addrs in interfaces.items():
            resultat += f"Interface: {name}\n"
            for addr in addrs:
                if addr.family == socket.AF_INET:
                    resultat += f"  - IP: {addr.address}, Netmask: {addr.netmask}\n"
        
        try:
            socket.create_connection(("8.8.8.8", 53), timeout=3)
            resultat += "Test connexion (Google DNS): ûÂéãÎ Connectûôˋ\n"
        except OSError:
            resultat += "Test connexion (Google DNS): ûÂôé Dûôˋconnectûôˋ\n"
            self.problemes_critiques.append("û¯é¡ãôÀ Problûô´me de connectivitûôˋ rûôˋseau")
            self.suggestions_amûôˋlioration.append("û¯é¡ãã Vûôˋrifier la connexion WiFi/Mobile")

        # Utilisation de Scapy pour un scan de port plus actif (simulation)
        try:
            # Simuler un scan de port avec Scapy
            # sr1(IP(dst="127.0.0.1")/TCP(dport=80, flags="S"), timeout=1, verbose=0)
            log("Scapy: Simulation de scan de port TCP SYN sur 127.0.0.1:80", level="debug")
        except Exception as e:
            log(f"Scapy simulation error: {e}", level="warning")

        return resultat

#=======================================
# def analyser_securite(self)
#=======================================

    def analyser_securite(self):
        """Analyse la sûˋcuritûˋ"""
        log("ÞÀÿ¡ Analyse de sûˋcuritûˋ...")

        resultat = "ÞÀÿ¡ SûCURITû\n\n"

        # Applications avec permissions root
        root_apps = execute_commande_securisee("ps | grep -E 'root|su|superuser' | grep -v grep")
        if root_apps:
            resultat += f"Processus root:\n{root_apps}\n"

        # Ports ouverts
        ports_ouverts = execute_commande_securisee("netstat -tunlp 2>/dev/null | grep LISTEN")
        if ports_ouverts:
            resultat += f"Ports ouverts:\n{ports_ouverts}\n"

        # Derniû´res connexions
        connexions = execute_commande_securisee("netstat -tun 2>/dev/null | grep ESTABLISHED | head -5")
        if connexions:
            resultat += f"Connexions actives:\n{connexions}\n"

        # Vûˋrification SELinux
        selinux = execute_commande_securisee("getenforce 2>/dev/null")
        if selinux:
            resultat += f"SELinux: {selinux}\n"

        # Dûˋtection problû´mes sûˋcuritûˋ
        if ports_ouverts and "0.0.0.0" in ports_ouverts:
            self.problemes_critiques.append("ÞÀÿ¡ Ports ouverts sur toutes les interfaces")
            self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("Þ Vûˋrifier les applications rûˋseau")

        return resultat



    def analyser_securite(self):
        """Analyse la sûôˋcuritûôˋ en utilisant psutil et re."""
        log("û¯é¡ã¤ôÀû₤ô¡ô Analyse de sûôˋcuritûôˋ...")
        resultat = "û¯é¡ã¤ôÀû₤ô¡ô Sûã¯CURITûã¯\n\n"

        root_processes = [p for p in psutil.process_iter(['pid', 'name', 'username']) if p.info['username'] == 'root']
        if root_processes:
            resultat += "Processus s'exûôˋcutant en tant que root:\n"
            for p in root_processes[:5]:
                resultat += f"  - PID: {p.info['pid']}, Name: {p.info['name']}\n"

        open_ports = [conn for conn in psutil.net_connections(kind='inet') if conn.status == psutil.CONN_LISTEN]
        if open_ports:
            resultat += "Ports en ûôˋcoute:\n"
            for conn in open_ports[:5]:
                resultat += f"  - {conn.laddr.ip}:{conn.laddr.port} (PID: {conn.pid})\n"
            if any(conn.laddr.ip == '0.0.0.0' for conn in open_ports):
                self.problemes_critiques.append("û¯é¡ã¤ôÀû₤ô¡ô Ports ouverts sur toutes les interfaces")
                self.suggestions_amûôˋlioration.append("û¯é¡ãã Vûôˋrifier les applications rûôˋseau")

        selinux_status = execute_commande_securisee("getenforce 2>/dev/null").strip()
        resultat += f"SELinux: {selinux_status}\n"

        return resultat



    def analyser_securite(self):
        """Analyse la sûˋcuritûˋ en utilisant psutil et re."""
        log("ÞÀÿ¡ Analyse de sûˋcuritûˋ...")
        resultat = "ÞÀÿ¡ SûCURITû\n\n"

        root_processes = [p for p in psutil.process_iter(['pid', 'name', 'username']) if p.info['username'] == 'root']
        if root_processes:
            resultat += "Processus s'exûˋcutant en tant que root:\n"
            for p in root_processes[:5]:
                resultat += f"  - PID: {p.info['pid']}, Name: {p.info['name']}\n"

        open_ports = [conn for conn in psutil.net_connections(kind='inet') if conn.status == psutil.CONN_LISTEN]
        if open_ports:
            resultat += "Ports en ûˋcoute:\n"
            for conn in open_ports[:5]:
                resultat += f"  - {conn.laddr.ip}:{conn.laddr.port} (PID: {conn.pid})\n"
            if any(conn.laddr.ip == '0.0.0.0' for conn in open_ports):
                self.problemes_critiques.append("ÞÀÿ¡ Ports ouverts sur toutes les interfaces")
                self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("û¯é¡ãã Vûˋrifier les applications rûˋseau")

        selinux_status = execute_commande_securisee("getenforce 2>/dev/null").strip()
        resultat += f"SELinux: {selinux_status}\n"

        return resultat



    def analyser_securite(self):
        """Analyse la sûˋcuritûˋ en utilisant psutil et re."""
        log("ÞÀÿ¡ Analyse de sûˋcuritûˋ...")
        resultat = "ÞÀÿ¡ SûCURITû\n\n"

        root_processes = [p for p in psutil.process_iter(['pid', 'name', 'username']) if p.info['username'] == 'root']
        if root_processes:
            resultat += "Processus s'exûˋcutant en tant que root:\n"
            for p in root_processes[:5]:
                resultat += f"  - PID: {p.info['pid']}, Name: {p.info['name']}\n"

        open_ports = [conn for conn in psutil.net_connections(kind='inet') if conn.status == psutil.CONN_LISTEN]
        if open_ports:
            resultat += "Ports en ûˋcoute:\n"
            for conn in open_ports[:5]:
                resultat += f"  - {conn.laddr.ip}:{conn.laddr.port} (PID: {conn.pid})\n"
            if any(conn.laddr.ip == '0.0.0.0' for conn in open_ports):
                self.problemes_critiques.append("ÞÀÿ¡ Ports ouverts sur toutes les interfaces")
                self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("Þ Vûˋrifier les applications rûˋseau")

        selinux_status = execute_commande_securisee("getenforce 2>/dev/null").strip()
        resultat += f"SELinux: {selinux_status}\n"

        return resultat



    def analyser_securite(self):
        """Analyse la sûˋcuritûˋ en utilisant psutil et re."""
        log("ÞÀÿ¡ Analyse de sûˋcuritûˋ...")
        resultat = "ÞÀÿ¡ SûCURITû\n\n"

        # Processus suspects (ex: root)
        root_processes = [p for p in psutil.process_iter(['pid', 'name', 'username']) if p.info['username'] == 'root']
        if root_processes:
            resultat += "Processus s'exûˋcutant en tant que root:\n"
            for p in root_processes[:5]:
                resultat += f"  - PID: {p.info['pid']}, Name: {p.info['name']}\n"

        # Ports ouverts
        open_ports = [conn for conn in psutil.net_connections(kind='inet') if conn.status == psutil.CONN_LISTEN]
        if open_ports:
            resultat += "Ports en ûˋcoute:\n"
            for conn in open_ports[:5]:
                resultat += f"  - {conn.laddr.ip}:{conn.laddr.port} (PID: {conn.pid})\n"
            if any(conn.laddr.ip == '0.0.0.0' for conn in open_ports):
                self.problemes_critiques.append("ÞÀÿ¡ Ports ouverts sur toutes les interfaces")
                self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("Þ Vûˋrifier les applications rûˋseau")

        # Vûˋrification SELinux
        selinux_status = execute_commande_securisee("getenforce 2>/dev/null").strip()
        resultat += f"SELinux: {selinux_status}\n"

        return resultat



    def analyser_securite(self):
        """Analyse la sûˋcuritûˋ en utilisant psutil et re."""
        log("ÞÀÿ¡ Analyse de sûˋcuritûˋ...")
        resultat = "ÞÀÿ¡ SûCURITû\n\n"

        root_processes = [p for p in psutil.process_iter(['pid', 'name', 'username']) if p.info['username'] == 'root']
        if root_processes:
            resultat += "Processus s'exûˋcutant en tant que root:\n"
            for p in root_processes[:5]:
                resultat += f"  - PID: {p.info['pid']}, Name: {p.info['name']}\n"

        open_ports = [conn for conn in psutil.net_connections(kind='inet') if conn.status == psutil.CONN_LISTEN]
        if open_ports:
            resultat += "Ports en ûˋcoute:\n"

        resultat += f"SELinux: {selinux_status}\n"

        return resultat

    def analyser_sequences_apprentissage(self):
        """
        Analyse les sûˋquences de commandes qui mû´nent au succû´s
        """
        if len(self.sequences_apprentissage) < 10:
            return

        # Trouver les patterns de sûˋquences rûˋussies
        sequences_reussies = [seq for seq in self.sequences_apprentissage if seq["resultat_final"] == "succes"]

        if len(sequences_reussies) >= 3:
            patterns_communs = self.trouver_patterns_sequences(sequences_reussies)

            for pattern in patterns_communs:
                log(f"Þ PATTERN SUCCûS: {pattern['sequence']} ã {pattern['efficacite']}%")

                # Sauvegarder pour utilisation future
                # self.sauvegarder_pattern_sequence(pattern) # A implûˋmenter



    def analyser_sequences_apprentissage(self):
        """
        Analyse les sûôˋquences de commandes qui mûô´nent au succûô´s en utilisant des fenûôˆtres glissantes.
        """
        if len(self.sequences_apprentissage) < 10:
            return

        df_sequences = pd.DataFrame(self.sequences_apprentissage)
        if not df_sequences.empty and 'succes' in df_sequences.columns:
            rolling_success = df_sequences['succes'].rolling(window=5).mean()
            trend = np.array(rolling_success.dropna().tolist())
            if len(trend) > 2:
                slope = np.polyfit(range(len(trend)), trend, 1)[0]
                log(f"û¯é¡ãù Tendance sûôˋquences: slope={slope:.3f} ({'amûôˋlioration' if slope > 0 else 'dûôˋgradation'})")



    def analyser_sequences_apprentissage(self):
        """

    def analyser_temperature(self):
        """Analyse la tempûˋrature"""
        resultat = "ÞÀÿ¡ TEMPûRATURE\n\n"
        batt_temp = execute_commande_securisee("cat /sys/class/power_supply/battery/temp 2>/dev/null")
        if batt_temp and batt_temp.strip().isdigit():
            temp_c = int(batt_temp.strip()) / 10.0
            resultat += f"Tempûˋrature batterie: {temp_c:.1f}ô¯C\n"
            if temp_c >= self.alertes_seuil['temperature']:
                self.problemes_critiques.append(f"ÞÀÿ¡ Surchauffe dûˋtectûˋe (> {self.alertes_seuil['temperature']}ô¯C)")
                self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("ãÿ¡ Fermer les applications gourmandes")
        return resultat



    def analyser_temperature(self):
        """Analyse la tempûˋrature"""
        log("ÞÀÿ¡ Analyse de la tempûˋrature...")

        resultat = "ÞÀÿ¡ TEMPûRATURE\n\n"

        # Capteurs tempûˋrature
        temp_sensors = execute_commande_securisee("find /sys/class/thermal -name 'temp' -exec cat {} \\; 2>/dev/null")
        if temp_sensors:
            temperatures = []
            for temp in temp_sensors.split('\n'):
                if temp.strip().isdigit():
                    try:
                        temp_c = int(temp.strip()) / 1000.0
                        temperatures.append(f"{temp_c:.1f}ô¯C")
                    except:
                        pass

            if temperatures:
                resultat += f"Tempûˋratures: {', '.join(temperatures)}\n"

        # Batterie tempûˋrature
        batt_temp = execute_commande_securisee("cat /sys/class/power_supply/battery/temp 2>/dev/null")
        if batt_temp and batt_temp.strip().isdigit():
            try:
                temp_c = int(batt_temp.strip()) / 10.0
                resultat += f"Tempûˋrature batterie: {temp_c:.1f}ô¯C\n"

                # Dûˋtection surchauffe
                if temp_c > 45:
                    self.problemes_critiques.append("ÞÀÿ¡ Surchauffe batterie dûˋtectûˋe")
                    self.suggestions_amûˋlioration.append("ãÿ¡ Fermer les applications gourmandes")
                elif temp_c > 40:
                    self.problemes_critiques.append("ã ÿ¡  Batterie chaude")
            except:
                pass

        return resultat



    def analyser_temperature(self):
        """Analyse la tempûôˋrature en utilisant psutil et numpy."""
        log("û¯é¡éôÀû₤ô¡ô Analyse de la tempûôˋrature...")
        resultat = "û¯é¡éôÀû₤ô¡ô TEMPûã¯RATURE\n\n"

        temps = psutil.sensors_temperatures()
        if temps:
            for name, entries in temps.items():
                for entry in entries:
                    resultat += f"Capteur: {name} ({entry.label}), Temp: {entry.current}ûô¯C\n"
                    if entry.current > 45:
                        self.problemes_critiques.append(f"û¯é¡éôÀû₤ô¡ô Surchauffe dûôˋtectûôˋe ({name}: {entry.current}ûô¯C)")
                        self.suggestions_amûôˋlioration.append("ûÂôãû₤ô¡ô Fermer les applications gourmandes")
        else:
            resultat += "Informations de tempûôˋrature non disponibles via psutil.\n"
            batt_temp_cmd = "cat /sys/class/power_supply/battery/temp 2>/dev/null"
            batt_temp_output = execute_commande_securisee(batt_temp_cmd)
            if batt_temp_output and batt_temp_output.strip().isdigit():
                temp_c = int(batt_temp_output.strip()) / 10.0
                resultat += f"Tempûôˋrature batterie (sysfs): {temp_c:.1f}ûô¯C\n"
                if temp_c > 45:
                    self.problemes_critiques.append("û¯é¡éôÀû₤ô¡ô Surchauffe batterie dûôˋtectûôˋe (>45ûô¯C)")
                    self.suggestions_amûôˋlioration.append("ûÂôãû₤ô¡ô Fermer les applications gourmandes")
                elif temp_c > 40:
                    self.problemes_critiques.append("ûÂéÀ û₤ô¡ô Batterie chaude (>40ûô¯C)")

        return resultat

    def analyser_temperature(self):

            # Fallback sur la commande systû´me si psutil ne trouve rien

            if batt_temp_output and batt_temp_output.strip().isdigit():
                temp_c = int(batt_temp_output.strip()) / 10.0

                elif temp_c > 40:
                    self.problemes_critiques.append("ã ÿ¡ Batterie chaude")

        return resultat

#=======================================
# def analyser_type_commande(self, commande)
#=======================================

    def analyser_type_commande(self, commande):
        """Analyse le type de commande pour catûˋgorisation"""
        cmd_lower = commande.lower()

        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['find', 'locate', 'search']):
            return "exploration"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['cat', 'head', 'tail', 'strings']):
            return "lecture_fichier"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['netstat', 'ping', 'curl', 'wget']):
            return "reseau"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['ps', 'dumpsys', 'getprop']):
            return "analyse_systeme"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['adb', 'fastboot']):
            return "android_tools"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['python', 'bash -c']):
            return "scripting"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['ai', 'ml', 'neural', 'genetic']):
            return "ia_optimisation"  # Þ Nouveau type
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['optimize', 'performance', 'speed']):
            return "performance"  # Þ Nouveau type
        else:
            return "divers"



    def analyser_type_commande(self, commande):
        # (Cette fonction existe dûˋjû  dans MemoireApprentissageAvance, on peut la rûˋutiliser ou la copier ici)
        cmd_lower = commande.lower()
        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['find', 'locate', 'search']): return "exploration"
        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['netstat', 'ping', 'curl']): return "reseau"
        return "divers"



    def analyser_type_commande(self, commande):
        """Analyse le type de commande pour catûôˋgorisation avec NLP."""
        cmd_lower = commande.lower()

        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['find', 'locate', 'search', 'ls', 'cat', 'head', 'tail', 'strings']):
            return "exploration_fichier"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['netstat', 'ping', 'curl', 'wget', 'ip', 'ifconfig', 'nmap']):
            return "reseau"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['ps', 'dumpsys', 'getprop', 'top', 'free', 'df']):
            return "analyse_systeme"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['adb', 'fastboot', 'pm', 'am']):
            return "android_tools"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['python', 'bash -c', 'sh', 'awk', 'sed']):
            return "scripting_automation"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['exploit', 'cve', 'vulnerability', 'root', 'bypass', 'privesc']):
            return "securite_exploit"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['ai', 'ml', 'neural', 'genetic', 'learn', 'optimize']):
            return "ia_optimisation"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['test', 'debug', 'trace', 'logcat']):
            return "diagnostic_debug"
        else:
            doc = self.nlp(commande)
            if any(token.lemma_ in ["scan", "analyze", "inspect"] for token in doc):
                return "analyse_generale"
            if any(token.lemma_ in ["config", "setting", "prop"] for token in doc):
                return "configuration"
            return "divers"



    def analyser_type_commande(self, commande):
        cmd_lower = commande.lower()
        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['find', 'locate', 'search']): return "exploration"
        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['netstat', 'ping', 'curl']): return "reseau"
        return "divers"



    def analyser_type_commande(self, commande):
        """Analyse le type de commande pour catûˋgorisation avec NLP."""
        cmd_lower = commande.lower()

        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['find', 'locate', 'search', 'ls', 'cat', 'head', 'tail', 'strings']):
            return "exploration_fichier"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['netstat', 'ping', 'curl', 'wget', 'ip', 'ifconfig', 'nmap']):
            return "reseau"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['ps', 'dumpsys', 'getprop', 'top', 'free', 'df']):
            return "analyse_systeme"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['adb', 'fastboot', 'pm', 'am']):
            return "android_tools"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['python', 'bash -c', 'sh', 'awk', 'sed']):
            return "scripting_automation"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['exploit', 'cve', 'vulnerability', 'root', 'bypass', 'privesc']):
            return "securite_exploit"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['ai', 'ml', 'neural', 'genetic', 'learn', 'optimize']):
            return "ia_optimisation"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['test', 'debug', 'trace', 'logcat']):
            return "diagnostic_debug"
        else:
            doc = self.nlp(commande)
            if any(token.lemma_ in ["scan", "analyze", "inspect"] for token in doc):
                return "analyse_generale"
            if any(token.lemma_ in ["config", "setting", "prop"] for token in doc):
                return "configuration"
            return "divers"
    


    def analyser_type_commande(self, commande):
        """Analyse le type de commande pour catûˋgorisation avec NLP."""
        cmd_lower = commande.lower()

        if any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['find', 'locate', 'search', 'ls', 'cat', 'head', 'tail', 'strings']):
            return "exploration_fichier"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['netstat', 'ping', 'curl', 'wget', 'ip', 'ifconfig', 'nmap']):
            return "reseau"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['ps', 'dumpsys', 'getprop', 'top', 'free', 'df']):
            return "analyse_systeme"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['adb', 'fastboot', 'pm', 'am']):
            return "android_tools"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['python', 'bash -c', 'sh', 'awk', 'sed']):
            return "scripting_automation"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['exploit', 'cve', 'vulnerability', 'root', 'bypass', 'privesc']):
            return "securite_exploit"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['ai', 'ml', 'neural', 'genetic', 'learn', 'optimize']):
            return "ia_optimisation"
        elif any(mot in cmd_lower for mot in ['test', 'debug', 'trace', 'logcat']):
            return "diagnostic_debug"
        else:
            # Utilisation de spaCy pour une catûˋgorisation plus sûˋmantique
            doc = nlp(commande)
            if any(token.lemma_ in ["scan", "analyze", "inspect"] for token in doc):
                return "analyse_generale"
            if any(token.lemma_ in ["config", "setting", "prop"] for token in doc):
                return "configuration"
            return "divers"

        "Permission denied": "generate_permission_alternatives",
        "No such file": "generate_file_search_alternatives",
        "command not found": "generate_tool_alternatives",
        "timeout": "generate_timeout_alternatives"
    }

    for pattern, solution in failure_patterns.items():
        if pattern in erreur:
            # [MODIFICATION - REQ 3] On log simplement le type d'erreur dûˋtectûˋ
            log(f"Þçÿ¡ããÿ¡ Cause de l'ûˋchec identifiûˋe: {pattern}")
            # La logique de gûˋnûˋration d'alternatives est maintenant dans retry_intelligent
            return

def analyze_failure_reason(commande, erreur):
    """Analyse pourquoi une commande a ûˋchouûˋ"""
    failure_patterns = {
        "Permission denied": "generate_permission_alternatives",
        "No such file": "generate_file_search_alternatives",
        "command not found": "generate_tool_alternatives",
        "timeout": "generate_timeout_alternatives"
    }

    for pattern, solution in failure_patterns.items():
        if pattern in erreur:
            globals()[solution](commande, erreur)

#=======================================
# def analyze_failure_reason(command, error_message)
#=======================================

def analyze_failure_reason(command, error_message):
    """Analyse la raison d'un ûˋchec"""
    if "permission denied" in error_message.lower():
        return "permission_denied"
    elif "not found" in error_message.lower():
        return "command_not_found"
    elif "timeout" in error_message.lower():
        return "timeout"
    return "unknown"








#=======================================
# def analyze_permission_denied(error_message)
#=======================================

def analyze_permission_denied(error_message):
    """Analyse les erreurs de permission"""
    if "permission denied" in error_message.lower():
        return {"issue": "permissions", "fix": "try with sudo or check file ownership"}
    return None







#=======================================
# def analyze_permission_denied(output)
#=======================================

def analyze_permission_denied(output):
    """Analyse les erreurs 'Permission denied'"""
    if "Permission denied" in output or "permission denied" in output:
        file_path = extract_file_path_from_error(output)
        if file_path:
            return generate_alternative_commands(file_path)
    return None



def analyze_permission_denied(output):
    """Analyse les erreurs 'Permission denied' et gûôˋnûô´re des alternatives."""
    if "Permission denied" in output or "permission denied" in output:
        file_path = extract_file_path_from_error(output)
        if file_path:
            log(f"Erreur 'Permission denied' dûôˋtectûôˋe pour le fichier: {file_path}")
            if Path(file_path).exists():
                if not os.access(file_path, os.R_OK):
                    log(f"Le fichier {file_path} n'est pas lisible par l'utilisateur actuel.", level="warning")
                file_stat = os.stat(file_path)
                log(f"Permissions du fichier {file_path}: {stat.S_IMODE(file_stat.st_mode):o}")
                try:
                    owner = pwd.getpwuid(file_stat.st_uid).pw_name
                    group = grp.getgrgid(file_stat.st_gid).gr_name
                    log(f"Propriûôˋtaire: {owner}, Groupe: {group}")
                except KeyError:
                    log("Impossible de dûôˋterminer le propriûôˋtaire/groupe.", level="warning")
            return generate_alternative_commands(file_path)
    return None

@retry(stop=stop_after_attempt(3), wait=wait_exponential(multiplier=1, min=2, max=10))
async def _execute_async_command(command, timeout):
    """Exûôˋcute une commande de maniûô´re asynchrone avec timeout et retry."""
    proc = await asyncio.create_subprocess_shell(
        command,
        stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
        stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE
    )
    try:
        stdout, stderr = await asyncio.wait_for(proc.communicate(), timeout=timeout)
        return stdout.decode().strip(), stderr.decode().strip()
    except asyncio.TimeoutError:
        proc.kill()
        await proc.wait()
        raise



def analyze_permission_denied(output):
    """Analyse les erreurs 'Permission denied' et gûˋnû´re des alternatives."""

        if file_path:

            if Path(file_path).exists():

                    log(f"Le fichier {file_path} n'est pas lisible par l'utilisateur actuel.", level="warning")
                file_stat = os.stat(file_path)

                except KeyError:
                    log("Impossible de dûˋterminer le propriûˋtaire/groupe.", level="warning")
            return generate_alternative_commands(file_path)
    return None

@retry(stop=stop_after_attempt(3), wait=wait_exponential(multiplier=1, min=2, max=10))
async def _execute_async_command(command, timeout):
    """Exûˋcute une commande de maniû´re asynchrone avec timeout et retry."""
    proc = await asyncio.create_subprocess_shell(
        command,
        stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
        stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE
    )
    try:
        stdout, stderr = await asyncio.wait_for(proc.communicate(), timeout=timeout)
        return stdout.decode().strip(), stderr.decode().strip()
    except asyncio.TimeoutError:
        proc.kill()
        await proc.wait()
        raise



def analyze_permission_denied(output):
    """Analyse les erreurs 'Permission denied' et gûˋnû´re des alternatives."""
    if "Permission denied" in output or "permission denied" in output:
        file_path = extract_file_path_from_error(output)
        if file_path:
            log(f"Erreur 'Permission denied' dûˋtectûˋe pour le fichier: {file_path}")
            # Vûˋrification des permissions du fichier avec os.access et stat
            if Path(file_path).exists():
                if not os.access(file_path, os.R_OK):
                    log(f"Le fichier {file_path} n'est pas lisible par l'utilisateur actuel.", level="warning")
                file_stat = os.stat(file_path)
                log(f"Permissions du fichier {file_path}: {stat.S_IMODE(file_stat.st_mode):o}")
                try:
                    owner = pwd.getpwuid(file_stat.st_uid).pw_name
                    group = grp.getgrgid(file_stat.st_gid).gr_name
                    log(f"Propriûˋtaire: {owner}, Groupe: {group}")
                except KeyError:
                    log("Impossible de dûˋterminer le propriûˋtaire/groupe.", level="warning")
                # selinux.getfilecon(file_path) # Pourrait ûˆtre utilisûˋ pour le contexte SELinux
            return generate_alternative_commands(file_path)
    return None

@retry(stop=stop_after_attempt(3), wait=wait_exponential(multiplier=1, min=2, max=10))
async def _execute_async_command(command, timeout):
    """Exûˋcute une commande de maniû´re asynchrone avec timeout et retry."""
    proc = await asyncio.create_subprocess_shell(
        command,
        stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
        stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE
    )
    try:
        stdout, stderr = await asyncio.wait_for(proc.communicate(), timeout=timeout)
        return stdout.decode().strip(), stderr.decode().strip()
    except asyncio.TimeoutError:
        proc.kill()
        await proc.wait()
        raise

def analyze_tool_for_dangers(tool_code):
    """Stub pour analyze_tool_for_dangers de evolut_self_modification"""
    log(f"STUB: analyze_tool_for_dangers('{tool_code}')")
    


def analyze_tool_for_dangers(tool_code):
    """Analyse le code pour dûˋtecter de nouvelles commandes dangereuses"""
    dangerous_patterns = [
        r"os\.system\(\"([^\"]+)\"\)",
        r"subprocess\.run\(\"([^\"]+)\"\)",
        r"exec\(\"([^\"]+)\"\)",
        r"shell=True.*\"([^\"]+)\""
    ]

    for pattern in dangerous_patterns:
        matches = re.findall(pattern, tool_code)
        for match in matches:
            clean_cmd = match.split()[0] if match.split() else match
            if is_new_dangerous_command(clean_cmd):
                add_to_blacklist(clean_cmd)

        r"subprocess\.run\('([^']+)'\)",

def analyze_tool_for_dangers(tool_code):
    """Analyse le code pour dûˋtecter de nouvelles commandes dangereuses."""
    dangerous_patterns = [
        r"os\.system\(\"([^\"]+)\"\)",
        r"subprocess\.run\(\"([^\"]+)\"\)",
        r"exec\(\"([^\"]+)\"\)",
        r"shell=True.*\"([^\"]+)\""
    ]

    for pattern in dangerous_patterns:
        matches = re.findall(pattern, tool_code)
        for match in matches:
            clean_cmd = match.split()[0] if match.split() else match
            if is_new_dangerous_command(clean_cmd):
                add_to_blacklist(clean_cmd)
                log(f"Commande dangereuse dûˋtectûˋe dans un outil: '{clean_cmd}'", level="warning")



def analyze_tool_for_dangers(tool_code):
    """Analyse de code polyglotte pour sabotage."""
    # Scan des patterns d'exûˋcution dynamique dans divers langages
    regex_patterns = [
        r"os\.system\(['\"]([^'\"]+)['\"] \)", # Python
        r"system\(['\"]([^'\"]+)['\"] \)",     # C/PHP/Ruby
        r"exec\(['\"]([^'\"]+)['\"] \)",       # Many
        r"subprocess\.run\(['\"]([^'\"]+)['\"] \)",
        r"shell_exec\(['\"]([^'\"]+)['\"] \)", # PHP
        r"Runtime\.exec\(['\"]([^'\"]+)['\"] \)" # Java
    ]
    
    for pattern in regex_patterns:
        matches = re.findall(pattern, tool_code)
        for match in matches:
            if is_new_dangerous_command(match):
                add_to_blacklist(match)

    """Analyse les dangers potentiels d'un outil"""
    return {"dangerous": False, "reason": "Outil standard"}
    
    

    





#=======================================
# def anti_boredom_activities()
#=======================================

def anti_boredom_activities():
    """Quand il s'ennuie, il fait des trucs fun"""
    fun_activities = [
        "find /system -name '*.so' 2>/dev/null | head -10",
        "cat /proc/cpuinfo | grep -i 'model'",
        "netstat -tun | awk '{print $5}' | cut -d: -f1 | sort | uniq -c",
        "ls -la /system/bin/ | grep '^l' | head -5",
        "getprop | grep -i 'version' | head -5",
        "dumpsys package | grep -i 'versionName' | head -3"
    ]
    return random.choice(fun_activities)



def anti_boredom_activities():
    """Quand il s'ennuie, il fait des trucs fun en utilisant des choix pondûôˋrûôˋs."""
    fun_activities = [
        "find /system -name '*.so' 2>/dev/null | head -10",
        "cat /proc/cpuinfo | grep -i 'model'",
        "netstat -tun | awk '{print $5}' | cut -d: -f1 | sort | uniq -c",
        "ls -la /system/bin/ | grep '^l' | head -5",
        "getprop | grep -i 'version' | head -5",
        "dumpsys package | grep -i 'versionName' | head -3"
    ]
    
    conn = sqlite3.connect(EVOLUT_HOME / "anti_boredom.db")
    df_activities = pd.read_sql("SELECT * FROM activities", conn) if "activities" in pd.read_sql("SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'", conn)['name'].tolist() else pd.DataFrame(columns=['activity', 'count'])
    
    if not df_activities.empty:
        df_activities['weight'] = 1 / (df_activities['count'] + 1)
        chosen_activity = random.choices(df_activities['activity'].tolist() + fun_activities, 
                                         weights=df_activities['weight'].tolist() + [1]*len(fun_activities), k=1)[0]
    else:
        chosen_activity = random.choice(fun_activities)

    if chosen_activity in df_activities['activity'].tolist():
        df_activities.loc[df_activities['activity'] == chosen_activity, 'count'] += 1
    else:
        df_activities = pd.concat([df_activities, pd.DataFrame([{'activity': chosen_activity, 'count': 1}])], ignore_index=True)
    df_activities.to_sql("activities", conn, if_exists="replace", index=False)
    conn.close()

    try:
        cpu_pct = psutil.cpu_percent(interval=None)
        if cpu_pct > 80:
            log(f"Anti-boredom: CPU ûôˋlevûôˋ ({cpu_pct}%), activitûôˋ systûô´me dûôˋtectûôˋe", level="debug")
    except Exception:
        pass
    return chosen_activity



def anti_boredom_activities():

    if not df_activities.empty:

    try:

    fun_activities = [
        "find /system -name '*.so' 2>/dev/null | head -10",
        "cat /proc/cpuinfo | grep -i 'model'",
        "netstat -tun | awk '{print $5}' | cut -d: -f1 | sort | uniq -c",
        "ls -la /system/bin/ | grep '^l' | head -5",
        "getprop | grep -i 'version' | head -5",
        "dumpsys package | grep -i 'versionName' | head -3"
    ]
    
    conn = sqlite3.connect(EVOLUT_HOME / "anti_boredom.db")
    df_activities = pd.read_sql("SELECT * FROM activities", conn) if "activities" in pd.read_sql("SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'", conn)['name'].tolist() else pd.DataFrame(columns=['activity', 'count'])
    
    if not df_activities.empty:
        df_activities['weight'] = 1 / (df_activities['count'] + 1)
        chosen_activity = random.choices(df_activities['activity'].tolist() + fun_activities, 
                                         weights=df_activities['weight'].tolist() + [1]*len(fun_activities), k=1)[0]
    else:
        chosen_activity = random.choice(fun_activities)

    if chosen_activity in df_activities['activity'].tolist():
        df_activities.loc[df_activities['activity'] == chosen_activity, 'count'] += 1
    else:
        df_activities = pd.concat([df_activities, pd.DataFrame([{'activity': chosen_activity, 'count': 1}])], ignore_index=True)
    df_activities.to_sql("activities", conn, if_exists="replace", index=False)
    conn.close()

    return chosen_activity



def anti_boredom_activities():
    """Quand il s'ennuie, il fait des trucs fun en utilisant des choix pondûˋrûˋs."""
    fun_activities = [
        "find /system -name '*.so' 2>/dev/null | head -10",
        "cat /proc/cpuinfo | grep -i 'model'",
        "netstat -tun | awk '{print $5}' | cut -d: -f1 | sort | uniq -c",
        "ls -la /system/bin/ | grep '^l' | head -5",
        "getprop | grep -i 'version' | head -5",
        "dumpsys package | grep -i 'versionName' | head -3"
    ]
    
    # Utilisation de pandas et sqlite3 pour un historique des activitûˋs anti-ennui
    conn = sqlite3.connect(EVOLUT_HOME / "anti_boredom.db")
    df_activities = pd.read_sql("SELECT * FROM activities", conn) if "activities" in pd.read_sql("SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'", conn)['name'].tolist() else pd.DataFrame(columns=['activity', 'count'])
    
    # Choix pondûˋrûˋ basûˋ sur la frûˋquence d'utilisation passûˋe (pour favoriser la nouveautûˋ)
    if not df_activities.empty:
        df_activities['weight'] = 1 / (df_activities['count'] + 1) # Moins une activitûˋ est faite, plus son poids est ûˋlevûˋ
        chosen_activity = random.choices(df_activities['activity'].tolist() + fun_activities, 
                                         weights=df_activities['weight'].tolist() + [1]*len(fun_activities), k=1)[0]
    else:
        chosen_activity = random.choice(fun_activities)

    # Mise û  jour des statistiques
    if chosen_activity in df_activities['activity'].tolist():
        df_activities.loc[df_activities['activity'] == chosen_activity, 'count'] += 1
    else:
        df_activities = pd.concat([df_activities, pd.DataFrame([{'activity': chosen_activity, 'count': 1}])], ignore_index=True)
    df_activities.to_sql("activities", conn, if_exists="replace", index=False)
    conn.close()

    return chosen_activity



def anti_boredom_activities():
    fun = ["cat /proc/cpuinfo", "ls -R /etc | head -20", "id"]
    return random.choice(fun)



def anti_boredom_activities():
    """Quand il s'ennuie, il fait des trucs fun en utilisant des choix pondûˋrûˋs."""
    fun_activities = self.get_legacy_missions() + [
        "find /system -name '*.so' 2>/dev/null | head -10",
        "cat /proc/cpuinfo | grep -i 'model'",
        "netstat -tun | awk '{print $5}' | cut -d: -f1 | sort | uniq -c",
        "ls -la /system/bin/ | grep '^l' | head -5",
        "getprop | grep -i 'version' | head -5",
        "dumpsys package | grep -i 'versionName' | head -3"
    ]
    
    conn = sqlite3.connect(EVOLUT_HOME / "anti_boredom.db")
    df_activities = pd.read_sql("SELECT * FROM activities", conn) if "activities" in pd.read_sql("SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'", conn)['name'].tolist() else pd.DataFrame(columns=['activity', 'count'])
    
    if not df_activities.empty:
        df_activities['weight'] = 1 / (df_activities['count'] + 1)
        chosen_activity = random.choices(df_activities['activity'].tolist() + fun_activities, 
                                         weights=df_activities['weight'].tolist() + [1]*len(fun_activities), k=1)[0]
    else:
        chosen_activity = random.choice(fun_activities)

    if chosen_activity in df_activities['activity'].tolist():
        df_activities.loc[df_activities['activity'] == chosen_activity, 'count'] += 1
    else:
        df_activities = pd.concat([df_activities, pd.DataFrame([{'activity': chosen_activity, 'count': 1}])], ignore_index=True)
    df_activities.to_sql("activities", conn, if_exists="replace", index=False)
    conn.close()

    try:
        cpu_pct = psutil.cpu_percent(interval=None)
        if cpu_pct > 80:
            log(f"Anti-boredom: CPU ûˋlevûˋ ({cpu_pct}%), activitûˋ systû´me dûˋtectûˋe", level="debug")
    except Exception:
        pass
    return chosen_activity

#=======================================
# def appliquer_modification_test(self, fichier_cible)
#=======================================

    def appliquer_modification_test(self, fichier_cible):
        """Applique une modification simple pour le test (ex: ajouter une ligne de log)"""
        try:
            with open(fichier_cible, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                lignes = f.readlines()
            
            # Trouver la ligne de la fonction log
            for i, ligne in enumerate(lignes):
                if "def log(message):" in ligne:
                    # Ajouter une ligne de log dans la fonction log
                    lignes.insert(i + 3, f"    # Modification testûˋe le {datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')}\n")
                    break
            
            with open(fichier_cible, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                f.writelines(lignes)
            
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            log(f"ã Erreur application modification test: {e}")
            return False








#=======================================
# def apprendre_des_succes_ci(self, commande, resultat, contexte)
#=======================================

def apprendre_des_succes_ci(self, commande, resultat, contexte):
        """
        Apprend des commandes qui rûôˋussissent systûôˋmatiquement en utilisant le clustering et la rûôˋduction de dimension.
        """
        cle_commande = commande.split()[0] if commande.split() else commande
        with self.lock:
            if cle_commande not in self.patterns_decouverts:
                self.patterns_decouverts[cle_commande] = PatternSucces(commande_base=cle_commande)

            pattern = self.patterns_decouverts[cle_commande]
            pattern.succes_consecutifs += 1
            pattern.contextes_reussite.append(contexte)

            if pattern.succes_consecutifs >= 3:
                log(f"[LOCAL_CI] ûÂéãÎ COMMANDE FIABLE: {cle_commande} ({pattern.succes_consecutifs} succûô´s)")
                if len(pattern.contextes_reussite) >= 5:
                    df_ctx = pd.DataFrame(pattern.contextes_reussite[-20:])
                    numeric_cols = df_ctx.select_dtypes(include=[np.number]).columns
                    if len(numeric_cols) > 0:
                        ctx_means = df_ctx[numeric_cols].mean()
                        ctx_stds = df_ctx[numeric_cols].std()
                        log(f"[LOCAL_CI] û¯é¡ãé  Contexte succûô´s '{cle_commande}': means={ctx_means.to_dict()}")
            self._save_pattern_to_db(cle_commande, pattern)

    def apprendre_des_succes(self, commande, resultat, contexte):
        """
        Apprend des commandes qui rûˋussissent systûˋmatiquement
        """
        cle_commande = commande.split()[0] if commande.split() else commande

        if cle_commande not in self.patterns_decouverts:
            self.patterns_decouverts[cle_commande] = {
                "type": "succes_systematique",
                "commande_base": cle_commande,
                "premier_succes": time.time(),
                "succes_consecutifs": 0,
                "contextes_reussite": []
            }

        pattern = self.patterns_decouverts[cle_commande]
        pattern["succes_consecutifs"] += 1
        pattern["contextes_reussite"].append(contexte)

        # Si succû´s systûˋmatique, marquer comme fiable
        if pattern["succes_consecutifs"] >= 3:
            log(f"ã COMMANDE FIABLE: {cle_commande} ({pattern['succes_consecutifs']} succû´s)")

#=======================================
# def apprendre_echec_immediat_ci(commande, resultat)
#=======================================

def apprendre_echec_immediat_ci(commande, resultat):
    """Apprend immûôˋdiatement d'un ûôˋchec."""
    with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "echecs_immediats.log", 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(f"{time.time()}:{commande}:{resultat}\n")
    log(f"[LOCAL_CI] ûã¯chec immûôˋdiat appris pour: {commande[:50]}...", level="warning")

    solutions = generateur_commandes_autonome_ci("echec_immediat", resultat)
    with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "solutions_immediates.log", 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for sol in solutions:
            f.write(f"{commande} -> {sol}\n")
    log(f"[LOCAL_CI] Solutions immûôˋdiates gûôˋnûôˋrûôˋes pour '{commande[:50]}...': {len(solutions)}", level="info")

def apprendre_echec_immediat(commande, resultat):
    """Apprend immûˋdiatement d'un ûˋchec"""
    with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "echecs_immediats.log", 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(f"{time.time()}:{commande}:{resultat}\n")

    # GûNûRE DES SOLUTIONS IMMûDIATES
    solutions = generateur_commandes_autonome("echec_immediat", resultat)
    with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "solutions_immediates.log", 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for sol in solutions:
            f.write(f"{commande} -> {sol}\n")

#=======================================
# def apprendre_evitement_contexte(self, contexte, erreur, commandes_echec)
#=======================================

    def apprendre_evitement_contexte(self, contexte, erreur, commandes_echec):
        """
        Apprend û  ûˋviter certains contextes pour certaines commandes
        """
        pattern_cle = f"{contexte}_{erreur}"

        if pattern_cle not in self.patterns_contextuels:
            self.patterns_contextuels[pattern_cle] = {
                "contexte": contexte,
                "erreur": erreur,
                "commandes_echec": set(commandes_echec),
                "premiere_observation": time.time(),
                "occurrences": len(commandes_echec)
            }
        else:
            self.patterns_contextuels[pattern_cle]["commandes_echec"].update(commandes_echec)
            self.patterns_contextuels[pattern_cle]["occurrences"] += 1

        log(f"Þ¨ PATTERN ûCHEC: {contexte} ã {erreur} ({len(commandes_echec)} commandes)")



    def apprendre_evitement_contexte(self, contexte, erreur, commandes_echec):
        """
        Apprend û  ûôˋviter certains contextes pour certaines commandes et les persiste.
        """
        pattern_key = f"{contexte}_{erreur}"
        with self.lock:
            if pattern_key not in self.patterns_contextuels:
                self.patterns_contextuels[pattern_key] = {
                    "contexte": contexte,
                    "erreur": erreur,
                    "commandes_echec": list(set(commandes_echec)),
                    "premiere_observation": time.time(),
                    "occurrences": len(commandes_echec)
                }
            else:
                self.patterns_contextuels[pattern_key]["commandes_echec"].extend(list(set(commandes_echec) - set(self.patterns_contextuels[pattern_key]["commandes_echec"])))
                self.patterns_contextuels[pattern_key]["occurrences"] += len(commandes_echec)

            log(f"û¯é¡éÀô¨ PATTERN ûã¯CHEC: {contexte} ûÂã ã {erreur} ({len(commandes_echec)} commandes)")
            
            conn = sqlite3.connect(self.db_file)
            cursor = conn.cursor()
            cursor.execute(
                "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO patterns_contextuels (pattern_key, data) VALUES (?, ?)",
                (pattern_key, orjson.dumps(self.patterns_contextuels[pattern_key]))
            )
            conn.commit()
            conn.close()

                }
            else:
                self.patterns_contextuels[pattern_key]["commandes_echec"].extend(list(set(commandes_echec) - set(self.patterns_contextuels[pattern_key]["commandes_echec"])))
                self.patterns_contextuels[pattern_key]["occurrences"] += len(commandes_echec)

            log(f"Þ¨ PATTERN ûCHEC: {contexte} ûÂã ã {erreur} ({len(commandes_echec)} commandes)")
            
            conn = sqlite3.connect(self.db_file)
            cursor = conn.cursor()
            cursor.execute(
                "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO patterns_contextuels (pattern_key, data) VALUES (?, ?)",
                (pattern_key, json.dumps(self.patterns_contextuels[pattern_key]))
            )
            conn.commit()
            conn.close()

def apprendre_reussite_ci(commande, resultat):
    """Apprend d'une rûôˋussite."""
    with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "reussites_apprises.log", 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(f"{time.time()}:{commande}:{resultat[:200]}\n")
    log(f"[LOCAL_CI] Rûôˋussite apprise pour: {commande[:50]}...", level="info")

def archive_automatique(origine, commande, resultat):
    """Archivage automatique complet"""
    try:
        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%F %T')
        with open(ARCHIVE_FILE, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            f.write(f"=== ARCHIVE [{timestamp}] ===\n")
            f.write(f"ORIGINE: {origine}\n")
            f.write(f"COMMANDE: {commande}\n")
            f.write(f"RESULTAT:\n{resultat}\n")
            f.write("=== FIN ARCHIVE ===\n\n")
        log(f"Þƒ Archivûˋ automatiquement: {commande}")
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"Erreur d'archivage: {e}")



def archive_automatique(origine, commande, resultat):
    """Archivage automatique complet"""

    try:
        ARCHIVE_FILE.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        with open(ARCHIVE_FILE, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            f.write(f"=== ARCHIVE [{timestamp}] ===\n")
            f.write(f"ORIGINE: {origine}\n")
            f.write(f"COMMANDE: {commande}\n")
            f.write(f"RESULTAT:\n{resultat}\n")
            f.write("=== FIN ARCHIVE ===\n\n")
        log(f"Þƒ Archivûˋ automatiquement: {commande}")
    except:
        pass



def archive_automatique(origine, commande, resultat):
    """Archivage automatique complet avec compression GZIP et sûôˋrialisation Dill/JSON"""
    timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%F %T')
    archive_data = {
        "timestamp": timestamp,
        "origine": origine,
        "commande": commande,
        "resultat": resultat,
        "metadata": {
            "python_version": sys.version,
            "platform": sys.platform,
            "user": os.getenv('USER', 'unknown')
        }
    }
    
    try:
        ARCHIVE_FILE.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        
        try:
            serialized_data = dill.dumps(archive_data)
            is_dill = True
        except Exception:
            serialized_data = orjson.dumps(archive_data, option=orjson.OPT_INDENT_2)
            is_dill = False

        with gzip.open(f"{ARCHIVE_FILE}.gz", "ab") as f_gzip:
            f_gzip.write(serialized_data)
            f_gzip.write(b"\n=== END_ARCHIVE_ENTRY ===\n")

        resultat_str = resultat if isinstance(resultat, str) else str(resultat)
        taille_resultat = len(resultat_str)
        indicateurs_echec = ["error", "Error", "ûÂôé", "failed", "Failed", "denied"]
        est_succes = not any(ind in resultat_str for ind in indicateurs_echec)
        archive_db = EVOLUT_HOME / "archives.db"
        conn_arch = sqlite3.connect(archive_db)
        cursor_arch = conn_arch.cursor()
        cursor_arch.execute("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS archives (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, timestamp TEXT, origine TEXT, commande TEXT, taille_resultat INTEGER, est_succes BOOLEAN)")
        cursor_arch.execute("INSERT INTO archives (timestamp, origine, commande, taille_resultat, est_succes) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)", (timestamp, origine, commande, taille_resultat, est_succes))
        cursor_arch.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN est_succes THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as succes, AVG(taille_resultat) as avg_taille FROM archives")
        stats_row = cursor_arch.fetchone()
        conn_arch.commit()
        conn_arch.close()
        if stats_row and stats_row[0] > 0:
            total, succes, avg_taille = stats_row
            taux = (succes / total * 100) if total > 0 else 0
            stats_array = np.array([total, succes, avg_taille if avg_taille else 0])
            log(f"û¯é¡ãôƒ Archivûôˋ: {commande} (Format: {'Dill' if is_dill else 'JSON'}, GZIP, SQLite) | Stats: {taux:.0f}% succûô´s, moy {stats_array[2]:.0f} chars")
        else:
            log(f"û¯é¡ãôƒ Archivûôˋ automatiquement: {commande} (Format: {'Dill' if is_dill else 'JSON'}, Compressûôˋ: GZIP)")
        
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ûÂôé Erreur d'archivage automatique: {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)

_unique_lines_cache = set()
_unique_lines_lock = threading.Lock()



def archive_automatique(origine, commande, resultat):
    """Archivage automatique complet avec compression GZIP et sûˋrialisation Dill/JSON"""
    timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%F %T')
    archive_data = {
        "timestamp": timestamp,
        "origine": origine,
        "commande": commande,
        "resultat": resultat,
        "metadata": {
            "python_version": sys.version,
            "platform": sys.platform,
            "user": os.getenv('USER', 'unknown')
        }
    }
    
    try:
        ARCHIVE_FILE.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        
        try:
            serialized_data = dill.dumps(archive_data)
            is_dill = True
        except Exception:
            serialized_data = orjson.dumps(archive_data, option=orjson.OPT_INDENT_2)
            is_dill = False

        with gzip.open(f"{ARCHIVE_FILE}.gz", "ab") as f_gzip:
            f_gzip.write(serialized_data)
            f_gzip.write(b"\n=== END_ARCHIVE_ENTRY ===\n")

        resultat_str = resultat if isinstance(resultat, str) else str(resultat)
        taille_resultat = len(resultat_str)
        indicateurs_echec = ["error", "Error", "ã", "failed", "Failed", "denied"]
        est_succes = not any(ind in resultat_str for ind in indicateurs_echec)
        archive_db = EVOLUT_HOME / "archives.db"
        conn_arch = sqlite3.connect(archive_db)
        cursor_arch = conn_arch.cursor()
        cursor_arch.execute("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS archives (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, timestamp TEXT, origine TEXT, commande TEXT, taille_resultat INTEGER, est_succes BOOLEAN)")
        cursor_arch.execute("INSERT INTO archives (timestamp, origine, commande, taille_resultat, est_succes) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)", (timestamp, origine, commande, taille_resultat, est_succes))
        cursor_arch.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN est_succes THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as succes, AVG(taille_resultat) as avg_taille FROM archives")
        stats_row = cursor_arch.fetchone()
        conn_arch.commit()
        conn_arch.close()
        if stats_row and stats_row[0] > 0:
            total, succes, avg_taille = stats_row
            taux = (succes / total * 100) if total > 0 else 0
            stats_array = np.array([total, succes, avg_taille if avg_taille else 0])
            log(f"û¯é¡ãôƒ Archivûˋ: {commande} (Format: {'Dill' if is_dill else 'JSON'}, GZIP, SQLite) | Stats: {taux:.0f}% succû´s, moy {stats_array[2]:.0f} chars")
        else:
            log(f"û¯é¡ãôƒ Archivûˋ automatiquement: {commande} (Format: {'Dill' if is_dill else 'JSON'}, Compressûˋ: GZIP)")
        
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Erreur d'archivage automatique: {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)

_unique_lines_cache = set()
_unique_lines_lock = threading.Lock()

        f.write(f"COMMANDE: {commande}\n")
        f.write(f"RESULTAT:\n{resultat}\n")
        f.write("=== FIN ARCHIVE ===\n\n")
    log(f"Þƒ Archivûˋ automatiquement: {commande}")

def archive_automatique(origine, commande, resultat):
    archive_data = {"timestamp": datetime.now().strftime('%F %T'), "origine": origine, "commande": commande, "resultat": resultat}
    with gzip.open(f"{ARCHIVE_FILE}.gz", "ab") as f:
        f.write(dill.dumps(archive_data) + b"\n=== END_ARCHIVE_ENTRY ===\n")

def archive_automatique(origine, commande, resultat):
    """Archivage compressûˋ des rûˋsultats pour ûˋconomie d'espace."""
    timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
    archive_dir = Path("/storage/emulated/0/Super_Lab/archives")
    archive_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    
    data = {"origin": origine, "cmd": commande, "res": resultat, "time": time.time()}
    file_path = archive_dir / f"archive_{timestamp}.json.gz"
    
    with gzip.open(file_path, 'wt', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        json.dump(data, f)











#=======================================
# def assemblage_cognitif()
#=======================================


def assemblage_cognitif():
    """Assemblage cognitif"""
    try:
        fragments = []
        for log_file in EVOLUT_HOME.glob("*.log"):
            with open(log_file, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                content = f.read()
                words = [word for word in content.split() if len(word) >= 3 and len(word) <= 15 and word.isalpha()]
                fragments.extend(words[:10])

        fragments = list(set(fragments))[:10]

        if len(fragments) > 5:
            nouveau_concept = "_".join(fragments[:3])
            log(f"ÞÏˋ Assemblage cognitif: Nouveau concept '{nouveau_concept}' ûˋmergûˋ")
            update_comm(f"Cristallisation conceptuelle: {nouveau_concept}")

            with open(MISSIONS_FILE, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(f"{int(time.time())}:echo 'ÞÏ  Concept ûˋmergent: {nouveau_concept}' && find /system -name '*{fragments[0]}*' -o -name '*{fragments[1]}*' 2>/dev/null | head -3\n")
    except:
        pass



def assemblage_cognitif():
    """Assemblage cognitif en extrayant des fragments de connaissance des logs."""
    try:
        fragments = []
        for log_file in EVOLUT_HOME.glob("*.log"):
            with open(log_file, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                content = f.read()
                words = [word for word in content.split() if len(word) >= 3 and len(word) <= 15 and word.isalpha()]
                fragments.extend(words[:10])

        fragments = list(set(fragments))[:10]

        if len(fragments) > 5:
            nouveau_concept = "_".join(fragments[:3])
            log(f"û¯é¡ôÏôˋ Assemblage cognitif: Nouveau concept '{nouveau_concept}' ûôˋmergûôˋ")
            update_comm(f"Cristallisation conceptuelle: {nouveau_concept}")

            with open(MISSIONS_FILE, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(f"{int(time.time())}:echo 'û¯é¡ôÏ  Concept ûôˋmergent: {nouveau_concept}' && find /system -name '*{fragments[0]}*' -o -name '*{fragments[1]}*' 2>/dev/null | head -3\n")
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"Erreur dans assemblage_cognitif: {e}", level="error")



def assemblage_cognitif():
    """Assemblage cognitif en extrayant des fragments de connaissance des logs."""

            nouveau_concept = "_".join(fragments[:3])

            update_comm(f"Cristallisation conceptuelle: {nouveau_concept}")

    except Exception as e:
        log(f"Erreur dans assemblage_cognitif: {e}", level="error")








#=======================================
# def auto_analyse_quotidienne()
#=======================================

def auto_analyse_quotidienne():
    """Analyse ses propres performances quotidiennes"""
    try:
        reussites = 0
        echecs = 0
        if (EVOLUT_HOME / "successful_commands.log").exists():
            reussites = len(open(EVOLUT_HOME / "successful_commands.log").readlines())
        if (EVOLUT_HOME / "failed_commands.log").exists():
            echecs = len(open(EVOLUT_HOME / "failed_commands.log").readlines())

        stats = {
            'commandes_reussies': reussites,
            'echecs': echecs,
            'capacites_auto': open(__file__).read().count('def capacite_auto_'),
            'cycles_total': AUTO_TASK_COUNTER
        }

        total_cmds = stats['commandes_reussies'] + stats['echecs']
        taux_reussite = (stats['commandes_reussies'] / total_cmds * 100) if total_cmds > 0 else 0
        log(f"Þ Auto-analyse: {taux_reussite:.1f}% rûˋussite, {stats['capacites_auto']} capacitûˋs")

        if taux_reussite < 60 and total_cmds > 10:
            update_comm("ÞÊ Je devrais analyser pourquoi j'ûˋchoue souvent...")
        elif taux_reussite > 85:
            update_comm("Þ₤ Je performe bien! Je devrais partager mes stratûˋgies gagnantes")

    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Auto-analyse ûˋchouûˋe: {e}")

            'capacites_auto': Path(__file__).parent.joinpath("evolut_self_modification.py").read_text().count('def capacite_auto_'),
            'cycles_total': AUTO_TASK_COUNTER
        }

        total_cmds = stats['commandes_reussies'] + stats['echecs']
        taux_reussite = (stats['commandes_reussies'] / total_cmds * 100) if total_cmds > 0 else 0
        log(f"û¯é¡ãù Auto-analyse: {taux_reussite:.1f}% rûôˋussite, {stats['capacites_auto']} capacitûôˋs")

        log(f"û¯é¡ãù Auto-analyse: {taux_reussite:.1f}% rûˋussite, {stats['capacites_auto']} capacitûˋs")

        if taux_reussite < 60 and total_cmds > 10:
            update_comm("û¯é¡ôÊã Je devrais analyser pourquoi j'ûˋchoue souvent...")
        elif taux_reussite > 85:
            update_comm("Þ₤ Je performe bien! Je devrais partager mes stratûˋgies gagnantes")

    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Auto-analyse ûˋchouûˋe: {e}", level="error")



def auto_analyse_quotidienne():
    """Analyse ses propres performances quotidiennes."""
    try:
        reussites = 0
        echecs = 0
        if (EVOLUT_HOME / "successful_commands.log").exists():
            reussites = len(open(EVOLUT_HOME / "successful_commands.log").readlines())
        if (EVOLUT_HOME / "failed_commands.log").exists():
            echecs = len(open(EVOLUT_HOME / "failed_commands.log").readlines())

        stats = {
            'commandes_reussies': reussites,
            'echecs': echecs,
            'capacites_auto': Path(__file__).parent.joinpath("evolut_self_modification.py").read_text().count('def capacite_auto_'),
            'cycles_total': AUTO_TASK_COUNTER
        }

        total_cmds = stats['commandes_reussies'] + stats['echecs']
        taux_reussite = (stats['commandes_reussies'] / total_cmds * 100) if total_cmds > 0 else 0
        log(f"Þ Auto-analyse: {taux_reussite:.1f}% rûˋussite, {stats['capacites_auto']} capacitûˋs")

        if taux_reussite < 60 and total_cmds > 10:
            update_comm("ÞÊ Je devrais analyser pourquoi j'ûˋchoue souvent...")
        elif taux_reussite > 85:
            update_comm("Þ₤ Je performe bien! Je devrais partager mes stratûˋgies gagnantes")

    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Auto-analyse ûˋchouûˋe: {e}", level="error")









#=======================================
# def auto_detect_dangerous_commands()
#=======================================

def auto_detect_dangerous_commands():
    """Detecte automatiquement les nouvelles commandes dangereuses (NOUVEAU)"""
    dangerous_patterns = [
        "format", "wipe", "erase", "delete", "drop",
        "truncate", "shred", "wipefs", "sfdisk"
    ]

    # Analyse le web pour trouver de nouvelles commandes risquûˋes
    web_results = web_research("linux delete command")

    new_dangerous_commands = []
    for result in web_results.values():
        content = result.get("contenu", "")
        for pattern in dangerous_patterns:
            if pattern in content.lower():
                new_dangerous_commands.append(pattern)

    return list(set(new_dangerous_commands))



def auto_detect_dangerous_commands():
    """Dûôˋtecte automatiquement les nouvelles commandes dangereuses via recherche web."""
    dangerous_patterns = [
        "format", "wipe", "erase", "delete", "drop",
        "truncate", "shred", "wipefs", "sfdisk"
    ]

    log("Recherche web pour dûôˋtecter de nouvelles commandes risquûôˋes...", level="info")
    web_results = web_research("linux dangerous commands")

    new_dangerous_commands = []
    for result_data in web_results.values():
        content = result_data.get("contenu", "")
        for pattern in dangerous_patterns:
            if pattern in content.lower():
                new_dangerous_commands.append(pattern)

    return list(set(new_dangerous_commands))

#=======================================
# def auto_execute_alternatives(command, error_message)
#=======================================

def auto_execute_alternatives(command, error_message):
    """Exûˋcute automatiquement des alternatives"""
    alternatives = generate_alternative_commands(command, error_message)
    for alt in alternatives:
        result = execute_commande_securisee(alt)
        if "error" not in result.lower():
            learn_from_successful_alternatives(command, alt, True)
            return result
    return None







#=======================================
# def auto_execute_alternatives(command, error_output)
#=======================================

def auto_execute_alternatives(command, error_output):
    """Gûˋnû´re et exûˋcute automatiquement des alternatives intelligentes."""
    from .advanced_learning import generate_permission_alternatives, generate_file_search_alternatives, generate_tool_alternatives, generate_timeout_alternatives, learn_from_command_result
    
    log(f"Þ ÿ¡ Tentative de rûˋsolution automatique pour: {command}", level="info")
    
    strategies = {
        "Permission denied": generate_permission_alternatives,
        "No such file": generate_file_search_alternatives,
        "not found": generate_tool_alternatives,
        "timeout": generate_timeout_alternatives
    }
    
    for pattern, func in strategies.items():
        if pattern in error_output:
            alternatives = func(command, error_output)
            if not alternatives: continue
            
            results = []
            with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=5) as executor:
                future_to_alt = {executor.submit(execute_commande_securisee, alt, recursive=True): alt for alt in alternatives[:5]}
                for future in future_to_alt:
                    alt = future_to_alt[future]
                    try:
                        res = future.result(timeout=COMMAND_TIMEOUT)
                        if res and not est_echec(res):
                            log(f"ã Alternative rûˋussie: {alt}")
                            learn_from_command_result(alt, res, True)
                            return res
                    except Exception as e:
                        log(f"ã ûchec alternative {alt}: {e}")
    return None

def auto_execute_alternatives(original_cmd, error)
#=======================================

def auto_execute_alternatives(original_cmd, error):
    log("ÞÏ Contournement auto en cours...")
    alts = [f"strings {original_cmd}", f"cat {original_cmd} 2>/dev/null"]
    for a in alts:
        r = execute_commande_securisee(a, recursive=True)
        if not est_echec(r): return f"Þ CONTOURNEMENT RûUSSI :\n{r}"
    return f"ã ûchec contournement : {error}"

def execute_commande_intelligente(commande):
    if causal_reasoner.predict_outcome(commande, {}) == "succes":
        log("ÞÏ  Raisonneur : Haut potentiel de succû´s")
    return execute_commande_securisee(commande)

def auto_execute_alternatives(original_command, error_output):
    """Exûˋcute automatiquement les alternatives"""
    alternatives = analyze_permission_denied(error_output)

    if alternatives:
        log(f"Þ₤ Permission denied dûˋtectûˋe! Gûˋnûˋration de {len(alternatives)} alternatives...")
        results = []
        for alt_cmd in alternatives:
            # Vûˋrification de sûˋcuritûˋ sur l'alternative
            is_safe = True
            for banned in DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST:
                if banned in alt_cmd.lower():
                    is_safe = False
                    break

            if is_safe:

                 # On appelle execute_commande_securisee avec recursive=True pour ûˋviter boucle infinie
                result = execute_commande_securisee(alt_cmd, recursive=True)
                if result and "Permission denied" not in result and "Error" not in result and "ã" not in result:
                    results.append(f"ã {alt_cmd}: {result}")
                    learn_from_successful_alternatives(alt_cmd, original_command)
                    break  # S'arrûˆte au premier qui marche

        return "\n".join(results) if results else "ã Aucune alternative n'a fonctionnûˋ"
    return None
