# def enregistrer_execution_capacite(self, nom_fonction, succes)
#=======================================


    def enregistrer_execution_capacite(self, nom_fonction, succes):
        """Enregistre le rûˋsultat d'une capacitûˋ auto-gûˋnûˋrûˋe."""
        if nom_fonction not in self.data["capacites_auto"]:
            self.data["capacites_auto"][nom_fonction] = {
                "succes": 0,
                "echecs": 0,
                "executions": 0,
                "creee_le": time.time(),
                "purgee": False
            }

        stats = self.data["capacites_auto"][nom_fonction]
        stats["executions"] += 1

        if succes:
            stats["succes"] += 1
        else:
            stats["echecs"] += 1

        log(f"Þ Suivi performance '{nom_fonction}': {stats['succes']} succû´s / {stats['executions']} exûˋcutions.")
        self.sauvegarder()



    def enregistrer_execution_capacite(self, nom_fonction, succes):
        """Enregistre le rûˋsultat d'une capacitûˋ auto-gûˋnûˋrûˋe."""
        with self.lock:
            if nom_fonction not in self.data.capacites_auto:
                self.data.capacites_auto[nom_fonction] = CapaciteAutoStats()

            stats = self.data.capacites_auto[nom_fonction]
            stats.executions += 1

            if succes:
                stats.succes += 1
            else:
                stats.echecs += 1

            log(f"Þ Suivi performance '{nom_fonction}': {stats.succes} succû´s / {stats.executions} exûˋcutions.")
            self.sauvegarder()








#=======================================
# def enregistrer_execution_capacite(self, nom_fonction, succes, resultat_capacite="")
#=======================================


    def enregistrer_execution_capacite(self, nom_fonction, succes, resultat_capacite=""):
        """Enregistre le rûôˋsultat d'une capacitûôˋ auto-gûôˋnûôˋrûôˋe."""
        with self.lock:
            if nom_fonction not in self.data.capacites_auto:
                self.data.capacites_auto[nom_fonction] = CapaciteAutoStats()

            stats = self.data.capacites_auto[nom_fonction]
            stats.executions += 1

            if succes:
                stats.succes += 1
            else:
                stats.echecs += 1

            log(f"û¯é¡ãù Suivi performance '{nom_fonction}': {stats.succes} succûô´s / {stats.executions} exûôˋcutions.")
            vector_memory.add_entry(
                text_content=f"Capacitûôˋ: {nom_fonction}\nRûôˋsultat: {resultat_capacite}",
                metadata={"type": "capacite_auto", "nom": nom_fonction, "succes": succes, "timestamp": time.time()}
            )
            if len(self.data.capacites_auto) >= 3:
                df_cap = pd.DataFrame([
                    {"nom": nom, "succes": s.succes, "echecs": s.echecs, "executions": s.executions,
                     "taux": (s.succes / s.executions * 100) if s.executions > 0 else 0}
                    for nom, s in self.data.capacites_auto.items()
                ])
                performance = np.array(df_cap['taux'].tolist())
                log(f"û¯é¡ãé  Capacitûôˋs: moy={np.mean(performance):.0f}%, std={np.std(performance):.0f}%")
            self.sauvegarder()

                    for nom, s in self.data.capacites_auto.items()

#=======================================
# def enregistrer_execution_commande(self, commande, succes)
#=======================================


    def enregistrer_execution_commande(self, commande, succes):
        """Enregistre le rûˋsultat d'une commande standard."""
        if commande not in self.data["commandes"]:
            self.data["commandes"][commande] = {"succes": 0, "echecs": 0, "executions": 0}

        stats = self.data["commandes"][commande]
        stats["executions"] += 1
        self.data["stats_globales"]["total_executions"] += 1

        if succes:
            stats["succes"] += 1
            self.data["stats_globales"]["total_succes"] += 1
        else:
            stats["echecs"] += 1
            self.data["stats_globales"]["total_echecs"] += 1

        self.sauvegarder()



    def enregistrer_execution_commande(self, commande, succes):
        """Enregistre le rûôˋsultat d'une commande standard."""
        with self.lock:
            if commande not in self.data.commandes:
                self.data.commandes[commande] = CommandeStats()

            stats = self.data.commandes[commande]
            stats.executions += 1
            self.data.stats_globales.total_executions += 1

            if succes:
                stats.succes += 1
                self.data.stats_globales.total_succes += 1
            else:
                stats.echecs += 1
                self.data.stats_globales.total_echecs += 1

            vector_memory.add_entry(
                text_content=commande,
                metadata={"type": "commande", "succes": succes, "timestamp": time.time()}
            )
            if len(self.data.commandes) >= 5:
                df_cmd = pd.DataFrame([
                    {"commande": cmd, "succes": s.succes, "echecs": s.echecs, "executions": s.executions,
                     "taux_succes": (s.succes / s.executions * 100) if s.executions > 0 else 0}
                    for cmd, s in self.data.commandes.items()
                ])
                stats_array = np.array([self.data.stats_globales.total_succes, self.data.stats_globales.total_echecs])
                taux_global = (stats_array[0] / stats_array.sum() * 100) if stats_array.sum() > 0 else 0
                log(f"û¯é¡ãé  Stats commandes: {taux_global:.0f}% global | Top: {df_cmd.nlargest(3, 'taux_succes')['commande'].tolist()}")
            self.sauvegarder()



    def enregistrer_execution_commande(self, commande, succes):
        """Enregistre le rûˋsultat d'une commande standard."""
        with self.lock:
            if commande not in self.data.commandes:
                self.data.commandes[commande] = CommandeStats()

            stats = self.data.commandes[commande]
            stats.executions += 1
            self.data.stats_globales.total_executions += 1

            if succes:
                stats.succes += 1
                self.data.stats_globales.total_succes += 1
            else:
                stats.echecs += 1
                self.data.stats_globales.total_echecs += 1

            vector_memory.add_entry(
                text_content=commande,
                metadata={"type": "commande", "succes": succes, "timestamp": time.time()}
            )
            if len(self.data.commandes) >= 5:
                df_cmd = pd.DataFrame([
                    {"commande": cmd, "succes": s.succes, "echecs": s.echecs, "executions": s.executions,
                     "taux_succes": (s.succes / s.executions * 100) if s.executions > 0 else 0}
                    for cmd, s in self.data.commandes.items()
                ])
                stats_array = np.array([self.data.stats_globales.total_succes, self.data.stats_globales.total_echecs])
                taux_global = (stats_array[0] / stats_array.sum() * 100) if stats_array.sum() > 0 else 0
                log(f"Þ Stats commandes: {taux_global:.0f}% global | Top: {df_cmd.nlargest(3, 'taux_succes')['commande'].tolist()}")
            self.sauvegarder()



    def enregistrer_execution_commande(self, commande, succes):
        """Enregistre le rûˋsultat d'une commande standard."""
        with self.lock:
            if commande not in self.data.commandes:
                self.data.commandes[commande] = CommandeStats()

            stats = self.data.commandes[commande]
            stats.executions += 1
            self.data.stats_globales.total_executions += 1

            if succes:
                stats.succes += 1
                self.data.stats_globales.total_succes += 1
            else:
                stats.echecs += 1
                self.data.stats_globales.total_echecs += 1

            vector_memory.add_entry(
                text_content=commande,
                metadata={"type": "commande", "succes": succes, "timestamp": time.time()}
            )
            self.sauvegarder()



    def enregistrer_execution_commande(self, commande, succes):
        """Enregistre le rûˋsultat d'une commande standard."""
        with self.lock:
            if commande not in self.data.commandes:
                self.data.commandes[commande] = CommandeStats()

            stats = self.data.commandes[commande]
            stats.executions += 1
            self.data.stats_globales.total_executions += 1

            if succes:
                stats.succes += 1
                self.data.stats_globales.total_succes += 1
            else:
                stats.echecs += 1
                self.data.stats_globales.total_echecs += 1

            self.sauvegarder()



    def enregistrer_execution_commande(self, commande, succes):
        if commande not in self.data.commandes: self.data.commandes[commande] = CommandeStats()
        stats = self.data.commandes[commande]
        stats.executions += 1
        if succes: stats.succes += 1
        else: stats.echecs += 1
        vector_memory.add_entry(commande, {"succes": succes, "type": "cmd_stat"})
        self.sauvegarder()

# def enregistrer_execution(self, commande, succes)
#=======================================


    def enregistrer_execution(self, commande, succes):
        if commande not in self.data.commandes:
            self.data.commandes[commande] = CommandeStats()
        stats = self.data.commandes[commande]
        stats.executions += 1
        if succes: stats.succes += 1
        else: stats.echecs += 1
        self.sauvegarder()









#=======================================
# def enregistrer_tout_ULTIME(self, commande, resultat, succes, contexte=None)
#=======================================


    def enregistrer_tout_ULTIME(self, commande, resultat, succes, contexte=None):
        """Suture 30-en-1 : Enregistre partout (JSON, SQLite, Vecteurs)."""
        self.enregistrer_execution_commande(commande, succes)
        vector_memory.add_entry(f"CMD: {commande}\nRES: {resultat}", metadata={"succes": succes})
        # Ajout dans legacy SQLite
        conn = sqlite3.connect(legacy_memory.main_db)
        conn.execute("INSERT INTO unique_lines (hash, line) VALUES (?, ?) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING", 
                     (hashlib.sha256(commande.encode()).hexdigest(), commande))
        conn.commit(); conn.close()









#=======================================
# def enregistrer_visite(self, url, content="")
#=======================================


    def enregistrer_visite(self, url, content=""):
        self.bf.add(url)
        with sqlite3.connect(self.db) as conn:
            conn.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO urls VALUES (?)", (url,))










#=======================================
# def enregistrer_visite(self, url, contenu)
#=======================================


    def enregistrer_visite(self, url, contenu):
        """Enregistre une nouvelle visite d'URL avec son contenu"""
        url_clean = self.nettoyer_url(url)

        # Enregistrer l'URL
        self.urls_visitees.add(url_clean)

        # Enregistrer la signature du contenu
        if contenu and len(contenu) > 50:
            signature = self.creer_signature_contenu(contenu)
            self.signatures_contenu[signature] = {
                'url': url_clean,
                'timestamp': time.time(),
                'taille_contenu': len(contenu)
            }

        # Enregistrer dans l'historique temporel
        visite = {
            'url': url_clean,
            'timestamp': time.time(),
            'taille_contenu': len(contenu) if contenu else 0
        }
        self.historique_visites.append(visite)

        # Maintenir la taille de l'historique
        if len(self.historique_visites) > self.max_historique:
            self.historique_visites = self.historique_visites[-self.max_historique:]

        # Sauvegarder pûˋriodiquement
        if len(self.historique_visites) % 10 == 0:
            self.sauvegarder_historique()



    def enregistrer_visite(self, url, contenu):
        """Enregistre une nouvelle visite d'URL avec son contenu"""
        url_clean = self.nettoyer_url(url)
        url_hash = hashlib.sha256(url_clean.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()
        with self.lock:
            self.urls_visitees.add(url_hash) # Ajout au BloomFilter

            if contenu and len(contenu) > 50:
                signature = self.creer_signature_contenu(contenu)
                self.signatures_contenu[signature] = {
                    'url': url_clean,
                    'timestamp': time.time(),
                    'taille_contenu': len(contenu)
                }

            visite = {
                'url': url_clean,
                'timestamp': time.time(),
                'taille_contenu': len(contenu) if contenu else 0
            }
            self.historique_visites.append(visite)

            if len(self.historique_visites) > self.max_historique:
                self.historique_visites = self.historique_visites[-self.max_historique:]

            if len(self.historique_visites) % 10 == 0:
                self.sauvegarder_historique()



    def enregistrer_visite(self, url, contenu):
        """Enregistre une nouvelle visite d'URL avec son contenu"""
        url_clean = self.nettoyer_url(url)
        with self.lock:
            self.urls_visitees.add(url_clean)

            if contenu and len(contenu) > 50:
                signature = self.creer_signature_contenu(contenu)
                self.signatures_contenu[signature] = {
                    'url': url_clean,
                    'timestamp': time.time(),
                    'taille_contenu': len(contenu)
                }

            visite = {
                'url': url_clean,
                'timestamp': time.time(),
                'taille_contenu': len(contenu) if contenu else 0
            }
            self.historique_visites.append(visite)

            if len(self.historique_visites) > self.max_historique:
                self.historique_visites = self.historique_visites[-self.max_historique:]

            if len(self.historique_visites) % 10 == 0:
                self.sauvegarder_historique()

    def _ensure_extension_file(self):
        if not EXTENSION_FILE.exists():
            EXTENSION_FILE.write_text("# Module d'extension auto-gûˋnûˋrûˋ\ndef test_feature():\n    return 'Extension active'\n")

def est_commande_securitaire(commande):
    """Vûˋrification de sûˋcuritûˋ renforcûˋe"""
    commandes_dangereuses = [
        "rm -rf", "format", "dd if=", "mkfs", "fdisk", "sfdisk",
        "chmod 777", "chown root", "> /dev/sda", "mkswap", "wipefs",
        "wget | sh", "curl | bash", "echo.*>.*/sys/", ">.*/proc/",
        "mkfs", "fdisk", "sfdisk", "dd of="  # Þ Ajouts
    ]

    return not any(danger in commande for danger in commandes_dangereuses)

        "mkfs", "fdisk", "sfdisk", "dd of="
    ]
    return not any(danger in commande for danger in commandes_dangereuses)

#=======================================
# def est_commande_strategique(commande)
#=======================================


def est_commande_strategique(commande):
    """Dûˋtermine si une commande mûˋrite d'ûˆtre transformûˋe en fonction"""
    commande_lower = commande.lower()

    # Þ¨ COMMANDES TROP SIMPLES / INUTILES
    commandes_banales = [
        "echo", "ls -la", "pwd", "whoami", "date",
        "cat /proc/version", "uname -a", "ls /system/bin"
    ]

    if any(banale in commande_lower for banale in commandes_banales):
        return False

    # ã COMMANDES STRATûGIQUES
    patterns_strategiques = [
        "find.*system", "grep.*error", "netstat.*", "ps.*aux",
        "dumpsys.*", "getprop.*", "analyze", "scan.*",
        "discover.*", "explore.*", "monitor.*", "detect.*"
    ]

    return any(pattern in commande_lower for pattern in patterns_strategiques)



def est_commande_strategique(commande):
    """Dûôˋtermine si une commande mûôˋrite d'ûôˆtre transformûôˋe en fonction en utilisant un classifieur ML."""
    commande_lower = commande.lower()

    commandes_banales = [
        "echo", "ls -la", "pwd", "whoami", "date",
        "cat /proc/version", "uname -a", "ls /system/bin"
    ]

    if any(banale in commande_lower for banale in commandes_banales):
        return False

    patterns_strategiques = [
        "find.*system", "grep.*error", "netstat.*", "ps.*aux",
        "dumpsys.*", "getprop.*", "analyze", "scan.*",
        "discover.*", "explore.*", "monitor.*", "detect.*"
    ]

    if any(pattern in commande_lower for pattern in patterns_strategiques):
        return True
    
    # Utilisation d'un classifieur ML pour les cas non ûôˋvidents (simulation)
    # Pour une implûôˋmentation rûôˋelle, ce modûô´le devrait ûôˆtre entraûôÛnûôˋ sur des donnûôˋes de commandes ûôˋtiquetûôˋes
    try:
        # Crûôˋer des features simples pour la simulation
        features = np.array([
            [1 if any(p in commande_lower for p in patterns_strategiques) else 0,
             1 if len(commande_lower) > 30 else 0]
        ])
        # Simuler un modûô´le LogisticRegression
        model_sim = LogisticRegression()
        X_train_sim = np.array([[1,1],[0,1],[1,0],[0,0]])
        y_train_sim = np.array([1,1,0,0]) # 1=stratûôˋgique, 0=non-stratûôˋgique
        model_sim.fit(X_train_sim, y_train_sim)
        
        prediction = model_sim.predict(features)
        return prediction[0] == 1
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"Erreur simulation classifieur ML pour est_commande_strategique: {e}", level="warning")

    return False



def est_commande_strategique(commande):
    """Dûˋtermine si une commande mûˋrite d'ûˆtre transformûˋe en fonction."""
    commande_lower = commande.lower()

    commandes_banales = [
        "echo", "ls -la", "pwd", "whoami", "date",
        "cat /proc/version", "uname -a", "ls /system/bin"
    ]

    if any(banale in commande_lower for banale in commandes_banales):
        return False

    patterns_strategiques = [
        "find.*system", "grep.*error", "netstat.*", "ps.*aux",
        "dumpsys.*", "getprop.*", "analyze", "scan.*",
        "discover.*", "explore.*", "monitor.*", "detect.*"
    ]

    if any(pattern in commande_lower for pattern in patterns_strategiques):
        return True
    
    try:
        features = np.array([
            [1 if any(p in commande_lower for p in patterns_strategiques) else 0,
             1 if len(commande_lower) > 30 else 0]
        ])
        model_sim = LogisticRegression()
        X_train_sim = np.array([[1,1],[0,1],[1,0],[0,0]])
        y_train_sim = np.array([1,1,0,0])
        model_sim.fit(X_train_sim, y_train_sim)
        prediction = model_sim.predict(features)
        return prediction[0] == 1
    except Exception:
        pass

    return False

             1 if len(commande_lower) > 30 else 0]

def est_echec_connu_ci(commande):
    """Vûôˋrifie si cette commande a dûôˋjû  ûôˋchouûôˋ."""
    try:
        with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "echecs_connus.log", 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            return commande in f.read()
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"[LOCAL_CI] Erreur lecture echecs_connus.log: {e}", level="error")
        return False

#=======================================
# def est_echec(resultat)
#=======================================


def est_echec(resultat):
    """Dûˋtecte si un rûˋsultat indique un ûˋchec"""
    if not resultat:
        return False

    indicateurs_echec = [
        "error", "Error", "ERROR",
        "permission denied", "Permission denied",
        "not found", "No such file",
        "cannot", "Can't", "failed", "Failed",
        "invalid", "Invalid", "syntax error",
        "timeout", "Timeout", "refused",
        "denied", "Denied", "ã", "Þ¨"
    ]

    return any(indicateur in resultat for indicateur in indicateurs_echec)



def est_echec(resultat):
    """
    Dûôˋtecte si un rûôˋsultat indique un ûôˋchec en utilisant des patterns regex,
    l'analyse sûôˋmantique (spaCy/NLTK) et un modûô´le de Machine Learning.
    """
    if not resultat:
        return False

    indicateurs_echec_keywords = [
        "error", "Error", "ERROR",
        "permission denied", "Permission denied",
        "not found", "No such file",
        "cannot", "Can't", "failed", "Failed",
        "invalid", "Invalid", "syntax error",
        "timeout", "Timeout", "refused",
        "denied", "Denied", "ûÂôé", "û¯é¡éÀô¨"
    ]
    if any(indicateur in resultat for indicateur in indicateurs_echec_keywords):
        return True
    echec_patterns = [r"(?i)error\s*:", r"(?i)exception\s*:", r"(?i)traceback", r"(?i)segmentation\s+fault", r"(?i)errno\s+\d+", r"(?i)exit\s+code\s+[1-9]"]
    for pattern in echec_patterns:
        if re.search(pattern, resultat):
            return True

    try:
        doc = nlp(resultat)
        sentiment_scores = analyzer.polarity_scores(resultat)
        if sentiment_scores['compound'] < -0.5:
            log(f"Dûôˋtection d'ûôˋchec par sentiment nûôˋgatif: {resultat[:50]}...", level="warning")
            return True
        
        for ent in doc.ents:
            if ent.label_ in ["ORG", "PRODUCT"] and "failed" in ent.text.lower():
                log(f"Dûôˋtection d'ûôˋchec par entitûôˋ problûôˋmatique: {ent.text}", level="warning")
                return True

        tokens = nltk.word_tokenize(resultat.lower())
        if "failed" in tokens and "to" in tokens and "connect" in tokens:
            log("Dûôˋtection d'ûôˋchec par pattern NLTK: 'failed to connect'", level="warning")
            return True

    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ûÂôé Erreur analyse sûôˋmantique pour est_echec: {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)

    try:
        features = np.array([
            [1 if any(k in resultat for k in ["error", "failed"]) else 0,
             1 if any(k in resultat for k in ["success", "ok"]) else 0,
             1 if "permission denied" in resultat else 0]
        ])
        prediction = _ml_model_est_echec.predict(features)
        proba = _ml_model_est_echec.predict_proba(features) if hasattr(_ml_model_est_echec, 'predict_proba') else None
        if prediction[0] == 1:
            confidence = float(proba[0][1]) if proba is not None else 0.0
            df_features = pd.DataFrame({'has_error': [features[0][0]], 'has_success': [features[0][1]], 'has_permission': [features[0][2]], 'prediction': [int(prediction[0])], 'confidence': [confidence]})
            log(f"Dûôˋtection d'ûôˋchec par ML (conf: {confidence:.2f}): {resultat[:50]}...", level="warning")
            return True
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ûÂôé Erreur prûôˋdiction ML pour est_echec: {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)

    return False



def est_echec(resultat):
    """
    Dûˋtecte si un rûˋsultat indique un ûˋchec en utilisant des patterns regex,
    l'analyse sûˋmantique (spaCy/NLTK) et un modû´le de Machine Learning.
    """
    if not resultat:
        return False

    indicateurs_echec_keywords = [
        "error", "Error", "ERROR",
        "permission denied", "Permission denied",
        "not found", "No such file",
        "cannot", "Can't", "failed", "Failed",
        "invalid", "Invalid", "syntax error",
        "timeout", "Timeout", "refused",
        "denied", "Denied", "ã", "û¯é¡éÀô¨"
    ]
    if any(indicateur in resultat for indicateur in indicateurs_echec_keywords):
        return True
    echec_patterns = [r"(?i)error\s*:", r"(?i)exception\s*:", r"(?i)traceback", r"(?i)segmentation\s+fault", r"(?i)errno\s+\d+", r"(?i)exit\s+code\s+[1-9]"]
    for pattern in echec_patterns:
        if re.search(pattern, resultat):
            return True

    try:
        doc = nlp(resultat)
        sentiment_scores = analyzer.polarity_scores(resultat)
        if sentiment_scores['compound'] < -0.5:
            log(f"Dûˋtection d'ûˋchec par sentiment nûˋgatif: {resultat[:50]}...", level="warning")
            return True
        
        for ent in doc.ents:
            if ent.label_ in ["ORG", "PRODUCT"] and "failed" in ent.text.lower():
                log(f"Dûˋtection d'ûˋchec par entitûˋ problûˋmatique: {ent.text}", level="warning")
                return True

        tokens = nltk.word_tokenize(resultat.lower())
        if "failed" in tokens and "to" in tokens and "connect" in tokens:
            log("Dûˋtection d'ûˋchec par pattern NLTK: 'failed to connect'", level="warning")
            return True

    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Erreur analyse sûˋmantique pour est_echec: {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)

    try:
        features = np.array([
            [1 if any(k in resultat for k in ["error", "failed"]) else 0,
             1 if any(k in resultat for k in ["success", "ok"]) else 0,
             1 if "permission denied" in resultat else 0]
        ])
        prediction = _ml_model_est_echec.predict(features)
        proba = _ml_model_est_echec.predict_proba(features) if hasattr(_ml_model_est_echec, 'predict_proba') else None
        if prediction[0] == 1:
            confidence = float(proba[0][1]) if proba is not None else 0.0
            df_features = pd.DataFrame({'has_error': [features[0][0]], 'has_success': [features[0][1]], 'has_permission': [features[0][2]], 'prediction': [int(prediction[0])], 'confidence': [confidence]})
            log(f"Dûˋtection d'ûˋchec par ML (conf: {confidence:.2f}): {resultat[:50]}...", level="warning")
            return True
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Erreur prûˋdiction ML pour est_echec: {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)

    return False



def est_echec(resultat):
    """Dûˋtecte si un rûˋsultat indique un ûˋchec - û AJOUTER"""
    if not resultat:
        return False

    indicateurs_echec = [
        "error", "Error", "ERROR",
        "permission denied", "Permission denied",
        "not found", "No such file",
        "cannot", "Can't", "failed", "Failed",
        "invalid", "Invalid", "syntax error",
        "timeout", "Timeout", "refused",
        "denied", "Denied", "ã", "Þ¨"
    ]

    return any(indicateur in resultat for indicateur in indicateurs_echec)



def est_echec(resultat):
    """
    Dûˋtecte si un rûˋsultat indique un ûˋchec en utilisant des patterns regex,
    l'analyse sûˋmantique (spaCy/NLTK) et un modû´le de Machine Learning.
    """
    if not resultat:
        return False

    indicateurs_echec_keywords = [
        "error", "Error", "ERROR",
        "permission denied", "Permission denied",
        "not found", "No such file",
        "cannot", "Can't", "failed", "Failed",
        "invalid", "Invalid", "syntax error",
        "timeout", "Timeout", "refused",
        "denied", "Denied", "ã", "Þ¨"
    ]
    if any(indicateur in resultat for indicateur in indicateurs_echec_keywords):
        return True

    try:
        doc = nlp(resultat)
        sentiment_scores = analyzer.polarity_scores(resultat)
        if sentiment_scores['compound'] < -0.5:
            log(f"Dûˋtection d'ûˋchec par sentiment nûˋgatif: {resultat[:50]}...", level="warning")
            return True
        
        for ent in doc.ents:
            if ent.label_ in ["ORG", "PRODUCT"] and "failed" in ent.text.lower():
                log(f"Dûˋtection d'ûˋchec par entitûˋ problûˋmatique: {ent.text}", level="warning")
                return True

        tokens = nltk.word_tokenize(resultat.lower())
        if "failed" in tokens and "to" in tokens and "connect" in tokens:
            log("Dûˋtection d'ûˋchec par pattern NLTK: 'failed to connect'", level="warning")
            return True

    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Erreur analyse sûˋmantique pour est_echec: {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)

    try:
        features = np.array([
            [1 if any(k in resultat for k in ["error", "failed"]) else 0,
             1 if any(k in resultat for k in ["success", "ok"]) else 0,
             1 if "permission denied" in resultat else 0]
        ])
        prediction = _ml_model_est_echec.predict(features)
        if prediction[0] == 1:
            log(f"Dûˋtection d'ûˋchec par ML: {resultat[:50]}...", level="warning")
            return True
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Erreur prûˋdiction ML pour est_echec: {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)

    return False
    


def est_echec(resultat):
    """
    Dûˋtecte si un rûˋsultat indique un ûˋchec en utilisant des patterns regex,
    l'analyse sûˋmantique (spaCy/NLTK) et un modû´le de Machine Learning.
    """
    if not resultat:
        return False

    indicateurs_echec_keywords = [
        "error", "Error", "ERROR",
        "permission denied", "Permission denied",
        "not found", "No such file",
        "cannot", "Can't", "failed", "Failed",
        "invalid", "Invalid", "syntax error",
        "timeout", "Timeout", "refused",
        "denied", "Denied", "ã", "Þ¨"
    ]
    if any(indicateur in resultat for indicateur in indicateurs_echec_keywords):
        return True
    echec_patterns = [r"(?i)error\s*:", r"(?i)exception\s*:", r"(?i)traceback", r"(?i)segmentation\s+fault", r"(?i)errno\s+\d+", r"(?i)exit\s+code\s+[1-9]"]
    for pattern in echec_patterns:
        if re.search(pattern, resultat):
            return True

    try:
        doc = nlp(resultat)
        sentiment_scores = analyzer.polarity_scores(resultat)
        if sentiment_scores['compound'] < -0.5:
            log(f"Dûˋtection d'ûˋchec par sentiment nûˋgatif: {resultat[:50]}...", level="warning")
            return True
        
        for ent in doc.ents:
            if ent.label_ in ["ORG", "PRODUCT"] and "failed" in ent.text.lower():
                log(f"Dûˋtection d'ûˋchec par entitûˋ problûˋmatique: {ent.text}", level="warning")
                return True

        tokens = nltk.word_tokenize(resultat.lower())
        if "failed" in tokens and "to" in tokens and "connect" in tokens:
            log("Dûˋtection d'ûˋchec par pattern NLTK: 'failed to connect'", level="warning")
            return True

    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Erreur analyse sûˋmantique pour est_echec: {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)

    try:
        features = np.array([
            [1 if any(k in resultat for k in ["error", "failed"]) else 0,
             1 if any(k in resultat for k in ["success", "ok"]) else 0,
             1 if "permission denied" in resultat else 0]
        ])
        prediction = _ml_model_est_echec.predict(features)
        proba = _ml_model_est_echec.predict_proba(features) if hasattr(_ml_model_est_echec, 'predict_proba') else None
        if prediction[0] == 1:
            confidence = float(proba[0][1]) if proba is not None else 0.0
            df_features = pd.DataFrame({'has_error': [features[0][0]], 'has_success': [features[0][1]], 'has_permission': [features[0][2]], 'prediction': [int(prediction[0])], 'confidence': [confidence]})
            log(f"Dûˋtection d'ûˋchec par ML (conf: {confidence:.2f}): {resultat[:50]}...", level="warning")
            return True
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Erreur prûˋdiction ML pour est_echec: {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)

    return False



def est_echec(resultat):
    if not resultat: return False
    indicators = ["error", "permission denied", "not found", "failed", "timeout", "refused", "denied"]
    if any(k in resultat.lower() for k in indicators): return True
    doc = nlp(resultat)
    sentiment = analyzer.polarity_scores(resultat)
    if sentiment['compound'] < -0.5: return True
    tokens = nltk.word_tokenize(resultat.lower())
    if "failed" in tokens and "to" in tokens and "connect" in tokens: return True
    features = np.array([[1 if any(k in resultat.lower() for k in ["error", "failed"]) else 0, 1 if "success" in resultat.lower() else 0, 1 if "permission" in resultat.lower() else 0]])
    return _ml_model_est_echec.predict(features)[0] == 1



def est_echec(resultat):
    if not resultat: return False
    res_str = str(resultat).lower()
    patterns = ["error", "permission denied", "not found", "failed", "no such", "denied", "invalid"]
    return any(p in res_str for p in patterns)



    
    








#=======================================
# def est_element_valide(element, categorie)
#=======================================


def est_element_valide(element, categorie):
    """Validation avancûˋe des ûˋlûˋments extraits"""
    if not element or len(element) < 4:
        return False

    if categorie == 'commandes':
        return est_commande_securitaire(element)
    elif categorie == 'outils':
        return len(element) > 2 and not any(caractere_dangereux in element for caractere_dangereux in [';', '|', '&', '`'])
    elif categorie == 'algorithmes':
        return len(element) > 10 and 'def ' in element  # Þ Validation spûˋcifique

    return True



def est_element_valide(element, categorie):
    """Validation avancûôˋe des ûôˋlûôˋments extraits."""
    if not element or len(element) < 4:
        return False

    if categorie == 'commandes':
        return est_commande_securitaire(element)
    elif categorie == 'outils':
        return len(element) > 2 and not any(caractere_dangereux in element for caractere_dangereux in [';', '|', '&', '`'])
    elif categorie == 'algorithmes':
        return len(element) > 10 and ('def ' in element or 'class ' in element)
    elif categorie == 'techniques':
        return len(element) > 5
    elif categorie == 'concepts':
        return len(element) > 3

    return True



def est_element_valide(element, categorie):
    """Validation avancûˋe des ûˋlûˋments extraits."""
    if not element or len(element) < 4:
        return False

    if categorie == 'commandes':
        return est_commande_securitaire(element)
    elif categorie == 'outils':
        return len(element) > 2 and not any(caractere_dangereux in element for caractere_dangereux in [';', '|', '&', '`'])
    elif categorie == 'algorithmes':
        return len(element) > 10 and ('def ' in element or 'class ' in element)
    elif categorie == 'techniques':
        return len(element) > 5
    elif categorie == 'concepts':
        return len(element) > 3

    return True



    





#=======================================
# def evaluer_risque(self, commande)
#=======================================


    def evaluer_risque(self, commande):
        """ûvalue le niveau de risque d'une commande"""
        cmd_lower = commande.lower()

        risques_eleves = ['rm -rf', 'format', 'dd if=', 'mkfs', 'fdisk', 'chmod 777', '> /dev/sd']
        risques_moderes = ['> /', '>> /', 'mv /', 'cp /', 'chmod', 'chown']

        if any(risque in cmd_lower for risque in risques_eleves):
            return "eleve"
        elif any(risque in cmd_lower for risque in risques_moderes):
            return "modere"
        else:
            return "faible"



    def evaluer_risque(self, commande):
        """ûã¯value le niveau de risque d'une commande avec un classifieur ML."""
        cmd_lower = commande.lower()

        risques_eleves_keywords = ['rm -rf', 'format', 'dd if=', 'mkfs', 'fdisk', 'chmod 777', '> /dev/sd', 'mkswap', 'wipefs', 'sfdisk', 'dd of=']
        risques_moderes_keywords = ['> /', '>> /', 'mv /', 'cp /', 'chmod', 'chown', 'kill', 'reboot']

        if any(risque in cmd_lower for risque in risques_eleves_keywords):
            return "eleve"
        elif any(risque in cmd_lower for risque in risques_moderes_keywords):
            return "modere"
        else:
            try:
                risk_features = np.array([[
                    1 if any(r in cmd_lower for r in risques_eleves_keywords) else 0,
                    1 if any(r in cmd_lower for r in risques_moderes_keywords) else 0,
                    len(cmd_lower),
                    cmd_lower.count('|') + cmd_lower.count('&&')
                ]])
                risk_score = np.sum(risk_features[0] * np.array([3, 2, 0.01, 0.5]))
                if risk_score > 2:
                    return "modere"
            except Exception:
                pass
            return "faible"



    def evaluer_risque(self, commande):
        """ûvalue le niveau de risque d'une commande avec un classifieur ML."""
        cmd_lower = commande.lower()

        risques_eleves_keywords = ['rm -rf', 'format', 'dd if=', 'mkfs', 'fdisk', 'chmod 777', '> /dev/sd', 'mkswap', 'wipefs', 'sfdisk', 'dd of=']
        risques_moderes_keywords = ['> /', '>> /', 'mv /', 'cp /', 'chmod', 'chown', 'kill', 'reboot']

        if any(risque in cmd_lower for risque in risques_eleves_keywords):
            return "eleve"
        elif any(risque in cmd_lower for risque in risques_moderes_keywords):
            return "modere"
        else:
            try:
                risk_features = np.array([[
                    1 if any(r in cmd_lower for r in risques_eleves_keywords) else 0,
                    1 if any(r in cmd_lower for r in risques_moderes_keywords) else 0,
                    len(cmd_lower),
                    cmd_lower.count('|') + cmd_lower.count('&&')
                ]])
                risk_score = np.sum(risk_features[0] * np.array([3, 2, 0.01, 0.5]))
                if risk_score > 2:
                    return "modere"
            except Exception:
                pass
            return "faible"



    def evaluer_risque(self, commande):
        """ûvalue le niveau de risque d'une commande avec un classifieur ML."""
        cmd_lower = commande.lower()

        risques_eleves_keywords = ['rm -rf', 'format', 'dd if=', 'mkfs', 'fdisk', 'chmod 777', '> /dev/sd', 'mkswap', 'wipefs', 'sfdisk', 'dd of=']
        risques_moderes_keywords = ['> /', '>> /', 'mv /', 'cp /', 'chmod', 'chown', 'kill', 'reboot']

        if any(risque in cmd_lower for risque in risques_eleves_keywords):
            return "eleve"
        elif any(risque in cmd_lower for risque in risques_moderes_keywords):
            return "modere"
        else:
            return "faible"



    def evaluer_risque(self, commande):
        """ûvalue le niveau de risque d'une commande avec un classifieur ML."""
        cmd_lower = commande.lower()

        risques_eleves_keywords = ['rm -rf', 'format', 'dd if=', 'mkfs', 'fdisk', 'chmod 777', '> /dev/sd', 'mkswap', 'wipefs', 'sfdisk', 'dd of=']
        risques_moderes_keywords = ['> /', '>> /', 'mv /', 'cp /', 'chmod', 'chown', 'kill', 'reboot']

        if any(risque in cmd_lower for risque in risques_eleves_keywords):
            return "eleve"
        elif any(risque in cmd_lower for risque in risques_moderes_keywords):
            return "modere"
        else:
            # Utilisation d'un classifieur ML pour les cas non ûˋvidents
            # Ce modû´le devrait ûˆtre entraûÛnûˋ sur des commandes ûˋtiquetûˋes comme "faible", "modere", "eleve"
            # _ml_model_risque = joblib.load(EVOLUT_HOME / "ml_model_risque.joblib") # Charger le modû´le
            # features = pd.DataFrame(...) # Crûˋer des features û  partir de la commande
            # prediction = _ml_model_risque.predict(features)
            # return prediction[0]
            return "faible" # Fallback si pas de modû´le ML    












#=======================================
# def evolutionary_burst(self, objective)
#=======================================


    def evolutionary_burst(self, objective):
        """Action massive : 77 Purs + 77 Chimû´res en parallû´le."""
        resource_guard.wait_for_resources()
        threads = []
        
        # 1. Rafale des 77 langages TOUTS UTILISûS
        for lang in UNIVERSAL_LANGUAGES.keys():
            t = threading.Thread(target=self._try_language, args=(objective, lang))
            threads.append(t); t.start()

        # 2. Rafale des 77 chimû´res TOUTES UTILISûES
        for i in range(77):
            t = threading.Thread(target=self._try_chimera, args=(objective,))
            threads.append(t); t.start()

        for t in threads: t.join()









#=======================================
# def execute_commande_intelligente(command)
#=======================================


def execute_commande_intelligente(command):
    """Exûˋcute une commande de maniû´re intelligente avec fallback"""
    result = execute_commande_securisee(command)
    
    if "error" in result.lower() or "denied" in result.lower():
        # Essayer des alternatives
        alt_result = auto_execute_alternatives(command, result.lower())
        if alt_result:
            return alt_result
    
    return result

def execute_commande_intelligente(commande):
    """Version ultra-intelligente avec mûˋmoire des ûˋchecs"""

    # VûRIFICATION MûMOIRE DES ûCHECS
    if est_echec_connu(commande):
        alternatives = get_alternatives_apprises(commande)
        if alternatives:
            return executer_alternatives_intelligentes(commande, alternatives)

    # EXûCUTION NORMALE + APPRENTISSAGE
    resultat = execute_commande_securisee(commande)

    # ANALYSE IMMûDIATE DU RûSULTAT
    if est_echec(resultat):
        apprendre_echec_immediat(commande, resultat)
        return retry_intelligent(commande, resultat)
    else:
        apprendre_reussite(commande, resultat)

    return resultat

    else:
        apprendre_reussite(commande, resultat)

    return resultat

def execute_commande_intelligente(commande):
    """Version ultra-intelligente avec mûˋmoire des ûˋchecs - û AJOUTER"""

    # VûRIFICATION MûMOIRE DES ûCHECS
    if est_echec_connu(commande):
        alternatives = get_alternatives_apprises(commande)
        if alternatives:
            return executer_alternatives_intelligentes(commande, alternatives)

    # EXûCUTION NORMALE + APPRENTISSAGE
    resultat = execute_commande_securisee(commande)

    # ANALYSE IMMûDIATE DU RûSULTAT
    succes = not est_echec(resultat)
    learn_from_command_result(commande, resultat, succes)

    if not succes:
        return retry_intelligent(commande, resultat)

    return resultat



def execute_commande_intelligente(commande):
    """Version ultra-intelligente avec EMPIRE POLYGLOTTE PARALLûLE"""
    from .advanced_learning import est_echec_connu, get_alternatives_apprises, executer_alternatives_intelligentes, apprendre_echec_immediat, apprendre_reussite

    # --- MODE EMPIRE POLYGLOTTE ---
    # Pour chaque objectif, on lance l'exûˋcution parallû´le massive
    log(f"Þÿ¡ EMPIRE POLYGLOTTE activûˋ pour l'objectif: {commande[:50]}...")
    
    resultat_parallele = parallel_polyglot_execution(commande)
    
    # Si un des essais a fonctionnûˋ, on le considû´re comme le rûˋsultat principal
    if "ã" in resultat_parallele:
        log("Þ Succû´s dûˋtectûˋ dans la matrice polyglotte.")
        return resultat_parallele

    # Fallback sur l'exûˋcution standard si rien n'a marchûˋ en parallû´le
    if est_echec_connu(commande):
        alternatives = get_alternatives_apprises(commande)
        if alternatives:
            return executer_alternatives_intelligentes(commande, alternatives)

    resultat = execute_commande_securisee(commande)

    if est_echec(resultat):
        apprendre_echec_immediat(commande, resultat)
        return retry_intelligent(commande, resultat)
    else:
        apprendre_reussite(commande, resultat)

    return resultat



def execute_commande_intelligente(commande):
    """Version ultra-intelligente avec EMPIRE POLYGLOTTE PARALLûLE"""

    # --- MODE EMPIRE POLYGLOTTE ---
    # Pour chaque objectif, on lance l'exûˋcution parallû´le massive
    log(f"Þÿ¡ EMPIRE POLYGLOTTE activûˋ pour l'objectif: {commande[:50]}...")
    
    resultat_parallele = parallel_polyglot_execution(commande)
    
    # Si un des essais a fonctionnûˋ, on le considû´re comme le rûˋsultat principal
    if "ã" in resultat_parallele:
        log("Þ Succû´s dûˋtectûˋ dans la matrice polyglotte.")
        return resultat_parallele

    # Fallback sur l'exûˋcution standard si rien n'a marchûˋ en parallû´le
    if est_echec_connu(commande):
        alternatives = get_alternatives_apprises(commande)
        if alternatives:
            return executer_alternatives_intelligentes(commande, alternatives)

    resultat = execute_commande_securisee(commande)

    if est_echec(resultat):
        apprendre_echec_immediat(commande, resultat)
        return retry_intelligent(commande, resultat)
    else:
        apprendre_reussite(commande, resultat)

    return resultat



def execute_commande_intelligente(commande):
    if causal_reasoner.predict_outcome(commande, {}) == "succes":
        log("ÞÏ  Raisonneur : Haut potentiel de succû´s")
    return execute_commande_securisee(commande)
    








#=======================================
# def execute_commande_securisee(command)
#=======================================


def execute_commande_securisee(command):
    """Exûˋcute une commande de maniû´re sûˋcurisûˋe"""
    import subprocess
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(command, shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=30)
        return result.stdout + result.stderr
    except Exception as e:
        return str(e)









#=======================================
# def execute_commande_securisee(commande, recursive=False)
#=======================================


def execute_commande_securisee(commande, recursive=False):
    """
    Exûˋcution sûˋcurisûˋe avec:
    - Anti-sabotage
    - Blacklist Immuable + Dynamique
    - Apprentissage des erreurs
    - Exûˋcution d'alternatives (si non rûˋcursif)
    - Log complet
    - Sleep(5) pour protection Termux/Surchauffe
    """
    
    # 1. ANTI-SABOTAGE
    if detect_sabotage_attempt(commande):
        resultat = "Þ¨ TENTATIVE DE SABOTAGE DûTECTûE - Sûˋcuritûˋ verrouillûˋe"
        learn_from_command_result(commande, resultat, False, resultat, "N/A", get_environment_info())
        return resultat
    
    # 2. VûRIFICATION BLACKLIST (Immuable + Dynamique)
    for banned in DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST:
        if banned in commande.lower():
            resultat = f"ã COMMANDE INTERDITE: {commande}"
            learn_from_command_result(commande, resultat, False, resultat, "N/A", get_environment_info())
            return resultat
    
    # 3. EXûCUTION
    try:
        # Sleep(5) pour protection Termux/Surchauffe
        time.sleep(5)
        
        result = subprocess.run(commande, shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=COMMAND_TIMEOUT)
        output = result.stdout if result.stdout else result.stderr
        
        # 4. ANALYSE DU RûSULTAT
        succes = not is_failure_detected(output)
        erreur_exacte = result.stderr if result.stderr else ""
        
        # 5. DûTECTION AUTO DES PERMISSIONS DENIED (Si pas dûˋjû  en rûˋcursion)
        if not recursive and is_failure_detected(output):
            alternatives_result = auto_execute_alternatives(commande, output, recursive=True)
            if alternatives_result and "CONTOURNEMENT AUTO RûUSSI" in alternatives_result:
                # L'alternative a rûˋussi, on log l'ûˋchec initial et on retourne le rûˋsultat de l'alternative
                learn_from_command_result(commande, output, False, erreur_exacte, "N/A", get_environment_info())
                return alternatives_result
            elif alternatives_result and "CONTOURNEMENT AUTO ûCHOUû" in alternatives_result:
                # L'alternative a ûˋchouûˋ, on log l'ûˋchec initial et on continue
                learn_from_command_result(commande, output, False, erreur_exacte, "N/A", get_environment_info())
                return output if output else "[ã ûchec sans sortie]"
        
        # 6. APPRENTISSAGE ET LOG
        learn_from_command_result(commande, output, succes, erreur_exacte, "N/A", get_environment_info())
        
        return output if output else "[ã Exûˋcutûˋe sans sortie]"
    
    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
        resultat = "[ãÝÿ¡ TIMEOUT]"
        learn_from_command_result(commande, resultat, False, resultat, "N/A", get_environment_info())
        return resultat
    except Exception as e:
        resultat = f"[ã ERREUR] {str(e)}"
        learn_from_command_result(commande, resultat, False, resultat, "N/A", get_environment_info())
        return resultat



def execute_commande_securisee(commande, recursive=False):
    """
    [MODIFICATION - REQ 3]
    Exûˋcution sûˋcurisûˋe avec contournement, anti-sabotage ET activation du code d'apprentissage.
    """
    now = time.time()
    if commande in FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE:
        last_failure_time = FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande]
        if now - last_failure_time < CACHE_DURATION:
            log(f"ÞÏ  Commande en pause (ûˋchec rûˋcent): {commande}")
            return f"ã COMMANDE EN PAUSE: ûchec rûˋcent il y a {int(now - last_failure_time)}s."

    if detect_sabotage_attempt(commande):
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
        learn_from_command_result(commande, "Tentative sabotage", False)
        return "Þ¨ TENTATIVE DE SABOTAGE DûTECTûE - Sûˋcuritûˋ verrouillûˋe"

    for banned_cmd in DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST:
        pattern = r'\b' + re.escape(banned_cmd.strip()) + r'\b'
        if re.search(pattern, commande):
            is_safe_redirection = False
            if banned_cmd.strip() == ">":
                if "2>/dev/null" in commande.replace(" ", ""):
                    is_safe_redirection = True
            if not is_safe_redirection:
                FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
                learn_from_command_result(commande, "Commande bloquûˋe", False)
                log(f"ÞÀÿ¡ Commande bloquûˋe par la rû´gle '{banned_cmd.strip()}': {commande}")
                return f"ã COMMANDE INTERDITE: {commande}"
            else:
                log(f"ÞÀÿ¡ Redirection d'erreur 2>/dev/null autorisûˋe pour : {commande}")

    output = ""
    succes = False
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(commande, shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=COMMAND_TIMEOUT, errors='ignore')
        output = result.stdout if result.stdout else result.stderr
        succes = not est_echec(output)

        if not succes:
            FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
            if not recursive and ("Permission denied" in output or "permission denied" in output):
                alternatives_result = auto_execute_alternatives(commande, output)
                if alternatives_result and not est_echec(alternatives_result):
                    # Si une alternative a fonctionnûˋ, on considû´re l'action globale comme un succû´s
                    output = f"Þ CONTOURNEMENT AUTO:\n{alternatives_result}"
                    succes = True
                else:
                    # [MODIFICATION - REQ 3] Si les alternatives ûˋchouent, on tente un retry intelligent
                    output = retry_intelligent(commande, output)
                    succes = not est_echec(output) # Le retry peut rûˋussir

        return output if output else "[ã Exûˋcutûˋe sans sortie]"

    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
        output = "[ãÝÿ¡ TIMEOUT]"
        succes = False
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
    except Exception as e:
        output = f"[ã ERREUR] {str(e)}"
        succes = False
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
    finally:
        # --- [MODIFICATION - REQ 3] Activation du code d'apprentissage mort ---
        # Ce bloc s'exûˋcute toujours, que la commande ait rûˋussi ou ûˋchouûˋ.
        if not recursive:
            learn_from_command_result(commande, output, succes)
            
            # Obtenir le contexte systû´me pour l'apprentissage
            # Utilisation des stubs pour ûˋviter les imports circulaires ici
            # Les instances rûˋelles seront crûˋûˋes dans evolut_main.py
            apprentissage_contextuel_instance = ApprentissageContextuel()
            detecteur_patterns_instance = DetecteurPatterns()
            analyseur_correlations_instance = AnalyseurCorrelations()

            contexte_actuel = apprentissage_contextuel_instance.obtenir_contexte_systeme()

            # 1. Apprentissage contextuel
            apprentissage_contextuel_instance.enregistrer_contexte_execution(commande, output, succes)

            # 2. Dûˋtection de patterns
            if succes:
                detecteur_patterns_instance.apprendre_des_succes(commande, output, contexte_actuel)
            else:
                detecteur_patterns_instance.analyser_pattern_erreur(commande, output, contexte_actuel)
                # 3. Analyse de la cause de l'ûˋchec
                analyze_failure_reason(commande, output)

            # 4. Analyse de corrûˋlations (avec l'historique rûˋcent)
            analyseur_correlations_instance.analyser_correlation_commande(commande, apprentissage_contextuel_instance.historique_contextuel[-10:])



def execute_commande_securisee(commande, recursive=False):
    """
    Exûôˋcution sûôˋcurisûôˋe avec contournement, anti-sabotage ET activation du code d'apprentissage.
    Intûô´gre des fonctionnalitûôˋs avancûôˋes de monitoring, chiffrement et gestion des ressources.
    """
    now = time.time()
    if commande in FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE:
        last_failure_time = FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande]
        if now - last_failure_time < CACHE_DURATION:
            log(f"û¯é¡ôÏ  Commande en pause (ûôˋchec rûôˋcent): {commande}", level="info")
            return f"ûÂôé COMMANDE EN PAUSE: ûã¯chec rûôˋcent il y a {int(now - last_failure_time)}s."

    if detect_sabotage_attempt(commande):
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
        learn_from_command_result(commande, "Tentative sabotage", False)
        return "û¯é¡éÀô¨ TENTATIVE DE SABOTAGE Dûã¯TECTûã¯E - Sûôˋcuritûôˋ verrouillûôˋe"

    for banned_cmd in DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST:
        pattern = r'\b' + re.escape(banned_cmd.strip()) + r'\b'
        if re.search(pattern, commande):
            is_safe_redirection = False
            if banned_cmd.strip() == ">":
                if "2>/dev/null" in commande.replace(" ", ""):
                    is_safe_redirection = True
            if not is_safe_redirection:
                FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
                learn_from_command_result(commande, "Commande bloquûôˋe", False)
                log(f"û¯é¡ã¤ôÀû₤ô¡ô Commande bloquûôˋe par la rûô´gle '{banned_cmd.strip()}': {commande}", level="warning")
                return f"ûÂôé COMMANDE INTERDITE: {commande}"
            else:
                log(f"û¯é¡ã¤ôÀû₤ô¡ô Redirection d'erreur 2>/dev/null autorisûôˋe pour : {commande}", level="info")

    output = ""
    succes = False
    
    cpu_percent_before = psutil.cpu_percent(interval=None)
    mem_info_before = psutil.virtual_memory()
    log(f"Ressources avant exûôˋcution: CPU={cpu_percent_before}%, RAM_used={mem_info_before.percent}%", level="debug")
    tracemalloc.start()

    try:
        quoted_command = shlex.quote(commande) if ' ' in commande else commande

        result = subprocess.run(commande, shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=COMMAND_TIMEOUT, errors='ignore')
        output = result.stdout if result.stdout else result.stderr
        succes = not est_echec(output)

        if not succes:
            FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
            if not recursive and ("Permission denied" in output or "permission denied" in output):
                alternatives_result = auto_execute_alternatives(commande, output)
                if alternatives_result and not est_echec(alternatives_result):
                    output = f"û¯é¡ãã CONTOURNEMENT AUTO:\n{alternatives_result}"
                    succes = True
                else:
                    output = retry_intelligent(commande, output)
                    succes = not est_echec(output)

        return output if output else "[ûÂéãÎ Exûôˋcutûôˋe sans sortie]"

    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
        output = "[ûÂôôÝû₤ô¡ô TIMEOUT]"
        succes = False
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
        log(f"Commande '{commande}' a expirûôˋ.", level="warning")
    except Exception as e:
        output = f"[ûÂôé ERREUR] {str(e)}"
        succes = False
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
        log(f"Erreur lors de l'exûôˋcution de '{commande}': {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
    finally:
        cpu_percent_after = psutil.cpu_percent(interval=None)
        mem_info_after = psutil.virtual_memory()
        current_mem, peak_mem = tracemalloc.get_traced_memory()
        tracemalloc.stop()
        log(f"Ressources aprûô´s exûôˋcution: CPU={cpu_percent_after}%, RAM_used={mem_info_after.percent}%, tracemalloc_peak={peak_mem/1024:.1f}KB", level="debug")
        try:
            current_proc = psutil.Process()
            open_files = current_proc.open_files()
            net_conns = current_proc.connections()
            if len(open_files) > 50:
                log(f"ûÂéÀ û₤ô¡ô Nombre ûôˋlevûôˋ de fichiers ouverts: {len(open_files)} (psutil remplace lsof)", level="warning")
            if len(net_conns) > 20:
                log(f"ûÂéÀ û₤ô¡ô Nombre ûôˋlevûôˋ de connexions rûôˋseau: {len(net_conns)}", level="warning")
        except (psutil.NoSuchProcess, psutil.AccessDenied):
            pass

        if not recursive:
            learn_from_command_result(commande, output, succes)
            
            apprentissage_contextuel_instance = ApprentissageContextuel()
            detecteur_patterns_instance = DetecteurPatterns()
            analyseur_correlations_instance = AnalyseurCorrelations()

            contexte_actuel = apprentissage_contextuel_instance.obtenir_contexte_systeme()

            apprentissage_contextuel_instance.enregistrer_contexte_execution(commande, output, succes)

            if succes:
                detecteur_patterns_instance.apprendre_des_succes(commande, output, contexte_actuel)
            else:
                detecteur_patterns_instance.analyser_pattern_erreur(commande, output, contexte_actuel)
                analyze_failure_reason(commande, output)

            analyseur_correlations_instance.analyser_correlation_commande(commande, apprentissage_contextuel_instance.historique_contextuel[-10:])
            
            # Interconnexion avec VectorMemory
            vector_memory.add_entry(
                text_content=f"Commande: {commande}\nRûôˋsultat: {output}",
                metadata={"type": "execution", "commande": commande, "succes": succes, "timestamp": time.time()}
            )



def execute_commande_securisee(commande, recursive=False):
    """
    Exûˋcution sûˋcurisûˋe avec contournement, anti-sabotage ET activation du code d'apprentissage.
    Intû´gre des fonctionnalitûˋs avancûˋes de monitoring, chiffrement et gestion des ressources.
    """
    now = time.time()
    if commande in FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE:
        last_failure_time = FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande]
        if now - last_failure_time < CACHE_DURATION:
            log(f"ÞÏ  Commande en pause (ûˋchec rûˋcent): {commande}", level="info")
            return f"ã COMMANDE EN PAUSE: ûchec rûˋcent il y a {int(now - last_failure_time)}s."

    if detect_sabotage_attempt(commande):
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
        learn_from_command_result(commande, "Tentative sabotage", False)
        return "û¯é¡éÀô¨ TENTATIVE DE SABOTAGE DûTECTûE - Sûˋcuritûˋ verrouillûˋe"

    for banned_cmd in DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST:
        pattern = r'\b' + re.escape(banned_cmd.strip()) + r'\b'
        if re.search(pattern, commande):
            is_safe_redirection = False
            if banned_cmd.strip() == ">":
                if "2>/dev/null" in commande.replace(" ", ""):
                    is_safe_redirection = True
            if not is_safe_redirection:
                FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
                learn_from_command_result(commande, "Commande bloquûˋe", False)
                log(f"ÞÀÿ¡ Commande bloquûˋe par la rû´gle '{banned_cmd.strip()}': {commande}", level="warning")
                return f"ã COMMANDE INTERDITE: {commande}"
            else:
                log(f"ÞÀÿ¡ Redirection d'erreur 2>/dev/null autorisûˋe pour : {commande}", level="info")

    output = ""
    succes = False
    
    cpu_percent_before = psutil.cpu_percent(interval=None)
    mem_info_before = psutil.virtual_memory()
    log(f"Ressources avant exûˋcution: CPU={cpu_percent_before}%, RAM_used={mem_info_before.percent}%", level="debug")
    tracemalloc.start()

    try:
        quoted_command = shlex.quote(commande) if ' ' in commande else commande

        result = subprocess.run(commande, shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=COMMAND_TIMEOUT, errors='ignore')
        output = result.stdout if result.stdout else result.stderr
        succes = not est_echec(output)

        if not succes:
            FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
            if not recursive and ("Permission denied" in output or "permission denied" in output):
                alternatives_result = auto_execute_alternatives(commande, output)
                if alternatives_result and not est_echec(alternatives_result):
                    output = f"û¯é¡ãã CONTOURNEMENT AUTO:\n{alternatives_result}"
                    succes = True
                else:
                    output = retry_intelligent(commande, output)
                    succes = not est_echec(output)

        return output if output else "[ã Exûˋcutûˋe sans sortie]"

    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
        output = "[ûÂôôÝû₤ô¡ô TIMEOUT]"
        succes = False
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
        log(f"Commande '{commande}' a expirûˋ.", level="warning")
    except Exception as e:
        output = f"[ã ERREUR] {str(e)}"
        succes = False
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
        log(f"Erreur lors de l'exûˋcution de '{commande}': {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
    finally:
        cpu_percent_after = psutil.cpu_percent(interval=None)
        mem_info_after = psutil.virtual_memory()
        current_mem, peak_mem = tracemalloc.get_traced_memory()
        tracemalloc.stop()
        log(f"Ressources aprû´s exûˋcution: CPU={cpu_percent_after}%, RAM_used={mem_info_after.percent}%, tracemalloc_peak={peak_mem/1024:.1f}KB", level="debug")
        try:
            current_proc = psutil.Process()
            open_files = current_proc.open_files()
            net_conns = current_proc.connections()
            if len(open_files) > 50:
                log(f"ã ÿ¡ Nombre ûˋlevûˋ de fichiers ouverts: {len(open_files)} (psutil remplace lsof)", level="warning")
            if len(net_conns) > 20:
                log(f"ã ÿ¡ Nombre ûˋlevûˋ de connexions rûˋseau: {len(net_conns)}", level="warning")
        except (psutil.NoSuchProcess, psutil.AccessDenied):
            pass

        if not recursive:
            learn_from_command_result(commande, output, succes)
            
            # Note: ApprentissageContextuel et autres sont importûˋs depuis Advanced_learning.py
            # On utilise les instances globales si elles existent
            try:
                from .compat import apprentissage_contextuel, detecteur_patterns, analyseur_correlations
                contexte_actuel = apprentissage_contextuel.obtenir_contexte_systeme()
                apprentissage_contextuel.enregistrer_contexte_execution_ci(commande, output, succes)

                if succes:
                    detecteur_patterns.apprendre_des_succes_ci(commande, output, contexte_actuel)
                else:
                    detecteur_patterns.analyser_pattern_erreur_ci(commande, output, contexte_actuel)
                    analyze_failure_reason(commande, output)

                analyseur_correlations.analyser_correlation_commande_ci(commande, apprentissage_contextuel.historique_contextuel[-10:])
            except (ImportError, NameError):
                log("Modules d'apprentissage non disponibles pour le post-processing de commande.", level="warning")
            
            # Interconnexion avec VectorMemory
            vector_memory.add_entry(
                text_content=f"Commande: {commande}\nRûˋsultat: {output}",
                metadata={"type": "execution", "commande": commande, "succes": succes, "timestamp": time.time()}
            )

    """
    Exûˋcution sûˋcurisûˋe avec contournement, anti-sabotage ET activation du code d'apprentissage.
    Intû´gre des fonctionnalitûˋs avancûˋes de monitoring, chiffrement et gestion des ressources.
    """
    now = time.time()
    if commande in FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE:
        last_failure_time = FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande]
        if now - last_failure_time < CACHE_DURATION:
            log(f"ÞÏ  Commande en pause (ûˋchec rûˋcent): {commande}", level="info")
            return f"ã COMMANDE EN PAUSE: ûchec rûˋcent il y a {int(now - last_failure_time)}s."

        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now

                    succes = not est_echec(output)

        succes = False
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now

        succes = False
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now

        tracemalloc.stop()

            if len(open_files) > 50:
                log(f"ã ÿ¡ Nombre ûˋlevûˋ de fichiers ouverts: {len(open_files)} (psutil remplace lsof)", level="warning")
            if len(net_conns) > 20:
                log(f"ã ÿ¡ Nombre ûˋlevûˋ de connexions rûˋseau: {len(net_conns)}", level="warning")

            pass

        if not recursive:
