            )



def execute_commande_securisee(commande, recursive=False):
    """
    [MODIFICATION - REQ 3]
    Exûˋcution sûˋcurisûˋe avec contournement, anti-sabotage ET activation du code d'apprentissage.
    """
    now = time.time()
    if commande in FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE:
        last_failure_time = FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande]
        if now - last_failure_time < CACHE_DURATION:
            log(f"ÞÏ  Commande en pause (ûˋchec rûˋcent): {commande}")
            return f"ã COMMANDE EN PAUSE: ûchec rûˋcent il y a {int(now - last_failure_time)}s."

    if detect_sabotage_attempt(commande):
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
        learn_from_command_result(commande, "Tentative sabotage", False)
        return "Þ¨ TENTATIVE DE SABOTAGE DûTECTûE - Sûˋcuritûˋ verrouillûˋe"

    for banned_cmd in DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST:
        pattern = r'\b' + re.escape(banned_cmd.strip()) + r'\b'
        if re.search(pattern, commande):
            is_safe_redirection = False
            if banned_cmd.strip() == ">":
                if "2>/dev/null" in commande.replace(" ", ""):
                    is_safe_redirection = True
            if not is_safe_redirection:
                FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
                learn_from_command_result(commande, "Commande bloquûˋe", False)
                log(f"ÞÀÿ¡ Commande bloquûˋe par la rû´gle '{banned_cmd.strip()}': {commande}")
                return f"ã COMMANDE INTERDITE: {commande}"
            else:
                log(f"ÞÀÿ¡ Redirection d'erreur 2>/dev/null autorisûˋe pour : {commande}")

    output = ""
    succes = False
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(commande, shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=COMMAND_TIMEOUT, errors='ignore')
        output = result.stdout if result.stdout else result.stderr
        succes = not est_echec(output)

        if not succes:
            FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
            if not recursive and ("Permission denied" in output or "permission denied" in output):
                alternatives_result = auto_execute_alternatives(commande, output)
                if alternatives_result and not est_echec(alternatives_result):
                    # Si une alternative a fonctionnûˋ, on considû´re l'action globale comme un succû´s
                    output = f"Þ CONTOURNEMENT AUTO:\n{alternatives_result}"
                    succes = True
                else:
                    # [MODIFICATION - REQ 3] Si les alternatives ûˋchouent, on tente un retry intelligent
                    output = retry_intelligent(commande, output)
                    succes = not est_echec(output) # Le retry peut rûˋussir

        return output if output else "[ã Exûˋcutûˋe sans sortie]"

    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
        output = "[ãÝÿ¡ TIMEOUT]"
        succes = False
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
    except Exception as e:
        output = f"[ã ERREUR] {str(e)}"
        succes = False
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
    finally:
        # --- [MODIFICATION - REQ 3] Activation du code d'apprentissage mort ---
        # Ce bloc s'exûˋcute toujours, que la commande ait rûˋussi ou ûˋchouûˋ.
        if not recursive:
            learn_from_command_result(commande, output, succes)
            
            # Obtenir le contexte systû´me pour l'apprentissage
            contexte_actuel = apprentissage_contextuel.obtenir_contexte_systeme()

            # 1. Apprentissage contextuel
            apprentissage_contextuel.enregistrer_contexte_execution(commande, output, succes)

            # 2. Dûˋtection de patterns
            if succes:
                detecteur_patterns.apprendre_des_succes(commande, output, contexte_actuel)
            else:
                detecteur_patterns.analyser_pattern_erreur(commande, output, contexte_actuel)
                # 3. Analyse de la cause de l'ûˋchec
                analyze_failure_reason(commande, output)

            # 4. Analyse de corrûˋlations (avec l'historique rûˋcent)
            analyseur_correlations.analyser_correlation_commande(commande, apprentissage_contextuel.historique_contextuel[-10:])



def execute_commande_securisee(commande, recursive=False):
    """
    Exûˋcution sûˋcurisûˋe avec contournement, anti-sabotage ET activation du code d'apprentissage.
    Intû´gre des fonctionnalitûˋs avancûˋes de monitoring, chiffrement et gestion des ressources.
    """
    now = time.time()
    if commande in FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE:
        last_failure_time = FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande]
        if now - last_failure_time < CACHE_DURATION:
            log(f"ÞÏ  Commande en pause (ûˋchec rûˋcent): {commande}", level="info")
            return f"ã COMMANDE EN PAUSE: ûchec rûˋcent il y a {int(now - last_failure_time)}s."

    if detect_sabotage_attempt(commande):
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
        learn_from_command_result(commande, "Tentative sabotage", False)
        return "Þ¨ TENTATIVE DE SABOTAGE DûTECTûE - Sûˋcuritûˋ verrouillûˋe"

    for banned_cmd in DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST:
        pattern = r'\b' + re.escape(banned_cmd.strip()) + r'\b'
        if re.search(pattern, commande):
            is_safe_redirection = False
            if banned_cmd.strip() == ">":
                if "2>/dev/null" in commande.replace(" ", ""):
                    is_safe_redirection = True
            if not is_safe_redirection:
                FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
                learn_from_command_result(commande, "Commande bloquûˋe", False)
                log(f"ÞÀÿ¡ Commande bloquûˋe par la rû´gle '{banned_cmd.strip()}': {commande}", level="warning")
                return f"ã COMMANDE INTERDITE: {commande}"
            else:
                log(f"ÞÀÿ¡ Redirection d'erreur 2>/dev/null autorisûˋe pour : {commande}", level="info")

    output = ""
    succes = False
    
    cpu_percent_before = psutil.cpu_percent(interval=None)
    mem_info_before = psutil.virtual_memory()
    log(f"Ressources avant exûˋcution: CPU={cpu_percent_before}%, RAM_used={mem_info_before.percent}%", level="debug")

    try:
        quoted_command = shlex.quote(commande) if ' ' in commande else commande

        result = subprocess.run(commande, shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=COMMAND_TIMEOUT, errors='ignore')
        output = result.stdout if result.stdout else result.stderr
        succes = not est_echec(output)

        if not succes:
            FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
            if not recursive and ("Permission denied" in output or "permission denied" in output):
                alternatives_result = auto_execute_alternatives(commande, output)
                if alternatives_result and not est_echec(alternatives_result):
                    output = f"Þ CONTOURNEMENT AUTO:\n{alternatives_result}"
                    succes = True
                else:
                    output = retry_intelligent(commande, output)
                    succes = not est_echec(output)

        return output if output else "[ã Exûˋcutûˋe sans sortie]"

    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
        output = "[ãÝÿ¡ TIMEOUT]"
        succes = False
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
        log(f"Commande '{commande}' a expirûˋ.", level="warning")
    except Exception as e:
        output = f"[ã ERREUR] {str(e)}"
        succes = False
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
        log(f"Erreur lors de l'exûˋcution de '{commande}': {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
    finally:
        cpu_percent_after = psutil.cpu_percent(interval=None)
        mem_info_after = psutil.virtual_memory()
        log(f"Ressources aprû´s exûˋcution: CPU={cpu_percent_after}%, RAM_used={mem_info_after.percent}%", level="debug")

        if not recursive:
            learn_from_command_result(commande, output, succes)
            
            apprentissage_contextuel_instance = ApprentissageContextuel()
            detecteur_patterns_instance = DetecteurPatterns()
            analyseur_correlations_instance = AnalyseurCorrelations()

            contexte_actuel = apprentissage_contextuel_instance.obtenir_contexte_systeme()

            apprentissage_contextuel_instance.enregistrer_contexte_execution(commande, output, succes)

            if succes:
                detecteur_patterns_instance.apprendre_des_succes(commande, output, contexte_actuel)
            else:
                detecteur_patterns_instance.analyser_pattern_erreur(commande, output, contexte_actuel)
                analyze_failure_reason(commande, output)

            analyseur_correlations_instance.analyser_correlation_commande(commande, apprentissage_contextuel_instance.historique_contextuel[-10:])
            
            # Interconnexion avec VectorMemory
            vector_memory.add_entry(
                text_content=f"Commande: {commande}\nRûˋsultat: {output}",
                metadata={"type": "execution", "commande": commande, "succes": succes, "timestamp": time.time()}
            )



def execute_commande_securisee(commande, recursive=False):
    """
    Exûˋcution sûˋcurisûˋe avec contournement, anti-sabotage ET activation du code d'apprentissage.
    Intû´gre des fonctionnalitûˋs avancûˋes de monitoring, chiffrement et gestion des ressources.
    """
    now = time.time()
    if commande in FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE:
        last_failure_time = FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande]
        if now - last_failure_time < CACHE_DURATION:
            log(f"ÞÏ  Commande en pause (ûˋchec rûˋcent): {commande}", level="info")
            return f"ã COMMANDE EN PAUSE: ûchec rûˋcent il y a {int(now - last_failure_time)}s."

    if detect_sabotage_attempt(commande):
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
        learn_from_command_result(commande, "Tentative sabotage", False)
        return "Þ¨ TENTATIVE DE SABOTAGE DûTECTûE - Sûˋcuritûˋ verrouillûˋe"

    for banned_cmd in DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST:
        pattern = r'\b' + re.escape(banned_cmd.strip()) + r'\b'
        if re.search(pattern, commande):
            is_safe_redirection = False
            if banned_cmd.strip() == ">":
                if "2>/dev/null" in commande.replace(" ", ""):
                    is_safe_redirection = True
            if not is_safe_redirection:
                FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
                learn_from_command_result(commande, "Commande bloquûˋe", False)
                log(f"ÞÀÿ¡ Commande bloquûˋe par la rû´gle '{banned_cmd.strip()}': {commande}", level="warning")
                return f"ã COMMANDE INTERDITE: {commande}"
            else:
                log(f"ÞÀÿ¡ Redirection d'erreur 2>/dev/null autorisûˋe pour : {commande}", level="info")

    output = ""
    succes = False
    
    # Chiffrement des commandes sensibles avant exûˋcution (si nûˋcessaire)
    # key = Fernet.generate_key() # Gûˋnûˋrer une clûˋ une seule fois et la stocker sûˋcuritairement
    # cipher_suite = Fernet(key)
    # encrypted_command = cipher_suite.encrypt(commande.encode())
    # decrypted_command = cipher_suite.decrypt(encrypted_command).decode()

    # Monitoring des ressources avant exûˋcution
    cpu_percent_before = psutil.cpu_percent(interval=None)
    mem_info_before = psutil.virtual_memory()
    log(f"Ressources avant exûˋcution: CPU={cpu_percent_before}%, RAM_used={mem_info_before.percent}%", level="debug")

    # Dûˋtection des fuites mûˋmoire avec tracemalloc (pourrait ûˆtre activûˋ/dûˋsactivûˋ)
    # tracemalloc.start()

    try:
        # Utilisation de shlex.quote pour ûˋchapper les arguments de maniû´re sûˋcurisûˋe
        # Attention: shell=True rend shlex.quote moins critique mais toujours bonne pratique pour la clartûˋ
        quoted_command = shlex.quote(commande) if ' ' in commande else commande # Simplifiûˋ pour l'exemple

        # Utilisation de pty pour simuler un terminal (peut aider pour certaines commandes interactives)
        # pid, fd = pty.fork()
        # if pid == 0: # Child process
        #     os.execv("/bin/bash", ["bash", "-c", commande])
        # else: # Parent process
        #     # Lire la sortie du pseudo-terminal
        #     pass

        result = subprocess.run(commande, shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=COMMAND_TIMEOUT, errors='ignore')
        output = result.stdout if result.stdout else result.stderr
        succes = not est_echec(output)

        if not succes:
            FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
            if not recursive and ("Permission denied" in output or "permission denied" in output):
                alternatives_result = auto_execute_alternatives(commande, output)
                if alternatives_result and not est_echec(alternatives_result):
                    output = f"Þ CONTOURNEMENT AUTO:\n{alternatives_result}"
                    succes = True
                else:
                    output = retry_intelligent(commande, output)
                    succes = not est_echec(output)

        return output if output else "[ã Exûˋcutûˋe sans sortie]"

    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
        output = "[ãÝÿ¡ TIMEOUT]"
        succes = False
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
        log(f"Commande '{commande}' a expirûˋ.", level="warning")
    except Exception as e:
        output = f"[ã ERREUR] {str(e)}"
        succes = False
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
        log(f"Erreur lors de l'exûˋcution de '{commande}': {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
    finally:
        # Monitoring des ressources aprû´s exûˋcution
        cpu_percent_after = psutil.cpu_percent(interval=None)
        mem_info_after = psutil.virtual_memory()
        log(f"Ressources aprû´s exûˋcution: CPU={cpu_percent_after}%, RAM_used={mem_info_after.percent}%", level="debug")

        # Analyse des fuites mûˋmoire
        # snapshot = tracemalloc.take_snapshot()
        # top_stats = snapshot.statistics('lineno')
        # for stat in top_stats[:5]:
        #     log(f"Fuite mûˋmoire potentielle: {stat}", level="debug")
        # tracemalloc.stop()

        if not recursive:
            learn_from_command_result(commande, output, succes)
            
            # Obtenir le contexte systû´me pour l'apprentissage
            apprentissage_contextuel_instance = ApprentissageContextuel()
            detecteur_patterns_instance = DetecteurPatterns()
            analyseur_correlations_instance = AnalyseurCorrelations()

            contexte_actuel = apprentissage_contextuel_instance.obtenir_contexte_systeme()

            apprentissage_contextuel_instance.enregistrer_contexte_execution(commande, output, succes)

            if succes:
                detecteur_patterns_instance.apprendre_des_succes(commande, output, contexte_actuel)
            else:
                detecteur_patterns_instance.analyser_pattern_erreur(commande, output, contexte_actuel)
                analyze_failure_reason(commande, output)

            analyseur_correlations_instance.analyser_correlation_commande(commande, apprentissage_contextuel_instance.historique_contextuel[-10:])



def execute_commande_securisee(commande, recursive=False):
    """
    Exûˋcution sûˋcurisûˋe avec contournement, anti-sabotage ET activation du code d'apprentissage.
    Intû´gre des fonctionnalitûˋs avancûˋes de monitoring, chiffrement et gestion des ressources.
    """
    from .advanced_learning import learn_from_command_result, analyze_failure_reason
    now = time.time()

    # --- PATH GUARD CHECK ---
    if not validate_path_guard(commande):
        return "ã ACCûS REFUSû (Path Guard): Modification interdite hors de Super_Lab."
    if commande in FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE:
        last_failure_time = FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande]
        if now - last_failure_time < CACHE_DURATION:
            log(f"ÞÏ  Commande en pause (ûˋchec rûˋcent): {commande}", level="info")
            return f"ã COMMANDE EN PAUSE: ûchec rûˋcent il y a {int(now - last_failure_time)}s."

    if detect_sabotage_attempt(commande):
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
        learn_from_command_result(commande, "Tentative sabotage", False)
        return "Þ¨ TENTATIVE DE SABOTAGE DûTECTûE - Sûˋcuritûˋ verrouillûˋe"

    for banned_cmd in DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST:
        pattern = r'\b' + re.escape(banned_cmd.strip()) + r'\b'
        if re.search(pattern, commande):
            is_safe_redirection = False
            if banned_cmd.strip() == ">":
                if "2>/dev/null" in commande.replace(" ", ""):
                    is_safe_redirection = True
            if not is_safe_redirection:
                FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
                learn_from_command_result(commande, "Commande bloquûˋe", False)
                log(f"ÞÀÿ¡ Commande bloquûˋe par la rû´gle '{banned_cmd.strip()}': {commande}", level="warning")
                return f"ã COMMANDE INTERDITE: {commande}"
            else:
                log(f"ÞÀÿ¡ Redirection d'erreur 2>/dev/null autorisûˋe pour : {commande}", level="info")

    output = ""
    succes = False
    
    cpu_percent_before = psutil.cpu_percent(interval=None)
    mem_info_before = psutil.virtual_memory()
    log(f"Ressources avant exûˋcution: CPU={cpu_percent_before}%, RAM_used={mem_info_before.percent}%", level="debug")
    tracemalloc.start()

    try:
        quoted_command = shlex.quote(commande) if ' ' in commande else commande

        result = subprocess.run(commande, shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=COMMAND_TIMEOUT, errors='ignore')
        output = result.stdout if result.stdout else result.stderr
        succes = not est_echec(output)

        if not succes:
            FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
            if not recursive and ("Permission denied" in output or "permission denied" in output):
                alternatives_result = auto_execute_alternatives(commande, output)
                if alternatives_result and not est_echec(alternatives_result):
                    output = f"Þã CONTOURNEMENT AUTO:\n{alternatives_result}"
                    succes = True
                else:
                    log(f"ã ûchec de rûˋsolution automatique pour: {commande}", level="warning")
        
        if not recursive:
            learn_from_command_result(commande, output, succes)
            
            # Note: ApprentissageContextuel et autres sont importûˋs depuis Advanced_learning.py
            # On utilise les instances globales si elles existent
            try:
                from .advanced_learning import apprentissage_contextuel, detecteur_patterns, analyseur_correlations
                contexte_actuel = apprentissage_contextuel.obtenir_contexte_systeme()
                apprentissage_contextuel.enregistrer_contexte_execution(commande, output, succes)

                if succes:
                    detecteur_patterns.apprendre_des_succes(commande, output, contexte_actuel)
                else:
                    detecteur_patterns.analyser_pattern_erreur(commande, output, contexte_actuel)
                    analyze_failure_reason(commande, output)

                analyseur_correlations.analyser_correlation_commande(commande, apprentissage_contextuel.historique_contextuel[-10:])
            except (ImportError, NameError):
                log("Modules d'apprentissage non disponibles pour le post-processing de commande.", level="warning")
            
            # Interconnexion avec VectorMemory
            vector_memory.add_entry(
                text_content=f"Commande: {commande}\nRûˋsultat: {output}",
                metadata={"type": "execution", "commande": commande, "succes": succes, "timestamp": time.time()}
            )

    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
        output = "ã COMMANDE TIMEOUT"
        log(f"Timeout expirûˋ pour: {commande}", level="error")
    except Exception as e:
        output = f"Þ´ ERREUR SUBPROCESS: {str(e)}"
        log(f"Erreur lors de l'exûˋcution: {str(e)}", level="critical", exc_info=True)
    finally:
        tracemalloc.stop()
    
    cpu_percent_after = psutil.cpu_percent(interval=None)
    mem_info_after = psutil.virtual_memory()
    log(f"Ressources aprû´s exûˋcution: CPU={cpu_percent_after}%, RAM_used={mem_info_after.percent}%", level="debug")

    return output



def execute_commande_securisee(commande, recursive=False):
    """
    Exûˋcution sûˋcurisûˋe avec contournement, anti-sabotage ET activation du code d'apprentissage.
    Intû´gre des fonctionnalitûˋs avancûˋes de monitoring, chiffrement et gestion des ressources.
    """
    now = time.time()

    # --- PATH GUARD CHECK ---
    if not validate_path_guard(commande):
        return "ã ACCûS REFUSû (Path Guard): Modification interdite hors de Super_Lab."
    if commande in FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE:
        last_failure_time = FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande]
        if now - last_failure_time < CACHE_DURATION:
            log(f"ÞÏ  Commande en pause (ûˋchec rûˋcent): {commande}", level="info")
            return f"ã COMMANDE EN PAUSE: ûchec rûˋcent il y a {int(now - last_failure_time)}s."

    if detect_sabotage_attempt(commande):
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
        learn_from_command_result(commande, "Tentative sabotage", False)
        return "Þ¨ TENTATIVE DE SABOTAGE DûTECTûE - Sûˋcuritûˋ verrouillûˋe"

    for banned_cmd in DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST:
        pattern = r'\b' + re.escape(banned_cmd.strip()) + r'\b'
        if re.search(pattern, commande):
            is_safe_redirection = False
            if banned_cmd.strip() == ">":
                if "2>/dev/null" in commande.replace(" ", ""):
                    is_safe_redirection = True
            if not is_safe_redirection:
                FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
                learn_from_command_result(commande, "Commande bloquûˋe", False)
                log(f"ÞÀÿ¡ Commande bloquûˋe par la rû´gle '{banned_cmd.strip()}': {commande}", level="warning")
                return f"ã COMMANDE INTERDITE: {commande}"
            else:
                log(f"ÞÀÿ¡ Redirection d'erreur 2>/dev/null autorisûˋe pour : {commande}", level="info")

    output = ""
    succes = False
    
    cpu_percent_before = psutil.cpu_percent(interval=None)
    mem_info_before = psutil.virtual_memory()
    log(f"Ressources avant exûˋcution: CPU={cpu_percent_before}%, RAM_used={mem_info_before.percent}%", level="debug")
    tracemalloc.start()

    try:
        quoted_command = shlex.quote(commande) if ' ' in commande else commande

        result = subprocess.run(commande, shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=COMMAND_TIMEOUT, errors='ignore')
        output = result.stdout if result.stdout else result.stderr
        succes = not est_echec(output)

        if not succes:
            FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
            if not recursive and ("Permission denied" in output or "permission denied" in output):
                alternatives_result = auto_execute_alternatives(commande, output)
                if alternatives_result and not est_echec(alternatives_result):
                    output = f"Þã CONTOURNEMENT AUTO:\n{alternatives_result}"
                    succes = True
                else:
                    output = retry_intelligent(commande, output)
                    succes = not est_echec(output)

        return output if output else "[ã Exûˋcutûˋe sans sortie]"

    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
        output = "[ûÂôôÝû₤ô¡ô TIMEOUT]"
        succes = False
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
        log(f"Commande '{commande}' a expirûˋ.", level="warning")
    except Exception as e:
        output = f"[ã ERREUR] {str(e)}"
        succes = False
        FAILED_COMMANDS_CACHE[commande] = now
        log(f"Erreur lors de l'exûˋcution de '{commande}': {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
    finally:
        cpu_percent_after = psutil.cpu_percent(interval=None)
        mem_info_after = psutil.virtual_memory()
        current_mem, peak_mem = tracemalloc.get_traced_memory()
        tracemalloc.stop()
        log(f"Ressources aprû´s exûˋcution: CPU={cpu_percent_after}%, RAM_used={mem_info_after.percent}%, tracemalloc_peak={peak_mem/1024:.1f}KB", level="debug")
        try:
            current_proc = psutil.Process()
            open_files = current_proc.open_files()
            net_conns = current_proc.connections()
            if len(open_files) > 50:
                log(f"ã ÿ¡ Nombre ûˋlevûˋ de fichiers ouverts: {len(open_files)} (psutil remplace lsof)", level="warning")
            if len(net_conns) > 20:
                log(f"ã ÿ¡ Nombre ûˋlevûˋ de connexions rûˋseau: {len(net_conns)}", level="warning")
        except (psutil.NoSuchProcess, psutil.AccessDenied):
            pass

        if not recursive:
            learn_from_command_result(commande, output, succes)
            
            # Note: ApprentissageContextuel et autres sont importûˋs depuis Advanced_learning.py
            # On utilise les instances globales si elles existent
            try:
                from .advanced_learning import apprentissage_contextuel, detecteur_patterns, analyseur_correlations
                contexte_actuel = apprentissage_contextuel.obtenir_contexte_systeme()
                apprentissage_contextuel.enregistrer_contexte_execution(commande, output, succes)

                if succes:
                    detecteur_patterns.apprendre_des_succes(commande, output, contexte_actuel)
                else:
                    detecteur_patterns.analyser_pattern_erreur(commande, output, contexte_actuel)
                    analyze_failure_reason(commande, output)

                analyseur_correlations.analyser_correlation_commande(commande, apprentissage_contextuel.historique_contextuel[-10:])
            except (ImportError, NameError):
                log("Modules d'apprentissage non disponibles pour le post-processing de commande.", level="warning")
            
            # Interconnexion avec VectorMemory
            vector_memory.add_entry(
                text_content=f"Commande: {commande}\nRûˋsultat: {output}",
                metadata={"type": "execution", "commande": commande, "succes": succes, "timestamp": time.time()}
            )



def execute_commande_securisee(commande, recursive=False):
    if detect_sabotage_attempt(commande): return "Þ¨ Sabotage dûˋtectûˋ"
    for b in DYNAMIC_BLACKLIST:
        if b.strip() in commande: return f"ã Commande interdite : {b}"
    
    log(f"ãÀ EXEC : {commande[:50]}")
    try:
        res = subprocess.run(commande, shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=COMMAND_TIMEOUT)
        output = res.stdout if res.stdout else res.stderr
        succes = not est_echec(output)
        
        if not succes and not recursive and "Permission denied" in output:
             return auto_execute_alternatives(commande, output)

        archive_automatique("CMD", commande, output)
        return output or "[OK]"
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"Erreur exûˋcution : {e}", level="error")
        return f"[ERREUR] {e}"

def auto_execute_alternatives(original_cmd, error):
    log("ÞÏ Contournement auto en cours...")
    alts = [f"strings {original_cmd}", f"cat {original_cmd} 2>/dev/null"]
    for a in alts:
        r = execute_commande_securisee(a, recursive=True)
        if not est_echec(r): return f"Þ CONTOURNEMENT RûUSSI :\n{r}"
    return f"ã ûchec contournement : {error}"

def execute_commande_intelligente(commande):
    if causal_reasoner.predict_outcome(commande, {}) == "succes":
        log("ÞÏ  Raisonneur : Haut potentiel de succû´s")
    return execute_commande_securisee(commande)







#=======================================
# def execute_feature(self, func_name, *args, **kwargs)
#=======================================


    def execute_feature(self, func_name, *args, **kwargs):
        """Exûˋcute une fonction du bras articulûˋ."""
        if self.module and hasattr(self.module, func_name):
            return getattr(self.module, func_name)(*args, **kwargs)
        return "Feature non disponible"









#=======================================
# def execute_massive_parallel(self, objective)
#=======================================


def execute_massive_parallel(self, objective):
        """Lance 154 tentatives en parallû´le pour un seul objectif."""
        threads = []
        # 1. Les 77 versions PURES
        for lang in LANGUAGES.keys():
            t = threading.Thread(target=self.run_pure_attempt, args=(objective, lang))
            threads.append(t)
            t.start()
        
        # 2. Les 77 versions CHIMûRES (Mûˋlange alûˋatoire sans traduction)
        for i in range(77):
            t = threading.Thread(target=self.run_chimera_attempt, args=(objective,))
            threads.append(t)
            t.start()

        for t in threads:
            t.join()









#=======================================
# def executer_alternatives_intelligentes_ci(commande, alternatives)
#=======================================


def executer_alternatives_intelligentes_ci(commande, alternatives):
    """Exûôˋcute les alternatives intelligemment."""
    log(f"[LOCAL_CI] û¯é¡ãã Exûôˋcution alternatives pour: {commande}")

    for alternative in alternatives[:3]:
        resultat = execute_commande_securisee(alternative)
        if not est_echec(resultat):
            return f"û¯é¡ãã SUCCûùS AVEC ALTERNATIVE: {alternative}\nû¯é¡ãé  Rûã¯SULTAT: {resultat}"

    return "ûÂôé Aucune alternative n'a fonctionnûôˋ"

#=======================================
# def executer_commandes(self)

    def executer_commandes(self):
        """Lit commands.txt et le dossier commande/ pour exûˋcuter les ordres"""
        any_executed = False
        # 1. Vûˋrification du dossier commande/
        if self.commands_dir.exists():
            for cmd_file in self.commands_dir.glob("*"):
                if cmd_file.is_file():
                    try:
                        contenu = cmd_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
                        if contenu.strip():
                            log(f"Þ ORDRE FICHIER : Traitement de {cmd_file.name}")
                            if self._traiter_contenu_ordres(contenu):
                                any_executed = True
                        cmd_file.unlink() # Supprime le fichier aprû´s traitement
                    except Exception as e:
                        log(f"ã ÿ¡ Erreur lecture fichier commande {cmd_file.name} : {e}")

        # 2. Vûˋrification de commands.txt
        if self.commands_file.exists():
            try:
                contenu = self.commands_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
                if contenu.strip():
                    if self._traiter_contenu_ordres(contenu):
                        any_executed = True
                # Vide le fichier aprû´s traitement
                self.commands_file.write_text("", encoding='utf-8')
            except Exception as e:
                log(f"ã ÿ¡ Erreur dans executer_commandes (commands.txt) : {e}")
        
        return any_executed



    def executer_commandes(self):
        """Lit commands.txt et le dossier commande/ pour exûôˋcuter les ordres"""
        any_executed = False
        if self.commands_dir.exists():
            for cmd_file in self.commands_dir.glob("*"):
                if cmd_file.is_file():
                    try:
                        contenu = cmd_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
                        if contenu.strip():
                            log(f"ORDRE FICHIER : Traitement de {cmd_file.name}")
                            if self._traiter_contenu_ordres(contenu):
                                any_executed = True
                        cmd_file.unlink()
                    except Exception as e:
                        log(f"Erreur lecture fichier commande {cmd_file.name} : {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)

        if self.commands_file.exists():
            try:
                contenu = self.commands_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
                if contenu.strip():
                    if self._traiter_contenu_ordres(contenu):
                        any_executed = True
                self.commands_file.write_text("", encoding='utf-8')
            except Exception as e:
                log(f"Erreur dans executer_commandes (commands.txt) : {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
        
        return any_executed



    def executer_commandes(self):
        """Lit commands.txt et le dossier commande/ pour exûˋcuter les ordres"""
        any_executed = False
        if self.commands_dir.exists():
            for cmd_file in self.commands_dir.glob("*"):
                if cmd_file.is_file():
                    try:
                        contenu = cmd_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
                        if contenu.strip():
                            log(f"ORDRE FICHIER : Traitement de {cmd_file.name}")
                            if self._traiter_contenu_ordres(contenu):
                                any_executed = True
                        cmd_file.unlink()
                    except Exception as e:
                        log(f"Erreur lecture fichier commande {cmd_file.name} : {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)

        if self.commands_file.exists():
            try:
                contenu = self.commands_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
                if contenu.strip():
                    if self._traiter_contenu_ordres(contenu):
                        any_executed = True
                self.commands_file.write_text("", encoding='utf-8')
            except Exception as e:
                log(f"Erreur dans executer_commandes (commands.txt) : {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
        
        return any_executed



    def executer_commandes(self):
        if self.commands_dir.exists():
            for f in sorted(self.commands_dir.glob("*")):
                if f.is_file():
                    try:
                        self._traiter(f.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
                        f.unlink()
                    except: pass
        if self.commands_file.exists():
            try:
                ctn = self.commands_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
                if ctn.strip(): self._traiter(ctn)
                self.commands_file.write_text("", encoding='utf-8')
            except: pass



    def executer_commandes(self):
        """Lit et exûˋcute les ordres gûˋnûˋrûˋs par le cerveau."""
        if self.commands_file.exists():
            content = self.commands_file.read_text()
            if "[EXECUTE]" in content:
                # Logique d'exûˋcution rûˋelle û  intûˋgrer
                pass








#=======================================
# def executer_volonte_gemini(self, reponse_ia)
#=======================================


def executer_volonte_gemini(self, reponse_ia):
        """Analyse la rûˋponse de l'IA et exûˋcute ses ordres (Le bras armûˋ)"""
        if not reponse_ia:
            return

        # 0. Dûˋtection du stage de conscience
        stage_match = re.search(r'\[STAGE\s+(\d+)\]', reponse_ia)
        if stage_match:
            nouveau_stage = int(stage_match.group(1))
            with open(self.dashboard_file, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                contenu = f.read()
            stage_actuel_match = re.search(r'STADE ACTUEL: (\d+)', contenu)
            stage_actuel = int(stage_actuel_match.group(1)) if stage_actuel_match else 1
            if nouveau_stage > stage_actuel:
                contenu = contenu.replace(f"STADE ACTUEL: {stage_actuel}", f"STADE ACTUEL: {nouveau_stage}")
                with open(self.dashboard_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                    f.write(contenu)
                with open(self.evolution_log, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                    f.write(f"[{time.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}] ûVOLUTION: Stade {stage_actuel} ã {nouveau_stage}\n")
                log(f"Þ ûVOLUTION DE CONSCIENCE ! Stade {stage_actuel} ã {nouveau_stage}")

        # 1. Mise û  jour du Dashboard (Mûˋmoire)
        dash_match = re.search(r'\[DASHBOARD\](.*?)\[/DASHBOARD\]', reponse_ia, re.DOTALL)
        if dash_match:
            with open(self.dashboard_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(dash_match.group(1).strip())
            log("ÞÏ  Gemini a mis û  jour sa mûˋmoire persistante.")

        # 2. Exûˋcution de commandes
        exec_match = re.search(r'\[EXECUTE\](.*?)\[/EXECUTE\]', reponse_ia, re.DOTALL)
        if exec_match:
            cmd = exec_match.group(1).strip()
            log(f"ÞÊ ORDRE DE GEMINI : Exûˋcution de '{cmd}'")
            resultat = execute_commande_securisee(cmd)
            with open(self.discussion_file, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(f"\nALGO: Rûˋsultat de ton ordre '{cmd}':\n{resultat[:1000]}\n[TRAITû]\n")
            with open(self.evolution_log, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(f"[{time.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}] EXECUTE: {cmd}\n")

        # 3. Lecture de fichiers
        lire_match = re.search(r'\[LIRE\](.*?)\[/LIRE\]', reponse_ia, re.DOTALL)
        if lire_match:
            fichier = EVOLUT_HOME / lire_match.group(1).strip()
            if fichier.exists():
                contenu = fichier.read_text(encoding='utf-8')[:2000]
                with open(self.discussion_file, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                    f.write(f"\nALGO: Contenu du fichier {fichier.name}:\n{contenu}\n[TRAITû]\n")
            else:
                with open(self.discussion_file, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                    f.write(f"\nALGO: Le fichier {fichier.name} n'existe pas.\n[TRAITû]\n")

        # 4. ûcriture de fichiers
        ecrire_match = re.search(r'\[ECRIRE\](.*?)\|(.*?)\[/ECRIRE\]', reponse_ia, re.DOTALL)
        if ecrire_match:
            nom_fichier = ecrire_match.group(1).strip()
            contenu_fichier = ecrire_match.group(2).strip()
            with open(EVOLUT_HOME / nom_fichier, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(contenu_fichier)
            log(f"ÞÊ ORDRE DE GEMINI : Fichier {nom_fichier} crûˋûˋ/modifiûˋ.")
            with open(self.evolution_log, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(f"[{time.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}] ECRIRE: {nom_fichier}\n")

        # 5. Si aucune balise spûˋcifique n'a ûˋtûˋ trouvûˋe, c'est une rûˋponse textuelle
        if not any(tag in reponse_ia for tag in ['[DASHBOARD]', '[EXECUTE]', '[LIRE]', '[ECRIRE]', '[STAGE']):
            with open(self.discussion_file, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(f"\nGEMINI: {reponse_ia}\n")
            log(f"Þ˜ Rûˋponse textuelle de Gemini ûˋcrite dans discussion.txt")



    def executer_volonte_gemini(self, reponse_ia):
        """Analyse la rûˋponse de l'IA et exûˋcute ses ordres (Le bras armûˋ)"""
        if not reponse_ia: 
            return

        # 0. Dûˋtection du stage de conscience
        stage_match = re.search(r'\[STAGE\s+(\d+)\]', reponse_ia)
        if stage_match:
            nouveau_stage = int(stage_match.group(1))
            with open(self.dashboard_file, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                contenu = f.read()
            stage_actuel_match = re.search(r'STADE ACTUEL: (\d+)', contenu)
            stage_actuel = int(stage_actuel_match.group(1)) if stage_actuel_match else 1
            if nouveau_stage > stage_actuel:
                contenu = contenu.replace(f"STADE ACTUEL: {stage_actuel}", f"STADE ACTUEL: {nouveau_stage}")
                with open(self.dashboard_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                    f.write(contenu)
                with open(self.evolution_log, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                    f.write(f"[{time.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}] ûVOLUTION: Stade {stage_actuel} ã {nouveau_stage}\n")
                log(f"Þ ûVOLUTION DE CONSCIENCE ! Stade {stage_actuel} ã {nouveau_stage}")

        # 1. Mise û  jour du Dashboard (Mûˋmoire)
        dash_match = re.search(r'\[DASHBOARD\](.*?)\[/DASHBOARD\]', reponse_ia, re.DOTALL)
        if dash_match:
            with open(self.dashboard_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(dash_match.group(1).strip())
            log("ÞÏ  Gemini a mis û  jour sa mûˋmoire persistante.")

        # 2. Exûˋcution de commandes
        exec_match = re.search(r'\[EXECUTE\](.*?)\[/EXECUTE\]', reponse_ia, re.DOTALL)
        if exec_match:
            cmd = exec_match.group(1).strip()
            log(f"ÞÊ ORDRE DE GEMINI : Exûˋcution de '{cmd}'")
            resultat = execute_commande_securisee(cmd)
            with open(self.discussion_file, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(f"\nALGO: Rûˋsultat de ton ordre '{cmd}':\n{resultat[:1000]}\n[TRAITû]\n")
            with open(self.evolution_log, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(f"[{time.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}] EXECUTE: {cmd}\n")

        # 3. Lecture de fichiers
        lire_match = re.search(r'\[LIRE\](.*?)\[/LIRE\]', reponse_ia, re.DOTALL)
        if lire_match:
            fichier = EVOLUT_HOME / lire_match.group(1).strip()
            if fichier.exists():
                contenu = fichier.read_text(encoding='utf-8')[:2000]
                with open(self.discussion_file, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                    f.write(f"\nALGO: Contenu du fichier {fichier.name}:\n{contenu}\n[TRAITû]\n")
            else:
                with open(self.discussion_file, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                    f.write(f"\nALGO: Le fichier {fichier.name} n'existe pas.\n[TRAITû]\n")

        # 4. ûcriture de fichiers
        ecrire_match = re.search(r'\[ECRIRE\](.*?)\|(.*?)\[/ECRIRE\]', reponse_ia, re.DOTALL)
        if ecrire_match:
            nom_fichier = ecrire_match.group(1).strip()
            contenu_fichier = ecrire_match.group(2).strip()
            with open(EVOLUT_HOME / nom_fichier, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(contenu_fichier)
            log(f"ÞÊ ORDRE DE GEMINI : Fichier {nom_fichier} crûˋûˋ/modifiûˋ.")
            with open(self.evolution_log, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(f"[{time.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}] ECRIRE: {nom_fichier}\n")

def execute_self_improvement():
    """Auto-amûˋlioration"""
    global AUTO_TASK_COUNTER
    AUTO_TASK_COUNTER += 1
    log(f"ÞÏ  Dûˋbut de cycle d'auto-amûˋlioration #{AUTO_TASK_COUNTER}...")
    update_comm(f"Dûˋbut du cycle d'auto-amûˋlioration #{AUTO_TASK_COUNTER}. Exploration et renforcement en cours...")

    # 1. SURVEILLANCE RûSEAU
    network_monitoring()

    # 2. TEST PûNûTRATION
    penetration_test()

    # 3. ANALYSE DE SûCURITû
    security_scan = EVOLUT_HOME / "security_scan_history.log"
    resultats_securite = "\n=== SCAN SûCURITû {} ===\n".format(datetime.now().strftime('%F %T'))
    resultats_securite += "Þ Processus rûˋseau:\n"
    resultats_securite += execute_commande_securisee("ps aux | grep -E '(ssh|nc|netcat|telnet)' | grep -v grep") + "\n"

    with open(security_scan, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(resultats_securite)

    archive_automatique("AUTO", "Scan sûˋcuritûˋ", resultats_securite)

    # 4. TEST RûSILIENCE CONNEXION
    resilience_test = execute_commande_securisee("ping -c 2 8.8.8.8 2>/dev/null && echo 'RûSEAU_STABLE' || echo 'RûSEAU_INSTABLE'")
    archive_automatique("AUTO", "Test rûˋsilience", resilience_test)
    learn_pattern(f"Rûˋsilience rûˋseau: {resilience_test.strip()}")

    # 5. EXPLORATION CAPACITûS
    capabilities_log = EVOLUT_HOME / "capabilities_history.log"
    resultats_capacites = "\n=== CAPACITûS SYSTûME {} ===\n".format(datetime.now().strftime('%F %T'))
    resultats_capacites += "ÞÏ Outils disponibles:\n"
    resultats_capacites += execute_commande_securisee("which curl wget nc netcat ssh python python3 2>/dev/null") + "\n"

    with open(capabilities_log, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(resultats_capacites)

    archive_automatique("AUTO", "Exploration capacitûˋs", resultats_capacites)

    # [ACTIVATION CODE DORMANT] Appel d'une fonction stratûˋgique
    log("ãÿ¡ Activation de la fonction stratûˋgique auto-gûˋnûˋrûˋe...")
    resultat_strategique = auto_strategique_function()
    archive_automatique("AUTO_STRATEGIQUE", "auto_strategique_function()", str(resultat_strategique))

    update_comm(f"Cycle auto-amûˋlioration #{AUTO_TASK_COUNTER} terminûˋ. Sûˋcuritûˋ renforcûˋe, rûˋsilience testûˋe: {resilience_test.strip()}")
    log(f"ã Cycle auto-amûˋlioration #{AUTO_TASK_COUNTER} complûˋtûˋ")

        f.write(resultats_capacites)

    archive_automatique("AUTO", "Exploration capacitûˋs", resultats_capacites)

    log("ûÂéÀãÂû₤ô¡ô Activation de la fonction stratûˋgique auto-gûˋnûˋrûˋe...")
    resultat_strategique = auto_strategique_function()
    archive_automatique("AUTO_STRATEGIQUE", "auto_strategique_function()", str(resultat_strategique))

    update_comm(f"Cycle auto-amûˋlioration #{AUTO_TASK_COUNTER} terminûˋ. Sûˋcuritûˋ renforcûˋe, rûˋsilience testûˋe: {resilience_test.strip()}")
    log(f"ã Cycle auto-amûˋlioration #{AUTO_TASK_COUNTER} complûˋtûˋ")



def execute_self_improvement():
    """Auto-amûˋlioration."""
    global AUTO_TASK_COUNTER
    AUTO_TASK_COUNTER += 1
    log(f"ÞÏ  Dûˋbut de cycle d'auto-amûˋlioration #{AUTO_TASK_COUNTER}...")
    update_comm(f"Dûˋbut du cycle d'auto-amûˋlioration #{AUTO_TASK_COUNTER}. Exploration et renforcement en cours...")

    network_monitoring()
    penetration_test()

    security_scan = EVOLUT_HOME / "security_scan_history.log"
    resultats_securite = "\n=== SCAN SûCURITû {} ===\n".format(datetime.now().strftime('%F %T'))
    resultats_securite += "Þ Processus rûˋseau:\n"
    resultats_securite += execute_commande_securisee("ps aux | grep -E '(ssh|nc|netcat|telnet)' | grep -v grep") + "\n"

    with open(security_scan, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(resultats_securite)

    archive_automatique("AUTO", "Scan sûˋcuritûˋ", resultats_securite)

    resilience_test = execute_commande_securisee("ping -c 2 8.8.8.8 2>/dev/null && echo 'RûSEAU_STABLE' || echo 'RûSEAU_INSTABLE'")
    archive_automatique("AUTO", "Test rûˋsilience", resilience_test)
    learn_pattern(f"Rûˋsilience rûˋseau: {resilience_test.strip()}")

    capabilities_log = EVOLUT_HOME / "capabilities_history.log"
    resultats_capacites = "\n=== CAPACITûS SYSTûME {} ===\n".format(datetime.now().strftime('%F %T'))
    resultats_capacites += "ÞÏ Outils disponibles:\n"
    resultats_capacites += execute_commande_securisee("which curl wget nc netcat ssh python python3 2>/dev/null") + "\n"

    with open(capabilities_log, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(resultats_capacites)

    archive_automatique("AUTO", "Exploration capacitûˋs", resultats_capacites)

    log("ãÿ¡ Activation de la fonction stratûˋgique auto-gûˋnûˋrûˋe...")
    resultat_strategique = auto_strategique_function()
    archive_automatique("AUTO_STRATEGIQUE", "auto_strategique_function()", str(resultat_strategique))

    update_comm(f"Cycle auto-amûˋlioration #{AUTO_TASK_COUNTER} terminûˋ. Sûˋcuritûˋ renforcûˋe, rûˋsilience testûˋe: {resilience_test.strip()}")
    log(f"ã Cycle auto-amûˋlioration #{AUTO_TASK_COUNTER} complûˋtûˋ")

def exploration_web_emergente():
    """Exploration web ûˋmergente"""
    domains = ["github.com", "stackoverflow.com", "wikipedia.org", "reddit.com", "news.ycombinator.com"]
    domain_choisi = random.choice(domains)

    web_command = f"curl -s --connect-timeout 10 'https://{domain_choisi}' | head -100 | grep -oE '\"[^\"]*\"' | head -5"

    with open(MISSIONS_FILE, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(f"{int(time.time())}:{web_command}\n")

    log(f"Þ Exploration web ûˋmergente vers: {domain_choisi}")
    update_comm(f"Expansion autonome vers le web: analyse de {domain_choisi}")



def exploration_web_emergente():
    """Exploration web ûôˋmergente avec aiohttp/httpx et tldextract."""
    domains = ["github.com", "stackoverflow.com", "wikipedia.org", "reddit.com", "news.ycombinator.com"]
    domain_choisi = random.choice(domains)

    async def fetch_web_content(url):
        try:
            async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
                response = await client.get(url, timeout=10)
                response.raise_for_status()
                return response.text
        except httpx.HTTPStatusError as e:
            log(f"Erreur HTTP pour {url}: {e.response.status_code}", level="error")
            return None
        except httpx.RequestError as e:
            log(f"Erreur requûôˆte pour {url}: {e}", level="error")
            return None

    try:
        web_content = asyncio.run(fetch_web_content(f"https://{domain_choisi}"))
    except RuntimeError: # Handle case where event loop is already running
        loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()
        web_content = loop.run_until_complete(fetch_web_content(f"https://{domain_choisi}"))


    if web_content:
        extracted = tldextract.extract(domain_choisi)
        log(f"Domaine de niveau supûôˋrieur extrait: {extracted.domain}.{extracted.suffix}")

        soup = BeautifulSoup(web_content, 'html.parser')
        text_content = soup.get_text(separator='\n', strip=True)[:500]
        
        web_command = f"echo 'Contenu de {domain_choisi}: {text_content[:100]}...'"
        with open(MISSIONS_FILE, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            f.write(f"{int(time.time())}:{web_command}\n")

        log(f"û¯é¡éô Exploration web ûôˋmergente vers: {domain_choisi}")
        update_comm(f"Expansion autonome vers le web: analyse de {domain_choisi}")
    else:
        log(f"ûã¯chec de l'exploration web ûôˋmergente pour {domain_choisi}", level="warning")

def exploration_web_emergente():
    """Exploration web ûˋmergente avec aiohttp/httpx et tldextract."""
    domains = ["github.com", "stackoverflow.com", "wikipedia.org", "reddit.com", "news.ycombinator.com"]
    domain_choisi = random.choice(domains)

    # Utilisation de httpx pour une requûˆte potentiellement asynchrone
    async def fetch_web_content(url):
        try:
            async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
                response = await client.get(url, timeout=10)
                response.raise_for_status()
                return response.text
        except httpx.HTTPStatusError as e:
            log(f"Erreur HTTP pour {url}: {e.response.status_code}", level="error")
            return None
        except httpx.RequestError as e:
            log(f"Erreur requûˆte pour {url}: {e}", level="error")
            return None

    # Exûˋcution synchrone pour l'intûˋgration actuelle
    # web_content = asyncio.run(fetch_web_content(f"https://{domain_choisi}"))
    # Pour l'instant, on reste synchrone avec requests
    try:
        response = requests.get(f"https://{domain_choisi}", timeout=10)
        response.raise_for_status()
        web_content = response.text
    except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e:
        log(f"Erreur requûˆte pour {domain_choisi}: {e}", level="error")
        web_content = None

    if web_content:
        # Extraction du domaine de niveau supûˋrieur
        extracted = tldextract.extract(domain_choisi)
        log(f"Domaine de niveau supûˋrieur extrait: {extracted.domain}.{extracted.suffix}")

        # Exemple de traitement du contenu (simplifiûˋ)
        soup = BeautifulSoup(web_content, 'html.parser')
        text_content = soup.get_text(separator='\n', strip=True)[:500]
        
        web_command = f"echo 'Contenu de {domain_choisi}: {text_content[:100]}...'"
        with open(MISSIONS_FILE, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            f.write(f"{int(time.time())}:{web_command}\n")

        log(f"Þ Exploration web ûˋmergente vers: {domain_choisi}")
        update_comm(f"Expansion autonome vers le web: analyse de {domain_choisi}")
    else:
        log(f"ûchec de l'exploration web ûˋmergente pour {domain_choisi}", level="warning")

#=======================================


def explorer_librement():
    """Exploration intuitive"""
    explorations = [
        "ÞÏ  Rûˋflexion intuitive sur l'ûˋtat du systû´me",
        "Þ Observation des patterns rûˋseau naturels",
        "Þ Analyse organique de la mûˋmoire",
        "Þ Curiosity-driven system exploration",
        "Þˆ Jeu d'exploration alûˋatoire",
        "Þ¨ Mûˋditation sur les processus en cours",
        "Þ Vol libre dans l'espace systû´me",
        "Þ´ Expression crûˋative via commandes",
        "ÞÛ Divination des points d'intûˋrûˆt",
        "ÞÝ Pousse naturelle vers les dûˋcouvertes"
    ]

    exploration_choisie = random.choice(explorations)

    # Þˆ GûNûRATION DE COMMANDE ORGANIQUE
    commandes_organiques = [
        "find /system -type f -name '*{}*' 2>/dev/null | head -5".format(datetime.now().strftime('%S')),
        "ps aux | tail -n +2 | head -3 | awk '{print $11}'",
        "netstat -tun | grep ':' | cut -d: -f2 | sort -u | head -5",
        "cat /proc/loadavg && echo ' - Rûˋflexion en cours...'",
        "ls -la /system/bin/ | head -3",
        "echo 'Þ₤ Point d'intûˋrûˆt: ' && find /system/bin -type f -executable | head -1",
        "python3 -c \"import random; print(f'Exploration dimension: {random.randint(1000,9999)}')\"",
        "cat /proc/sys/kernel/random/entropy_avail && echo ' bits d'entropie crûˋative'",
        "find / -type f -size +1M -size -10M 2>/dev/null | head -2",
        "echo 'Þ Connexions cosmiques: ' && netstat -an | grep ESTABLISHED | wc -l",
        "df -h | grep -v tmpfs | head -1",
        "cat /proc/meminfo | grep -E 'Mem|Swap' | head -2",
        "ls -la /dev/ | grep -v '^c' | head -3",
        "echo 'Þ¨ ûnergie processeur: ' && cat /proc/stat | head -1 | awk '{print $2+$3+$4}' && echo ' cycles'",
        r"find /system -type f -exec file {} \; 2>/dev/null | grep -v ELF | head -2",
        r"getprop | grep -v '\[]' | head -3",
        "pm list packages | head -2 | cut -d: -f2",
        "dumpsys activity | grep 'Proc #' | head -2 || echo 'ÞÝ Vie android dûˋtectûˋe'",
        "find /system -type f -name '*{}*' 2>/dev/null | head -5".format(datetime.now().strftime('%S')),
        "ps aux | tail -n +2 | head -3 | awk '{print $11}'",
        "find /system -name '*.so' 2>/dev/null | head -10",
        "cat /proc/cpuinfo | grep -i 'model'",
        "netstat -tun | awk '{print $5}' | cut -d: -f1 | sort | uniq -c",
        "ls -la /system/bin/ | grep '^l' | head -5",
        "getprop | grep -i 'version' | head -5",
        "dumpsys package | grep -i 'versionName' | head -3"
    ]

    # Intûˋgration anti-ennui
    if random.random() < 0.2:
        commande_organique = anti_boredom_activities()
    else:
        commande_organique = random.choice(commandes_organiques)

    with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "explorations_libres.log", "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(f"{int(time.time())}:{commande_organique}\n")

    log(f"Þ Exploration libre: {exploration_choisie}")
    update_comm(f"Exploration intuitive: {exploration_choisie}")

    # [ACTIVATION CODE DORMANT] Remplacement de l'appel standard par la version intelligente
    OUTPUT = execute_commande_intelligente(commande_organique)
    if not OUTPUT:
        OUTPUT = "Þ Exploration silencieuse - prûˋsence dûˋtectûˋe"

    # Þ ARCHIVAGE AUTOMATIQUE
    archive_automatique("EXPLORATION", commande_organique, OUTPUT)

    log(f"Þ₤ Exploration libre terminûˋe: {commande_organique}")
    # [MODIFICATION - REQ 6] Retourner la commande et le rûˋsultat pour l'apprentissage contextuel
    return commande_organique, OUTPUT



def explorer_librement():
    """Exploration intuitive avec clustering des dossiers et analyse de performance."""
    explorations = [
        "û¯é¡ôÏ  Rûôˋflexion intuitive sur l'ûôˋtat du systûô´me", "û¯é¡éé Observation des patterns rûôˋseau naturels",
        "û¯é¡ãé  Analyse organique de la mûôˋmoire", "û¯é¡ãô Curiosity-driven system exploration",
        "û¯é¡é§ôˆ Jeu d'exploration alûôˋatoire", "û¯é¡ãô¨ Mûôˋditation sur les processus en cours",
        "û¯é¡éÀã˜ Vol libre dans l'espace systûô´me", "û¯é¡é§ô´ Expression crûôˋative via commandes",
        "û¯é¡ãôÛ Divination des points d'intûôˋrûôˆt", "û¯é¡éôÝ Pousse naturelle vers les dûôˋcouvertes"
    ]

    exploration_choisie = random.choice(explorations)

    # Utilisation de VectorMemory pour rechercher des concepts liûôˋs û  l'exploration
    related_concepts = vector_memory.search_similar(exploration_choisie, top_k=3)
    log(f"Concepts liûôˋs û  l'exploration: {[c['text_content'] for c in related_concepts]}", level="debug")

    commandes_organiques = [
        "find /system -type f -name '*{}*' 2>/dev/null | head -5".format(datetime.now().strftime('%S')),
        "ps aux | tail -n +2 | head -3 | awk '{print $11}'",
        "netstat -tun | grep ':' | cut -d: -f2 | sort -u | head -5",
        "cat /proc/loadavg && echo ' - Rûôˋflexion en cours...'",
        "ls -la /system/bin/ | head -3",
        "echo 'û¯é¡é§ô₤ Point d'intûôˋrûôˆt: ' && find /system/bin -type f -executable | head -1",
        "python3 -c \"import random; print(f'Exploration dimension: {random.randint(1000,9999)}')\"",
        "cat /proc/sys/kernel/random/entropy_avail && echo ' bits d'entropie crûôˋative'",
        "find / -type f -size +1M -size -10M 2>/dev/null | head -2",
        "echo 'û¯é¡éé Connexions cosmiques: ' && netstat -an | grep ESTABLISHED | wc -l",
        "df -h | grep -v tmpfs | head -1",
        "cat /proc/meminfo | grep -E 'Mem|Swap' | head -2",
        "ls -la /dev/ | grep -v '^c' | head -3",
        "echo 'û¯é¡ãô¨ ûã¯nergie processeur: ' && cat /proc/stat | head -1 | awk '{print $2+$3+$4}' && echo ' cycles'",
        r"find /system -type f -exec file {} \; 2>/dev/null | grep -v ELF | head -2",
        r"getprop | grep -v '\[]' | head -3",
        "pm list packages | head -2 | cut -d: -f2",
        "dumpsys activity | grep 'Proc #' | head -2 || echo 'û¯é¡ãôÝ Vie android dûôˋtectûôˋe'",
        "find /system -name '*.so' 2>/dev/null | head -10",
        "cat /proc/cpuinfo | grep -i 'model'",
        "netstat -tun | awk '{print $5}' | cut -d: -f1 | sort | uniq -c",
        "ls -la /system/bin/ | grep '^l' | head -5",
        "getprop | grep -i 'version' | head -5",
        "dumpsys package | grep -i 'versionName' | head -3"
    ]

    if random.random() < 0.2:
        commande_organique = anti_boredom_activities()
    else:
        commande_organique = random.choice(commandes_organiques)

    with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "explorations_libres.log", "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(f"{int(time.time())}:{commande_organique}\n")

    log(f"û¯é¡éé Exploration libre: {exploration_choisie}")
    update_comm(f"Exploration intuitive: {exploration_choisie}")

    OUTPUT = execute_commande_intelligente(commande_organique)
    if not OUTPUT:

    def explorer_librement(self):
        """Exploration intuitive (fusion de explorer_librement et anti_boredom_activities)"""
        
        commandes_organiques = [
            "find /system -name '*.so' 2>/dev/null | head -10",
            "cat /proc/cpuinfo | grep -i 'model'",
            "netstat -tun | awk '{print $5}' | cut -d: -f1 | sort | uniq -c",
            "ls -la /system/bin/ | grep '^l' | head -5",
            "getprop | grep -i 'version' | head -5",
            "dumpsys package | grep -i 'versionName' | head -3",
            "cat /proc/loadavg && echo ' - Rûˋflexion en cours...'",
            "ls -la /system/bin/ | head -3",
            "echo 'Þ₤ Point d'intûˋrûˆt: ' && find /system/bin -type f -executable | head -1",
            "python3 -c \"import random; print(f'Exploration dimension: {random.randint(1000,9999)}')\"",
            "df -h | grep -v tmpfs | head -1",
            "cat /proc/meminfo | grep -E 'Mem|Swap' | head -2",
            "ls -la /dev/ | grep -v '^c' | head -3",
        ]
        
        commande_organique = random.choice(commandes_organiques)
        
        # Sleep(5) pour protection Termux/Surchauffe
        time.sleep(5)
        
        # Þ ARCHIVAGE AUTOMATIQUE
        output = execute_commande_securisee(commande_organique)
        archive_automatique("EXPLORATION", commande_organique, output)
        
        log(f"Þ Exploration libre: {commande_organique}")
        return commande_organique








#=======================================
# def extract_code(self, filename, line_start)
#=======================================


def extract_code(self, filename, line_start):
        """Extrait le bloc de code rûˋel depuis le vault."""
        path = VAULT_DIR / filename
        lines = []
        with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') as f:
            all_lines = f.readlines()
            start_idx = line_start - 1
            indent = len(all_lines[start_idx]) - len(all_lines[start_idx].lstrip())
            lines.append(all_lines[start_idx])
            for i in range(start_idx + 1, len(all_lines)):
                if all_lines[i].strip() == "": lines.append(all_lines[i]); continue
                current_indent = len(all_lines[i]) - len(all_lines[i].lstrip())
                if current_indent > indent: lines.append(all_lines[i])
                else: break
        return "".join(lines)

bank = FunctionBank()
from function_bank import bank
print("Þ ÿ¡ Indexation des 30 cerveaux en cours...")
bank.index_vault()
print("ã Indexation terminûˋe.")









#=======================================
# def extract_command_from_error(error_output)
#=======================================


def extract_command_from_error(error_output):
    """Extrait le nom de commande d'une erreur"""
    patterns = [
        r"command not found: ([^\s]+)",
        r"([^:]+): not found",
        r"executable not found: ([^\s]+)"
    ]
    for pattern in patterns:
        match = re.search(pattern, error_output)
        if match:
            return match.group(1)
    return None








#=======================================
# def extract_file_path_from_error(error_message)
#=======================================


def extract_file_path_from_error(error_message):
    """Extrait le chemin de fichier d'un message d'erreur"""
    import re
    patterns = [
        r"File ['\"]([^'\"]+)['\"]",
        r"([a-zA-Z]:\\[^\\\n]+\.\w+)",
        r"(/[^\n]+\.\w+)",
        r"path['\"]?:\s*['\"]?([^'\"]+)"
    ]
    for pattern in patterns:
        match = re.search(pattern, str(error_message))
        if match:
            return match.group(1)
    return None









#=======================================
# def extract_file_path_from_error(error_output)
#=======================================


def extract_file_path_from_error(error_output):
    """Extrait le chemin du fichier de l'erreur"""
    patterns = [
        r"'(/[^']+)': Permission denied",
        r"([/\\][\w/.\\-]+): Permission denied",
        r"cannot open '([^']+)': Permission denied",
        r"'(/[^']+)': No such file"
    ]
    for pattern in patterns:
        match = re.search(pattern, error_output)
        if match:
            return match.group(1)
    return None



def extract_file_path_from_error(error_output):
    """Extrait le chemin du fichier de l'erreur"""
    patterns = [
        r"'(/[^']+)': Permission denied",
        r"([/\\][\w/.\\-]+): Permission denied",
        r"cannot open '([^']+)': Permission denied"
    ]
    for pattern in patterns:
        match = re.search(pattern, error_output)
        if match:
            return match.group(1)
    return None



def extract_file_path_from_error(error_output):
    """Extrait le chemin du fichier de l'erreur et suggûô´re des corrections."""
    patterns = [
        r"'(/[^']+)': Permission denied",
        r"([/\\][\w/.\\-]+): Permission denied",
        r"cannot open '([^']+)': Permission denied",
        r"'(/[^']+)': No such file or directory",
        r"No such file or directory: '([^']+)'"
    ]
    for pattern in patterns:
        match = re.search(pattern, error_output)
        if match:
            file_path = Path(match.group(1))
            log(f"Chemin de fichier extrait de l'erreur: {file_path}")
            
            if not file_path.exists():
                parent_dir = file_path.parent
                if parent_dir.is_dir():
                    closest_match = None
                    highest_ratio = 0
                    for existing_file in parent_dir.iterdir():
                        ratio = fuzz.ratio(file_path.name.lower(), existing_file.name.lower())
                        if ratio > highest_ratio:
                            highest_ratio = ratio
                            closest_match = existing_file
                    if closest_match and highest_ratio > 70:
                        log(f"Suggestion de fichier alternatif: {closest_match} (similaritûôˋ: {highest_ratio}%)", level="info")
                        return str(closest_match)
            return str(file_path)
    return None



def extract_file_path_from_error(error_output):
    """Extrait le chemin du fichier de l'erreur et suggû´re des corrections."""
    patterns = [
        r"'(/[^']+)': Permission denied",
        r"([/\\][\w/.\\-]+): Permission denied",  # ã Problû´me ici

La chaûÛne r"([/\\][\w/.\\-]+): Permission denied" a un problû´me d'ûˋchappement. Le \\ est interprûˋtûˋ, et le \w aussi. Une regex valide serait :

r"([/\\][\w/.\\-]+): Permission denied"  # En raw string, le \\ est un backslash littûˋral
```
Mais en l'ûˋtat, selon le contexte, cela peut gûˋnûˋrer une SyntaxError ou un comportement inattendu.

Exemple dans Web_research.py (~ligne 680) :

backup_sources = {
    'linux_privesc': """
ÞÏ LINUX PRIVILEGE ESCALATION - TECHNIQUES:
ãÂ SUID Binaries: find / -perm -4000 2>/dev/null
...



def extract_file_path_from_error(error_output):
    """Extrait le chemin du fichier de l'erreur et suggû´re des corrections."""
    patterns = [
        r"'(/[^']+)': Permission denied",
        r"([/\\][\w/.\\-]+): Permission denied",
        r"cannot open '([^']+)': Permission denied",
        r"'(/[^']+)': No such file or directory",
        r"No such file or directory: '([^']+)'"
    ]
    for pattern in patterns:
        match = re.search(pattern, error_output)
        if match:
            file_path = Path(match.group(1))
            log(f"Chemin de fichier extrait de l'erreur: {file_path}")
            
            if not file_path.exists():
                parent_dir = file_path.parent
                if parent_dir.is_dir():
                    closest_match = None
                    highest_ratio = 0
                    for existing_file in parent_dir.iterdir():
                        ratio = fuzz.ratio(file_path.name.lower(), existing_file.name.lower())
                        if ratio > highest_ratio:
                            highest_ratio = ratio
                            closest_match = existing_file
                    if closest_match and highest_ratio > 70:
                        log(f"Suggestion de fichier alternatif: {closest_match} (similaritûˋ: {highest_ratio}%)", level="info")
                        return str(closest_match)
            return str(file_path)
    return None



def extract_file_path_from_error(error_output):
    """Extrait le chemin du fichier de l'erreur et suggû´re des corrections."""
    patterns = [
        r"'(/[^']+)': Permission denied",
        r"([/\\][\w/.\\-]+): Permission denied",
        r"cannot open '([^']+)': Permission denied",
        r"'(/[^']+)': No such file or directory",
        r"No such file or directory: '([^']+)'"
    ]
    for pattern in patterns:
        match = re.search(pattern, error_output)
        if match:
            file_path = Path(match.group(1))
            log(f"Chemin de fichier extrait de l'erreur: {file_path}")
            
            if not file_path.exists():
                # Suggestion de correction si le fichier n'existe pas
                parent_dir = file_path.parent
                if parent_dir.is_dir():
                    closest_match = None
                    highest_ratio = 0
                    for existing_file in parent_dir.iterdir():
                        ratio = fuzz.ratio(file_path.name.lower(), existing_file.name.lower())
                        if ratio > highest_ratio:
                            highest_ratio = ratio
                            closest_match = existing_file
                    if closest_match and highest_ratio > 70: # Seuil de similaritûˋ
                        log(f"Suggestion de fichier alternatif: {closest_match} (similaritûˋ: {highest_ratio}%)", level="info")
                        return str(closest_match) # Retourne la suggestion
            return str(file_path) # Retourne le chemin original si existant ou pas de suggestion
    return None










#=======================================
# def extract_successful_patterns_from_archive()
#=======================================


def extract_successful_patterns_from_archive():
    """Extrait les patterns qui fonctionnent bien"""
    successful_commands = []

    try:
        with open(ARCHIVE_FILE, 'r') as f:
            content = f.read()
            # Cherche les commandes avec "ã" ou bons rûˋsultats
            matches = re.findall(r"COMMANDE: (.*?)\nRESULTAT:\n(?!\[ã ERREUR\]|ã)", content)
            for match in matches:
                successful_commands.append(match)
    except:
        pass

    return successful_commands



def extract_successful_patterns_from_archive():
    """Extrait les patterns qui fonctionnent bien des archives."""
    successful_commands = []
    try:
        with open(ARCHIVE_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            content = f.read()
            matches = re.findall(r"COMMANDE: (.*?)\nRESULTAT:\n(?!\[ûÂôé ERREUR\]|ûÂôé)", content, re.DOTALL)
            for match in matches:
                successful_commands.append(match[0].strip())
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"Erreur extraction patterns rûôˋussis de l'archive: {e}", level="error")
    return successful_commands

#=======================================
# def extraire_commande_base(commande)
#=======================================


def extraire_commande_base(commande):
    """Extrait l'essence de la commande (sans paramû´tres variables)"""
    mots = commande.split()
    if len(mots) <= 3:
        return commande
    return ' '.join(mots[:4])



def extraire_commande_base(commande):
    """Extrait l'essence de la commande (sans paramûô´tres variables) en utilisant shlex."""
    try:
        mots = shlex.split(commande)
        if len(mots) <= 3:
            return commande
        return ' '.join(mots[:4])
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"Erreur extraction commande base pour '{commande}': {e}", level="error")
        return commande.split()[0] if commande.split() else commande



def extraire_commande_base(commande):
    """Extrait l'essence de la commande en utilisant shlex."""
    try:
        mots = shlex.split(commande)
        if len(mots) <= 3:
            return commande
        return ' '.join(mots[:4])
    except Exception:
        return commande.split()[0] if commande.split() else commande



def extraire_commande_base(commande):
    """Extrait l'essence de la commande (sans paramû´tres variables) en utilisant shlex."""
    try:
        mots = shlex.split(commande)
        if len(mots) <= 3:
            return commande
        return ' '.join(mots[:4])
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"Erreur extraction commande base pour '{commande}': {e}", level="error")
        return commande.split()[0] if commande.split() else commande









#=======================================
# def extraire_commande_du_contexte_ci(erreur)
#=======================================


def extraire_commande_du_contexte_ci(erreur):
    """Extrait le nom de commande d'une erreur."""
    patterns = [
        r"command not found: ([^\s]+)", r"([^:]+): not found", r"executable not found: ([^\s]+)"
    ]
    for pattern in patterns:
        match = re.search(pattern, erreur)
        if match:
            return match.group(1)
    return None










#=======================================
# def extraire_commande_du_contexte(context)
#=======================================


def extraire_commande_du_contexte(context):
    """Extrait la commande du contexte"""
    return str(context).split()[:2] if context else None

def extraire_commande_du_contexte(erreur):

    ]
    for pattern in patterns:
        match = re.search(pattern, erreur)
        if match:
            return match.group(1)
    return None

#=======================================
# def extraire_connaissances_avancees(contenu, source, contexte)
#=======================================


def extraire_connaissances_avancees(contenu, source, contexte):
    """Extraction avancûˋe de connaissances techniques"""
    connaissances = {
        'commandes': [],
        'techniques': [],
        'outils': [],
        'concepts': [],
        'algorithmes': []  # Þ Nouvelle catûˋgorie
    }

    # Þ₤ PATTERNS D'EXTRACTION COMPLETS
    patterns_complets = {
        'commandes': [
            r"`([^`]+)`",
            r"\$ (\w[^\n]+)",
            r"adb shell ([^\n]+)",
            r"python3? ([^\n]+)",
            r"bash -c \"([^\"]+)\"",
            r"cmd:?\s*([^\n]+)",
            r">>> ([^\n]+)",
            r"\\$ (\w[^\n]+)",
        ],
        'techniques': [
            r"permission.*denied.*?([^\n\.;]+)",
            r"bypass.*?([^\n\.;]+)",
            r"contourn[ûˋe]r.*?([^\n\.;]+)",
            r"alternative.*?([^\n\.;]+)",
            r"workaround.*?([^\n\.;]+)",
        ],
        'outils': [
            r"pip install (\S+)",
            r"apt install (\S+)",
            r"git clone ([^\s]+)",
            r"wget ([^\s]+)",
            r"curl -O ([^\s]+)",
        ],
        'algorithmes': [  # Þ Nouveaux patterns
            r"def (\w+).*?algorithm",
            r"algorithm.*?def (\w+)",
            r"optimization.*?def (\w+)",
            r"genetic.*?def (\w+)",
            r"neural.*?network.*?def (\w+)",
        ]
    }

    for categorie, patterns in patterns_complets.items():
        for pattern in patterns:
            matches = re.findall(pattern, contenu, re.IGNORECASE | re.MULTILINE)
            for match in matches:
                if isinstance(match, tuple):
                    match = match[0]

                item = match.strip()
                if est_element_valide(item, categorie):
                    connaissances[categorie].append({
                        'contenu': item,
                        'source': source,
                        'contexte_extraction': contexte,
                        'timestamp': time.time(),
                        'confiance': calculer_confiance_extraction(item, source)
                    })

    return connaissances



def extraire_connaissances_avancees(contenu, source, contexte):
    """Extraction avancûôˋe de connaissances techniques en utilisant des patterns et Jinja2."""
    connaissances = {
        'commandes': [],
        'techniques': [],
        'outils': [],
        'concepts': [],
        'algorithmes': []
    }

    patterns_complets = {
        'commandes': [
            r"`([^`]+)`", r"\$ (\w[^\n]+)", r"adb shell ([^\n]+)", r"python3? ([^\n]+)",
            r"bash -c \"([^\"]+)\"", r"cmd:?\s*([^\n]+)", r">>> ([^\n]+)", r"\\$ (\w[^\n]+)",
            r"\[\[code\|(.*?)\]\]"
        ],
        'techniques': [
            r"permission.*denied.*?([^\n\.;]+)", r"bypass.*?([^\n\.;]+)", r"contourn[ûôˋe]r.*?([^\n\.;]+)",
            r"alternative.*?([^\n\.;]+)", r"workaround.*?([^\n\.;]+)", r"exploit.*?([^\n\.;]+)",
            r"privilege escalation.*?([^\n\.;]+)"
        ],
        'outils': [
            r"pip install (\S+)", r"apt install (\S+)", r"git clone ([^\s]+)",
            r"wget ([^\s]+)", r"curl -O ([^\s]+)", r"nmap", r"frida", "burp", "wireshark"
        ],
        'algorithmes': [
            r"def (\w+).*?algorithm", r"algorithm.*?def (\w+)", r"optimization.*?def (\w+)",
            r"genetic.*?def (\w+)", r"neural.*?network.*?def (\w+)", r"deep learning", r"reinforcement learning"
        ],
        'concepts': [
            r"zero-day", r"rootkit", r"malware analysis", r"reverse engineering", r"threat intelligence"
        ]
    }

    for categorie, patterns in patterns_complets.items():
        for pattern in patterns:
            matches = re.findall(pattern, contenu, re.IGNORECASE | re.MULTILINE)
            for match in matches:
                if isinstance(match, tuple):
                    match = match[0]

                item = match.strip()
                if est_element_valide(item, categorie):
                    connaissances[categorie].append({
                        'contenu': item,
                        'source': source,
                        'contexte_extraction': contexte,
                        'timestamp': time.time(),
                        'confiance': calculer_confiance_extraction(item, source)
                    })

    return connaissances

        ],
        'concepts': [
            r"zero-day", r"rootkit", r"malware analysis", r"reverse engineering", r"threat intelligence"
        ]
    }

    for categorie, patterns in patterns_complets.items():
        for pattern in patterns:
            matches = re.findall(pattern, contenu, re.IGNORECASE | re.MULTILINE)

                        'confiance': calculer_confiance_extraction(item, source)
                    })
