# def generer_essais_hybrides(self, objectif, contexte="")
#=======================================


    def generer_essais_hybrides(self, objectif, contexte=""):
        """Gûˋnû´re des chimû´res 100% alûˋatoires et des essais multi-langages."""
        essais = []
        lang_keys = list(self.matrix.keys())
        
        # 1. Essais purs (Prioritûˋ aux rûˋussites passûˋes)
        for lang in lang_keys:
            essais.append(self._formater_essai_pur(lang, objectif))

        # 2. CHIMûRES ALûATOIRES TOTALES (Mûˋlange imprûˋvisible)
        for _ in range(10): # Plus de tentatives alûˋatoires
            selected = random.sample(lang_keys, random.randint(2, 4))
            chimere_code = f"// ÞÏˆ CHIMERE ûMERGENTE [{'-'.join(selected)}]\n"
            for s_lang in selected:
                snippet = self._get_snippet_aleatoire(s_lang, objectif)
                chimere_code += f"\n/* START {s_lang} */\n{snippet}\n/* END {s_lang} */\n"
            
            # Vûˋrification anti-doublon/ûˋchec via hash dans la mûˋmoire globale
            chimera_hash = hashlib.md5(chimere_code.encode()).hexdigest()
            if not self._is_known_failure(chimera_hash):
                essais.append(chimere_code)

        return essais

            for s_lang in selected:
                snippet = self._get_snippet_aleatoire(s_lang, objectif)
                chimere_code += f"\n/* START {s_lang} */\n{snippet}\n/* END {s_lang} */\n"

                essais.append(chimere_code)

        return essais

# def generer_nom_fonction_imprevisible(pattern, timestamp)

def generer_nom_fonction_imprevisible(pattern, timestamp):
    """Gûˋnû´re des noms de fonctions cryptiques mais logiques"""

    prefixes_creatifs = {
        "exploration": ["nebula", "quantum", "cosmic", "void", "dimension"],
        "reseau": ["synapse", "pulse", "stream", "nexus", "signal"],
        "analyse": ["cortex", "logic", "pattern", "insight", "wisdom"],
        "securite": ["shield", "guard", "watch", "sentinel", "barrier"],
        "systeme": ["core", "engine", "matrix", "framework", "architecture"]
    }

    suffixes_mystere = ["_x", "_prime", "_omega", "_protocol", "_sequence", "_echo"]

    if pattern in prefixes_creatifs:
        prefixe = random.choice(prefixes_creatifs[pattern])
        suffixe = random.choice(suffixes_mystere)
        return f"{prefixe}_{timestamp}{suffixe}"
    else:
        return f"shadow_{timestamp}_{random.randint(1000,9999)}"

    def generer_rapport_alertes(self):
        """Gûˋnû´re le rapport d'alertes de sûˋcuritûˋ"""

        if not self.alertes_critiques:
            rapport = """
ã AUCUNE ALERTE DE SûCURITû CRITIQUE DûTECTûE

Votre appareil semble sûˋcurisûˋ.
Aucune menace grave n'a ûˋtûˋ identifiûˋe.
"""
            update_comm("ã Scan sûˋcuritûˋ: Aucune menace critique dûˋtectûˋe")
        else:
            rapport = """
Þ´ RAPPORT D'ALERTES DE SûCURITû - MENACES DûTECTûES
===================================================

"""
            for alerte in self.alertes_critiques:
                rapport += f"{alerte}\n"

            rapport += f"""
ÞÀ ACTIONS RECOMMANDûES:
ãÂ Dûˋsactiver le dûˋbogage USB
ãÂ Vûˋrifier les applications installûˋes
ãÂ Dûˋsactiver les sources inconnues
ãÂ Scanner avec un antivirus mobile
ãÂ Mettre û  jour le systû´me

Þ Rapport complet: {self.rapport_securite}
"""

            update_comm("Þ´ ALERTE: Menaces de sûˋcuritûˋ dûˋtectûˋes!")
            update_comm("Consultez le rapport de sûˋcuritûˋ complet")

        # Sauvegarde la synthû´se
        synthû´se_file = SECURITY_DIR / f"synthû´se_securite_{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.txt"
        with open(synthû´se_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            f.write(rapport)

        log("ã Scan de sûˋcuritûˋ terminûˋ")
        return rapport



    def generer_rapport_alertes(self):
        """Gûôˋnûô´re le rapport d'alertes de sûôˋcuritûôˋ."""
        with self.lock:
            if not self.alertes_critiques:
                rapport = Template("""
ûÂéãÎ AUCUNE ALERTE DE Sûã¯CURITûã¯ CRITIQUE Dûã¯TECTûã¯E

Votre appareil semble sûôˋcurisûôˋ.
Aucune menace grave n'a ûôˋtûôˋ identifiûôˋe.
""").render()
                update_comm("ûÂéãÎ Scan sûôˋcuritûôˋ: Aucune menace critique dûôˋtectûôˋe")
            else:
                rapport_template = Template("""
û¯é¡éÀô´ RAPPORT D'ALERTES DE Sûã¯CURITûã¯ - MENACES Dûã¯TECTûã¯ES
===================================================

{% for alerte in alertes %}
{{ alerte }}
{% endfor %}

û¯é¡ãôÀ ACTIONS RECOMMANDûã¯ES:
ûÂã˜ôÂ Dûôˋsactiver le dûôˋbogage USB
ûÂã˜ôÂ Vûôˋrifier les applications installûôˋes
ûÂã˜ôÂ Dûôˋsactiver les sources inconnues
ûÂã˜ôÂ Scanner avec un antivirus mobile
ûÂã˜ôÂ Mettre û  jour le systûô´me

û¯é¡ãô Rapport complet: {{ rapport_file }}
""")
                rapport = rapport_template.render(alertes=self.alertes_critiques, rapport_file=self.rapport_securite)

                update_comm("û¯é¡éÀô´ ALERTE: Menaces de sûôˋcuritûôˋ dûôˋtectûôˋes!")
                update_comm("Consultez le rapport de sûôˋcuritûôˋ complet")

            synthûô´se_file = SECURITY_DIR / f"synthûô´se_securite_{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.txt"
            with open(synthûô´se_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                f.write(rapport)

            log("ûÂéãÎ Scan de sûôˋcuritûôˋ terminûôˋ")
            return rapport

    def generer_rapport_alertes(self):
        """Gûˋnû´re le rapport d'alertes de sûˋcuritûˋ"""

        if not self.alertes_critiques:
            rapport = """
ã AUCUNE ALERTE DE SûCURITû CRITIQUE DûTECTûE

Votre appareil semble sûˋcurisûˋ.
Aucune menace grave n'a ûˋtûˋ identifiûˋe.
"""
            update_comm("ã Scan sûˋcuritûˋ: Aucune menace critique dûˋtectûˋe")
        else:
            rapport = """

===================================================

"""

ûÂã˜ôÂ Dûˋsactiver le dûˋbogage USB
ûÂã˜ôÂ Vûˋrifier les applications installûˋes
ûÂã˜ôÂ Dûˋsactiver les sources inconnues
ûÂã˜ôÂ Scanner avec un antivirus mobile
ûÂã˜ôÂ Mettre û  jour le systû´me

Þ Rapport complet: {{ rapport_file }}
""")
                rapport = rapport_template.render(alertes=self.alertes_critiques, rapport_file=self.rapport_securite)

                update_comm("Þ´ ALERTE: Menaces de sûˋcuritûˋ dûˋtectûˋes!")
                update_comm("Consultez le rapport de sûˋcuritûˋ complet")

            synthû´se_file = SECURITY_DIR / f"synthû´se_securite_{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.txt"
            with open(synthû´se_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                f.write(rapport)

            log("ã Scan de sûˋcuritûˋ terminûˋ")
            return rapport



            




#=======================================

    def generer_rapport_complet(self):
        """Gûˋnû´re le rapport fusionnûˋ"""
        log("Þ Gûˋnûˋration du rapport fusionnûˋ (Diagnostic + Sûˋcuritûˋ)...")
        
        # 1. Exûˋcuter le diagnostic complet
        rapport_diagnostic = self.diagnostic.scanner_complet_telephone()
        
        # 2. Exûˋcuter le scan de sûˋcuritûˋ avancûˋ
        rapport_securite = self.rapporteur_securite.scanner_et_rapporter()
        
        # 3. Fusionner les rûˋsultats
        rapport_fusionne = f"""
        
        =========================================================
        Þ RAPPORT FUSIONNû - AGENT ûVOLUTION ULTIME v7.0
        =========================================================
        Date: {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}
        
        
        =========================================================
        Þ SECTION 1: DIAGNOSTIC TûLûPHONE (Santûˋ & Performance)
        =========================================================
        
        {rapport_diagnostic}
        
        
        =========================================================
        ÞÀÿ¡ SECTION 2: SCAN DE SûCURITû AVANCû (Menaces & Vulnûˋrabilitûˋs)
        =========================================================
        
        {rapport_securite}
        
        
        =========================================================
        ÞÀ SYNTHûSE & RECOMMANDATIONS GLOBALES
        =========================================================
        
        """
        
        # Ajouter la synthû´se des problû´mes
        problemes_diag = [p for p in self.diagnostic.problemes_critiques if "ã" not in p]
        problemes_secu = [p for p in self.rapporteur_securite.rapport_complet if p['severite'] in ['CRITIQUE', 'ûLEVû']]
        
        if problemes_diag or problemes_secu:
            rapport_fusionne += "Þ´ PROBLûMES MAJEURS DûTECTûS:\n"
            for p in problemes_diag:
                rapport_fusionne += f"ãÂ [DIAGNOSTIC] {p}\n"
            for p in problemes_secu:
                rapport_fusionne += f"ãÂ [SûCURITû - {p['severite']}] {p['type']} ({p['fichier']})\n"
        else:
            rapport_fusionne += "ã AUCUN PROBLûME CRITIQUE DûTECTû DANS LES DEUX SECTIONS.\n"
            
        rapport_fusionne += "\nÞÀ RECOMMANDATIONS FUSIONNûES:\n"
        
        # Fusionner les recommandations
        recommandations = list(set(self.diagnostic.suggestions_amûˋlioration))
        recommandations.extend(["Vûˋrifier les fichiers suspects listûˋs dans la section sûˋcuritûˋ.", "Maintenir la blacklist dynamique û  jour."])
        
        for r in set(recommandations):
            rapport_fusionne += f"ãÂ {r}\n"
            
        # Sauvegarder le rapport
        with open(self.RAPPORT_FILE, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            f.write(rapport_fusionne)
            
        archive_automatique("RAPPORT FUSIONNû", "Gûˋnûˋration du rapport 12h", rapport_fusionne)
        
        log("ã Rapport fusionnûˋ gûˋnûˋrûˋ et archivûˋ.")
        return rapport_fusionne



    def generer_rapport_complet(self):
        """Gûˋnû´re le rapport fusionnûˋ"""
        log("Þ Gûˋnûˋration du rapport fusionnûˋ (Diagnostic + Sûˋcuritûˋ)...")
        
        # 1. Exûˋcuter le diagnostic complet
        rapport_diagnostic = self.diagnostic.scanner_complet_telephone()
        
        # 2. Exûˋcuter le scan de sûˋcuritûˋ avancûˋ
        rapport_securite = self.rapporteur_securite.scanner_et_rapporter()
        
        # 3. Fusionner les rûˋsultats
        rapport_fusionne = f"""
        
        =========================================================
        Þ RAPPORT FUSIONNû - AGENT ûVOLUTION ULTIME v7.0
        =========================================================
        Date: {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}
        
        
        =========================================================
        Þ SECTION 1: DIAGNOSTIC TûLûPHONE (Santûˋ & Performance)
        =========================================================
        
        {rapport_diagnostic}
        
        
        =========================================================
        ÞÀÿ¡ SECTION 2: SCAN DE SûCURITû AVANCû (Menaces & Vulnûˋrabilitûˋs)
        =========================================================
        
        {rapport_securite}
        
        
        =========================================================
        ÞÀ SYNTHûSE & RECOMMANDATIONS GLOBALES
        =========================================================
        
        """
        
        # Ajouter la synthû´se des problû´mes
        problemes_diag = [p for p in self.diagnostic.problemes_critiques if "ã" not in p]
        problemes_secu = [p for p in self.rapporteur_securite.rapport_complet if p['severite'] in ['CRITIQUE', 'ûLEVû']]
        
        rapport_fusionne += "Þ´ PROBLûMES MAJEURS DûTECTûS:\n"
        if problemes_diag or problemes_secu:
            for p in problemes_diag:
                rapport_fusionne += f"ãÂ [DIAGNOSTIC] {p}\n"
            for p in problemes_secu:
                rapport_fusionne += f"ãÂ [SûCURITû - {p['severite']}] {p['type']} ({p['fichier']})\n"
        else:
            rapport_fusionne += "ã AUCUN PROBLûME CRITIQUE DûTECTû DANS LES DEUX SECTIONS.\n"
            
        rapport_fusionne += "\nÞÀ RECOMMANDATIONS FUSIONNûES:\n"
        
        # Fusionner les recommandations
        recommandations = list(set(self.diagnostic.suggestions_amûˋlioration))
        recommandations.extend(["Vûˋrifier les fichiers suspects listûˋs dans la section sûˋcuritûˋ.", "Maintenir la blacklist dynamique û  jour."])
        
        for r in set(recommandations):
            rapport_fusionne += f"ãÂ {r}\n"
            
        # Sauvegarder le rapport
        with open(self.RAPPORT_FILE, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            f.write(rapport_fusionne)
            
        archive_automatique("RAPPORT FUSIONNû", "Gûˋnûˋration du rapport 12h", rapport_fusionne)
        
        log("ã Rapport fusionnûˋ gûˋnûˋrûˋ et archivûˋ.")
        return rapport_fusionne







#=======================================
# def generer_rapport_curiosite()
#=======================================


def generer_rapport_curiosite():
    """Gûˋnû´re un rapport des dûˋcouvertes curieuses"""
    try:
        with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "decouvertes_curieuses.log", "r") as f:
            decouvertes = f.readlines()

        if decouvertes:
            themes = {}
            for decouverte in decouvertes[-20:]:  # 20 derniû´res
                if "|" in decouverte:
                    _, theme, _, _ = decouverte.strip().split("|")
                    themes[theme] = themes.get(theme, 0) + 1

            theme_favori = max(themes, key=themes.get) if themes else "aucun"

            rapport = f"""
Þˆ RAPPORT CURIOSITû - {datetime.now().strftime('%d/%m %H:%M')}
Dûˋcouvertes totales: {len(decouvertes)}
Thû´me favori: {theme_favori}
Distribution: {themes}
"""
            log(f"Þ Rapport curiositûˋ: {rapport}")
            return rapport

    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Rapport curiositûˋ: {e}")

    return None



def generer_rapport_curiosite():
    """Gûôˋnûô´re un rapport des dûôˋcouvertes curieuses avec Pandas et Matplotlib."""
    try:
        with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "decouvertes_curieuses.log", "r") as f:
            decouvertes = f.readlines()

        if decouvertes:
            themes = {}
            for decouverte in decouvertes[-20:]:
                if "|" in decouverte:
                    _, theme, _, _ = decouverte.strip().split("|")
                    themes[theme] = themes.get(theme, 0) + 1

            theme_favori = max(themes, key=themes.get) if themes else "aucun"

            rapport_md = f"""
# û¯é¡é§ôˆ RAPPORT CURIOSITûã¯ - {datetime.now().strftime('%d/%m %H:%M')}

**Dûôˋcouvertes totales:** {len(decouvertes)}
**Thûô´me favori:** {theme_favori}
**Distribution:** {themes}
"""
            log(f"û¯é¡ãé  Rapport curiositûôˋ: {rapport_md}")

            if themes:
                df_themes = pd.DataFrame(list(themes.items()), columns=['Theme', 'Count'])
                plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
                sns.barplot(x='Theme', y='Count', data=df_themes)
                plt.title('Distribution des Thûô´mes de Curiositûôˋ')
                plt.xlabel('Thûô´me')
                plt.ylabel('Nombre de Dûôˋcouvertes')
                plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')
                plt.tight_layout()
                chart_path = EVOLUT_HOME / "rapports_curiosite" / f"curiosite_chart_{int(time.time())}.png"
                chart_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
                plt.savefig(chart_path)
                plt.close()
                log(f"Graphique de curiositûôˋ gûôˋnûôˋrûôˋ: {chart_path}")
                rapport_md += f"\n![Distribution des Thûô´mes de Curiositûôˋ]({chart_path})\n"

            (EVOLUT_HOME / "rapports_curiosite").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "rapports_curiosite" / f"rapport_curiosite_{int(time.time())}.md", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(markdown.markdown(rapport_md))

            return rapport_md

    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ûÂôé Rapport curiositûôˋ: {e}", level="error")

    return None

    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Rapport curiositûˋ: {e}", level="error")

    return None

"""
            log(f"Þ Rapport curiositûˋ: {rapport}")

            # Gûˋnûˋration d'un graphique simple avec Matplotlib/Seaborn

                df_themes = pd.DataFrame(list(themes.items()), columns=['Theme', 'Count'])
                plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))

    except Exception as e:

Thû´me favori: {theme_favori}

            return rapport

    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Rapport curiositûˋ: {e}")

    return None



def generer_rapport_curiosite():
    """Gûˋnû´re un rapport des dûˋcouvertes curieuses"""
    try:
        with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "decouvertes_curieuses.log", "r") as f:
            decouvertes = f.readlines()

        if decouvertes:
            themes = {}
            for decouverte in decouvertes[-20:]:  # 20 derniû´res
                if "|" in decouverte:
                    _, theme, _, _ = decouverte.strip().split("|")
                    themes[theme] = themes.get(theme, 0) + 1

            theme_favori = max(themes, key=themes.get) if themes else "aucun"

            rapport = f"""
Þˆ RAPPORT CURIOSITû - {datetime.now().strftime('%d/%m %H:%M')}
Dûˋcouvertes totales: {len(decouvertes)}
Thû´me favori: {theme_favori}
Distribution: {themes}
"""
            log(f"Þ Rapport curiositûˋ: {rapport}")
            return rapport

    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Rapport curiositûˋ: {e}")

    return None

def generer_rapport_curiosite():
    """Gûˋnû´re un rapport des dûˋcouvertes curieuses avec Pandas et Matplotlib."""
    try:
        with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "decouvertes_curieuses.log", "r") as f:
            decouvertes = f.readlines()

        if decouvertes:
            themes = {}
            for decouverte in decouvertes[-20:]:
                if "|" in decouverte:
                    _, theme, _, _ = decouverte.strip().split("|")
                    themes[theme] = themes.get(theme, 0) + 1

            theme_favori = max(themes, key=themes.get) if themes else "aucun"

            rapport_md = f"""
# Þý RAPPORT CURIOSITû - {datetime.now().strftime('%d/%m %H:%M')}

**Dûˋcouvertes totales:** {len(decouvertes)}
**Thû´me favori:** {theme_favori}
**Distribution:** {themes}
"""
            log(f"Þ Rapport curiositûˋ: {rapport_md}")

            if themes:
                df_themes = pd.DataFrame(list(themes.items()), columns=['Theme', 'Count'])
                plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
                sns.barplot(x='Theme', y='Count', data=df_themes)
                plt.title('Distribution des Thû´mes de Curiositûˋ')
                plt.xlabel('Thû´me')
                plt.ylabel('Nombre de Dûˋcouvertes')
                plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')
                plt.tight_layout()
                chart_path = EVOLUT_HOME / "rapports_curiosite" / f"curiosite_chart_{int(time.time())}.png"
                chart_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
                plt.savefig(chart_path)
                plt.close()
                log(f"Graphique de curiositûˋ gûˋnûˋrûˋ: {chart_path}")
                rapport_md += f"\\n![Distribution des Thû´mes de Curiositûˋ]({chart_path})\\n"

            (EVOLUT_HOME / "rapports_curiosite").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "rapports_curiosite" / f"rapport_curiosite_{int(time.time())}.md", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(markdown.markdown(rapport_md))

            return rapport_md

    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Rapport curiositûˋ: {e}", level="error")

    return None



def generer_rapport_curiosite():
    """Gûˋnû´re un rapport des dûˋcouvertes curieuses avec Pandas et Matplotlib."""
    try:
        with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "decouvertes_curieuses.log", "r") as f:
            decouvertes = f.readlines()

                plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
                sns.barplot(x='Theme', y='Count', data=df_themes)
                plt.title('Distribution des Thû´mes de Curiositûˋ')
                plt.xlabel('Thû´me')
                plt.ylabel('Nombre de Dûˋcouvertes')

                chart_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
                plt.savefig(chart_path)
                plt.close()
                log(f"Graphique de curiositûˋ gûˋnûˋrûˋ: {chart_path}")
                rapport_md += f"\\n![Distribution des Thû´mes de Curiositûˋ]({chart_path})\\n"

            (EVOLUT_HOME / "rapports_curiosite").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "rapports_curiosite" / f"rapport_curiosite_{int(time.time())}.md", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:

    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Rapport curiositûˋ: {e}", level="error")

    return None

def generer_rapport_evolution():
    """Gûˋnû´re un rapport pour 'partager' ses dûˋcouvertes"""
    try:
        reussites = 0
        if (EVOLUT_HOME / "successful_commands.log").exists():
            reussites = len(open(EVOLUT_HOME / "successful_commands.log").readlines())
        
        dernieres_reussites = []
        if (EVOLUT_HOME / "successful_commands.log").exists():
            with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "successful_commands.log", 'r') as f:
                dernieres_reussites = [line.strip() for line in f.readlines()[-3:]]

        rapport = f"""
Þ RAPPORT D'ûVOLUTION - {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')}
{'=' * 50}

Þ₤ PERFORMANCES:
- Commandes rûˋussies: {reussites}
- Capacitûˋs auto-gûˋnûˋrûˋes: {open(__file__).read().count('def capacite_auto_')}
- Cycles d'apprentissage: {AUTO_TASK_COUNTER}

ÞÀ DûCOUVERTES RûCENTES:
- Pattern dominant: {analyser_patterns_reussite()}
- Outils maûÛtrisûˋs: {dernieres_reussites}

ÞÛ OBJECTIFS FUTURS:
- Amûˋliorer l'efficacitûˋ des explorations
- Diversifier les stratûˋgies
- Optimiser l'auto-modification
"""
        (EVOLUT_HOME / "rapports_evolution").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        with open(EVOLUT_HOME / "rapports_evolution" / f"rapport_{int(time.time())}.txt", "w") as f:
            f.write(rapport)

        log("Þ Rapport d'ûˋvolution gûˋnûˋrûˋ")
    except Exception as e:
        log(f"ã Erreur gûˋnûˋration rapport ûˋvolution: {e}")

    def generer_rapport_final(self):
        """Gûˋnû´re le rapport final avec problû´mes et solutions"""
        rapport_final = f"""
Þ₤ RAPPORT DE DIAGNOSTIC - SYNTHûSE
{'=' * 45}

Þ PROBLûMES DûTECTûS:
{'-' * 25}
"""
        for probleme in self.problemes_critiques:
            rapport_final += f"ãÂ {probleme}\n"

        rapport_final += f"""
ÞÀ SOLUTIONS RECOMMANDûES:
{'-' * 30}
"""
        for suggestion in self.suggestions_amûˋlioration:
            rapport_final += f"ãÂ {suggestion}\n"

        rapport_final += f"""
Þ Rapport complet sauvegardûˋ: {self.rapport_actuel}
"""
        # Sauvegarde la synthû´se
        synthû´se_file = RAPPORTS_DIR / f"synthû´se_{self.dernier_scan}.txt"
        with open(synthû´se_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            f.write(rapport_final)
        
        log("ã Diagnostic complet terminûˋ et rapport gûˋnûˋrûˋ")
        return rapport_final



    def generer_rapport_final(self):
        """Gûˋnû´re le rapport final dûˋtaillûˋ"""
        
        if not self.rapport_complet:
            return "ã AUCUN PROBLûME DûTECTû - Votre systû´me semble propre."
        
        # Trier par sûˋvûˋritûˋ
        severite_order = {'CRITIQUE': 0, 'ûLEVû': 1, 'MOYEN': 2, 'FAIBLE': 3}
        self.rapport_complet.sort(key=lambda x: severite_order.get(x['severite'], 4))
        
        rapport = "Þ RAPPORT DûTAILLû DES PROBLûMES DûTECTûS\n"
        rapport += "=" * 60 + "\n\n"
        
        # Grouper par fichier
        for fichier, problemes in self.fichiers_problemes.items():
            rapport += f"Þ FICHIER: {fichier}\n"
            rapport += "ã" * 50 + "\n"
            
            for probleme in problemes:
                emoji = "Þ´" if probleme['severite'] == "CRITIQUE" else "ã ÿ¡" if probleme['severite'] == "ûLEVû" else "Þ"
                rapport += f"{emoji} [{probleme['severite']}] {probleme['type']}\n"
                rapport += f"   Þ Dûˋtectûˋ: {probleme['timestamp']}\n"
                rapport += f"   Þ Dûˋtails: {probleme['details']}\n"
                rapport += "   ãããããããããããããããããããããããããããããããããããããããããã\n"
            
            rapport += "\n"
        
        # Rûˋsumûˋ
        rapport += "Þ RûSUMû DES PROBLûMES\n"
        rapport += "ã" * 30 + "\n"
        
        compteur = {}
        for probleme in self.rapport_complet:
            compteur[probleme['severite']] = compteur.get(probleme['severite'], 0) + 1
        
        for severite in ['CRITIQUE', 'ûLEVû', 'MOYEN', 'FAIBLE']:
            if severite in compteur:
                rapport += f"ãÂ {severite}: {compteur[severite]} problû´me(s)\n"
        
        # Actions recommandûˋes
        rapport += "\nÞÀ ACTIONS RECOMMANDûES:\n"
        if any(p['severite'] in ['CRITIQUE', 'ûLEVû'] for p in self.rapport_complet):
            rapport += "ãÂ Analyser les fichiers critiques avec un antivirus\n"
            rapport += "ãÂ Vûˋrifier l'intûˋgritûˋ du systû´me\n"
            rapport += "ãÂ Considûˋrer une rûˋinitialisation d'usine si nombreux problû´mes critiques\n"
        else:
            rapport += "ãÂ Surveiller les fichiers modifiûˋs\n"
            rapport += "ãÂ Maintenir le systû´me û  jour\n"
        
        # Sauvegarder le rapport complet
        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
        rapport_file = self.SECURITY_DIR / f"rapport_detaille_{timestamp}.txt"
        with open(rapport_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            f.write(rapport)
        
        log(f"Þ Rapport dûˋtaillûˋ sauvegardûˋ: {rapport_file}")
        return rapport



    def generer_rapport_final(self):
        """Gûˋnû´re le rapport final avec problû´mes et solutions"""

        rapport_final = f"""
Þ₤ RAPPORT DE DIAGNOSTIC - SYNTHûSE
{'=' * 45}

Þ PROBLûMES DûTECTûS:
{'-' * 25}
"""

        for probleme in self.problemes_critiques:
            rapport_final += f"ãÂ {probleme}\n"

        rapport_final += f"""
ÞÀ SOLUTIONS RECOMMANDûES:
{'-' * 30}
"""

        for suggestion in self.suggestions_amûˋlioration:
            rapport_final += f"ãÂ {suggestion}\n"

        rapport_final += f"""
Þ Rapport complet sauvegardûˋ: {self.rapport_actuel}
ã¯ Prochain scan recommandûˋ: Dans 24 heures

Þ Pour plus de dûˋtails, consulter le rapport complet.
"""

        # Sauvegarde la synthû´se
        synthû´se_file = RAPPORTS_DIR / f"synthû´se_{self.dernier_scan}.txt"
        with open(synthû´se_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            f.write(rapport_final)

        log("ã Diagnostic complet terminûˋ et rapport gûˋnûˋrûˋ")
        return rapport_final



    def generer_rapport_final(self):
        """Gûôˋnûô´re le rapport final avec problûô´mes et solutions."""
        with self.lock:
            rapport_template = Template("""
û¯é¡é§ô₤ RAPPORT DE DIAGNOSTIC - SYNTHûùSE
{'=' * 45}

û¯é¡ãé  PROBLûùMES Dûã¯TECTûã¯S:
{'-' * 25}
{% for probleme in problemes %}
ûÂã˜ôÂ {{ probleme }}
{% endfor %}

û¯é¡ãôÀ SOLUTIONS RECOMMANDûã¯ES:
{'-' * 30}
{% for suggestion in suggestions %}
ûÂã˜ôÂ {{ suggestion }}
{% endfor %}

û¯é¡ãô Rapport complet sauvegardûôˋ: {{ rapport_file }}
ûÂôô¯ Prochain scan recommandûôˋ: Dans 24 heures

û¯é¡ãô Pour plus de dûôˋtails, consulter le rapport complet.
""")
            rapport_final_content = rapport_template.render(
                problemes=self.problemes_critiques,
                suggestions=self.suggestions_amûôˋlioration,
                rapport_file=self.rapport_actuel
            )

            synthûô´se_file = RAPPORTS_DIR / f"synthûô´se_{self.dernier_scan}.txt"
            with open(synthûô´se_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                f.write(rapport_final_content)
            
            conn = sqlite3.connect(self.db_file)
            cursor = conn.cursor()
            cursor.execute(
                "INSERT INTO diagnostic_reports (timestamp, model, problems, suggestions, full_report_path) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)",
                (datetime.now().strftime('%F %T'), self.get_modele_telephone(),
                 orjson.dumps(self.problemes_critiques), orjson.dumps(self.suggestions_amûôˋlioration),
                 str(self.rapport_actuel))
            )
            conn.commit()
            conn.close()

            log("ûÂéãÎ Diagnostic complet terminûôˋ et rapport gûôˋnûôˋrûôˋ")
            return rapport_final_content

                problemes=self.problemes_critiques,

                rapport_file=self.rapport_actuel
            )

                (datetime.now().strftime('%F %T'), self.get_modele_telephone(),
                 orjson.dumps(self.problemes_critiques), orjson.dumps(self.suggestions_amûˋlioration),

            conn.commit()

#=======================================
# def generer_strategies_solution(self, erreur)
#=======================================


    def generer_strategies_solution(self, erreur):
        """
        Gûˋnû´re des stratûˋgies de solution basûˋes sur le type d'erreur
        """
        strategies = {
            "Permission denied": [
                "strings {fichier}",
                "head {fichier}",
                "tail {fichier}",
                "file {fichier}",
                "ls -la {fichier}",
                "cp {fichier} /sdcard/temp/",
                "python3 -c \"print(open('{fichier}').read())\"",
            ],
            "No such file": [
                "find / -name {fichier} 2>/dev/null",
                "locate {fichier}",
                "ls -la {dossier_parent}",
            ],
            "command not found": [
                "which {commande}",
                "busybox {commande}",
                "find /system -name *{commande}*",
            ]
        }

        for type_erreur, strats in strategies.items():
            if type_erreur in erreur:
                return strats

        return []



    def generer_strategies_solution(self, erreur):
        """
        Gûôˋnûô´re des stratûôˋgies de solution basûôˋes sur le type d'erreur en utilisant Jinja2.
        """
        strategies_templates = {
            "Permission denied": [
                "strings {fichier}", "head {fichier}", "tail {fichier}", "file {fichier}",
                "ls -la {fichier}", "cp {fichier} /sdcard/temp/", "python3 -c \"print(open('{fichier}').read())\"",
            ],
            "No such file": [
                "find / -name {fichier} 2>/dev/null", "locate {fichier}", "ls -la {dossier_parent}",
            ],
            "command not found": [
                "which {commande}", "busybox {commande}", "find /system -name *{commande}*",
            ]
        }
        
        generated_strategies = []
        for type_erreur, tpls in strategies_templates.items():
            if type_erreur in erreur:
                fichier = extraire_fichier_du_contexte(erreur)
                commande = extraire_commande_du_contexte(erreur)
                dossier_parent = Path(fichier).parent if fichier else "/data/local/tmp"
                for tpl_str in tpls:
                    template = Template(tpl_str)
                    generated_strategies.append(template.render(fichier=fichier, commande=commande, dossier_parent=dossier_parent))
                break
        
        return generated_strategies



    def generer_strategies_solution(self, erreur):
        """
        Gûˋnû´re des stratûˋgies de solution basûˋes sur le type d'erreur en utilisant Jinja2.
        """
        strategies_templates = {
            "Permission denied": [
                "strings {fichier}", "head {fichier}", "tail {fichier}", "file {fichier}",
                "ls -la {fichier}", "cp {fichier} /sdcard/temp/", "python3 -c "print(open('{fichier}').read())"",
            ],
            "No such file": [
                "find / -name {fichier} 2>/dev/null", "locate {fichier}", "ls -la {dossier_parent}",
            ],
            "command not found": [
                "which {commande}", "busybox {commande}", "find /system -name *{commande}*",
            ]
        }
        
        generated_strategies = []
        for type_erreur, tpls in strategies_templates.items():
            if type_erreur in erreur:
                fichier = extraire_fichier_du_contexte(erreur)
                commande = extraire_commande_du_contexte(erreur)
                dossier_parent = Path(fichier).parent if fichier else "/data/local/tmp"
                for tpl_str in tpls:
                    template = Template(tpl_str)
                    generated_strategies.append(template.render(fichier=fichier, commande=commande, dossier_parent=dossier_parent))
                break
        
        return generated_strategies

            if type_erreur in erreur:
                return strats

        return []

# def gerer_discussion(self)

    def gerer_discussion(self):
        """Lit discussion.txt et rûˋpond û  l'humain en texte clair"""
        if not self.discussion_file.exists():
            try:
                self.discussion_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
                self.discussion_file.touch()
            except: pass
            
        try:
            with open(self.discussion_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                lignes = f.readlines()
            if not lignes:
                return False
            
            index_a_traiter = -1
            for i in range(len(lignes)-1, -1, -1):
                ligne = lignes[i].strip()
                if not ligne: continue
                # Supporte HUMAIN ou USER
                if (ligne.upper().startswith("HUMAIN") or ligne.upper().startswith("USER")) and "[TRAITû]" not in ligne:
                    index_a_traiter = i
                    break
            
            if index_a_traiter != -1:
                message_a_traiter = lignes[index_a_traiter].strip()
                log(f"ÞÏ  Gemini analyse un message : {message_a_traiter[:50]}...")
                
                memoire_actuelle = ""
                if self.dashboard_file.exists():
                    try: memoire_actuelle = self.dashboard_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
                    except: pass

                prompt = f"""=== CONTEXTE DE L'ûVOLUTION ===
DASHBOARD (Ta mûˋmoire) :
{memoire_actuelle}

MESSAGE DE L'HUMAIN : {message_a_traiter}

=== INSTRUCTIONS ===
1. Rûˋponds en TEXTE CLAIR û  l'humain.
2. Si tu dois agir pour rûˋpondre (ex: "fais un scan"), utilise [EXECUTE], [LIRE], [ECRIRE].
3. Si tu apprends quelque chose de l'humain, mets û  jour ton [DASHBOARD].
4. Utilise TOUJOURS des chemins ABSOLUS : /app/Super_Lab.

Rûˋponds maintenant :"""
                
                reponse = self._call_gemini(prompt)
                
                if reponse:
                    lignes[index_a_traiter] = lignes[index_a_traiter].rstrip() + " [TRAITû]\n"
                    
                    # Nettoyage de la rûˋponse (tags masquûˋs û  l'humain)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[EXECUTE\].*?(\[/EXECUTE\]|$)', '', reponse, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[LIRE\].*?(\[/LIRE\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[ECRIRE\].*?\|.*?(\[/ECRIRE\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[DASHBOARD\].*?(\[/DASHBOARD\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[SEARCH\].*?(\[/SEARCH\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[STAGE\s*\d+\]', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
                    reponse_propre = reponse_propre.strip()

                    if reponse_propre:
                        lignes.append(f"\nGEMINI: {reponse_propre}\n")
                    
                    with open(self.discussion_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                        f.writelines(lignes)
                    
                    # Ordres masquûˋs
                    has_commands = any(tag in reponse for tag in ['[EXECUTE]', '[LIRE]', '[ECRIRE]', '[SEARCH]'])
                    if has_commands:
                        try:
                            with open(self.commands_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                                f.write(reponse)
                            log("Þ Ordres envoyûˋs (via discussion)")
                        except: pass
                    
                    # Dashboard masquûˋ
                    dash_match = re.search(r'\[DASHBOARD\](.*?)\[/DASHBOARD\]', reponse, re.DOTALL)
                    if not dash_match: # Fallback si pas de balise fermante
                        dash_match = re.search(r'\[DASHBOARD\](.*?)$', reponse, re.DOTALL)
                    
                    if dash_match:
                        try:
                            with open(self.dashboard_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                                f.write(dash_match.group(1).strip())
                            log("ÞÏ  Dashboard mis û  jour (via discussion)")
                        except: pass
                    
                    return True
                else:
                    log("ã API N'A RIEN RENVOYû")
        except Exception as e:
            log(f"ã ÿ¡ Erreur dans gerer_discussion : {e}")
        return False



    def gerer_discussion(self):
        """Lit discussion.txt et rûôˋpond û  l'humain en texte clair"""
        if not self.discussion_file.exists():
            try:
                self.discussion_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
                self.discussion_file.touch()
            except Exception as e:
                log(f"Erreur crûôˋation discussion_file: {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
                
        try:
            lignes = self.discussion_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines(keepends=True)
            if not lignes:
                return False
            
            index_a_traiter = -1
            for i in range(len(lignes)-1, -1, -1):
                ligne = lignes[i].strip()
                if not ligne: continue
                if (ligne.upper().startswith("HUMAIN") or ligne.upper().startswith("USER")) and "[TRAITûã¯]" not in ligne:
                    index_a_traiter = i
                    break
            
            if index_a_traiter != -1:
                message_a_traiter = lignes[index_a_traiter].strip()
                log(f"Gemini analyse un message : {message_a_traiter[:50]}...")
                
                memoire_actuelle = self.dashboard_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8")

                prompt = f"""=== CONTEXTE DE L'ûã¯VOLUTION ===
DASHBOARD (Ta mûôˋmoire) :
{memoire_actuelle}

MESSAGE DE L'HUMAIN : {message_a_traiter}

=== INSTRUCTIONS ===
1. Rûôˋponds en TEXTE CLAIR û  l'humain.
2. Si tu dois agir pour rûôˋpondre (ex: "fais un scan"), utilise [EXECUTE], [LIRE], [ECRIRE].
3. Si tu apprends quelque chose de l'humain, mets û  jour ton [DASHBOARD].
4. Utilise TOUJOURS des chemins ABSOLUS : /app/Super_Lab.

Rûôˋponds maintenant :"""
                
                reponse = self._call_gemini(prompt)
                
                if reponse:
                    lignes[index_a_traiter] = lignes[index_a_traiter].rstrip() + " [TRAITûã¯]\n"
                    
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[EXECUTE\].*?(\[/EXECUTE\]|$)', '', reponse, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[LIRE\].*?(\[/LIRE\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[ECRIRE\].*?\|.*?(\[/ECRIRE\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[DASHBOARD\].*?(\[/DASHBOARD\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[SEARCH\].*?(\[/SEARCH\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[STAGE\s*\d+\]', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
                    reponse_propre = reponse_propre.strip()

                    if reponse_propre:
                        lignes.append(f"\nGEMINI: {reponse_propre}\n")
                    
                    self.discussion_file.write_text("".join(lignes), encoding='utf-8')
                    
                    has_commands = any(tag in reponse for tag in ['[EXECUTE]', '[LIRE]', '[ECRIRE]', '[SEARCH]'])
                    if has_commands:
                        try:
                            self.commands_file.write_text(reponse, encoding="utf-8")
                            log("Ordres envoyûôˋs (via discussion)")
                        except Exception as e:
                            log(f"Erreur ûôˋcriture commands_file (discussion): {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
                    
                    dash_match = re.search(r'\[DASHBOARD\](.*?)\[/DASHBOARD\]', reponse, re.DOTALL)
                    if not dash_match:
                        dash_match = re.search(r'\[DASHBOARD\](.*?)$', reponse, re.DOTALL)
                    
                    if dash_match:
                        try:
                            self.dashboard_file.write_text(dash_match.group(1).strip(), encoding="utf-8")
                            log("Dashboard mis û  jour (via discussion)")
                        except Exception as e:
                            log(f"Erreur ûôˋcriture dashboard_file (discussion): {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
                    
                    self._sauvegarder_contexte("HUMAIN", message_a_traiter, reponse_propre)
                    return True
                else:
                    log("API N'A RIEN RENVOYûã¯", level="warning")
        except Exception as e:
            log(f"Erreur dans gerer_discussion : {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
        return False



    def gerer_discussion(self):
        """Lit discussion.txt et rûˋpond û  l'humain en texte clair"""
        if not self.discussion_file.exists():
            try:
                self.discussion_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
                self.discussion_file.touch()
            except Exception as e:
                log(f"Erreur crûˋation discussion_file: {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
                
        try:
            lignes = self.discussion_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines(keepends=True)
            if not lignes:
                return False
            
            index_a_traiter = -1
            for i in range(len(lignes)-1, -1, -1):
                ligne = lignes[i].strip()
                if not ligne: continue
                if (ligne.upper().startswith("HUMAIN") or ligne.upper().startswith("USER")) and "[TRAITû]" not in ligne:
                    index_a_traiter = i
                    break
            
            if index_a_traiter != -1:
                message_a_traiter = lignes[index_a_traiter].strip()
                log(f"Gemini analyse un message : {message_a_traiter[:50]}...")
                
                memoire_actuelle = self.dashboard_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8")

                prompt = f"""=== CONTEXTE DE L'ûVOLUTION ===
DASHBOARD (Ta mûˋmoire) :
{memoire_actuelle}

MESSAGE DE L'HUMAIN : {message_a_traiter}

=== INSTRUCTIONS ===
1. Rûˋponds en TEXTE CLAIR û  l'humain.
2. Si tu dois agir pour rûˋpondre (ex: "fais un scan"), utilise [EXECUTE], [LIRE], [ECRIRE].
3. Si tu apprends quelque chose de l'humain, mets û  jour ton [DASHBOARD].
4. Utilise TOUJOURS des chemins ABSOLUS : /app/Super_Lab.

Rûˋponds maintenant :"""
                
                reponse = self._call_gemini(prompt)
                
                if reponse:
                    lignes[index_a_traiter] = lignes[index_a_traiter].rstrip() + " [TRAITû]\n"
                    
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[EXECUTE\].*?(\[/EXECUTE\]|$)', '', reponse, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[LIRE\].*?(\[/LIRE\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[ECRIRE\].*?\|.*?(\[/ECRIRE\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[DASHBOARD\].*?(\[/DASHBOARD\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[SEARCH\].*?(\[/SEARCH\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[STAGE\s*\d+\]', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
                    reponse_propre = reponse_propre.strip()

                    if reponse_propre:
                        lignes.append(f"\nGEMINI: {reponse_propre}\n")
                    
                    self.discussion_file.write_text("".join(lignes), encoding='utf-8')
                    
                    has_commands = any(tag in reponse for tag in ['[EXECUTE]', '[LIRE]', '[ECRIRE]', '[SEARCH]'])
                    if has_commands:
                        try:
                            self.commands_file.write_text(reponse, encoding="utf-8")
                            log("Ordres envoyûˋs (via discussion)")
                        except Exception as e:
                            log(f"Erreur ûˋcriture commands_file (discussion): {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
                    
                    dash_match = re.search(r'\[DASHBOARD\](.*?)\[/DASHBOARD\]', reponse, re.DOTALL)
                    if not dash_match:
                        dash_match = re.search(r'\[DASHBOARD\](.*?)$', reponse, re.DOTALL)
                    
                    if dash_match:
                        try:
                            self.dashboard_file.write_text(dash_match.group(1).strip(), encoding="utf-8")
                            log("Dashboard mis û  jour (via discussion)")
                        except Exception as e:
                            log(f"Erreur ûˋcriture dashboard_file (discussion): {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
                    
                    self._sauvegarder_contexte("HUMAIN", message_a_traiter, reponse_propre)
                    return True
                else:
                    log("API N'A RIEN RENVOYû", level="warning")
        except Exception as e:
            log(f"Erreur dans gerer_discussion : {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
        return False



    def gerer_discussion(self):
        """Lit discussion.txt et rûˋpond û  l'humain en texte clair"""
        if not self.discussion_file.exists():
            try:
                self.discussion_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
                self.discussion_file.touch()
            except Exception as e:
                log(f"Erreur crûˋation discussion_file: {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)

            if not lignes:
                return False

                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[DASHBOARD\].*?(\[/DASHBOARD\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[SEARCH\].*?(\[/SEARCH\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[STAGE\s*\d+\]', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
                    reponse_propre = reponse_propre.strip()

                    if reponse_propre:
                        lignes.append(f"\nGEMINI: {reponse_propre}\n")
                    
                    self.discussion_file.write_text("".join(lignes), encoding='utf-8')

                        try:

                            log("Ordres envoyûˋs (via discussion)")
                        except Exception as e:
                            log(f"Erreur ûˋcriture commands_file (discussion): {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)

                    if not dash_match:
                        dash_match = re.search(r'\[DASHBOARD\](.*?)$', reponse, re.DOTALL)

                        try:
                            self.dashboard_file.write_text(dash_match.group(1).strip(), encoding="utf-8")
                            log("Dashboard mis û  jour (via discussion)")
                        except Exception as e:
                            log(f"Erreur ûˋcriture dashboard_file (discussion): {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
                    
                    self._sauvegarder_contexte("HUMAIN", message_a_traiter, reponse_propre)
                    return True

        except Exception as e:

        return False



    def gerer_discussion(self):
        """Lit discussion.txt et rûˋpond û  l'humain ou û  l'algo (Version Blindûˋe)"""
        if not self.discussion_file.exists(): 
            self.discussion_file.touch()
        try:
            with open(self.discussion_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f: 
                lignes = f.readlines()
            if not lignes: 
                return
            
            index_a_traiter = -1
            for i in range(len(lignes)-1, -1, -1):
                ligne = lignes[i].strip()
                if not ligne: 
                    continue
                
                if (ligne.upper().startswith("HUMAIN") or ligne.upper().startswith("ALGO")) and "[TRAITû]" not in ligne:
                    index_a_traiter = i
                    break
            
            if index_a_traiter != -1:
                message_a_traiter = lignes[index_a_traiter].strip()
                log(f"ÞÏ  Gemini analyse un message : {message_a_traiter[:50]}...")
                
                # Þ DEBUG
                prompt_complet_test = f"{self.system_prompt}\n\nMessage entrant :\n{message_a_traiter}"
                print(f"\nÞç PROMPT ENVOYû (dûˋbut): {prompt_complet_test[:200]}")
                print(f"Þ Longueur totale: {len(prompt_complet_test)} caractû´res")
                
                reponse = self._call_gemini(f"Message entrant :\n{message_a_traiter}")
                
                print(f"ÞÂ RûPONSE REûUE: {reponse[:100] if reponse else 'RIEN'}")
                
                if reponse:
                    with open(self.discussion_file, 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                        f.write(f"\nGEMINI: {reponse}\n")
                    
                    lignes[index_a_traiter] = lignes[index_a_traiter].rstrip() + " [TRAITû]\n"
                    with open(self.discussion_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                        f.writelines(lignes)
                    
                    self.executer_volonte_gemini(reponse)
                else:
                    print("ã API N'A RIEN RENVOYû")
        except Exception as e:
            log(f"ã ÿ¡ Erreur dans gerer_discussion : {e}")

                    return True
                else:

    def gerer_discussion(self):
        """Lit discussion.txt et rûˋpond û  l'humain en texte clair"""
        if not self.discussion_file.exists():
            try:
                self.discussion_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
                self.discussion_file.touch()
            except: pass
            
        try:
            with open(self.discussion_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                lignes = f.readlines()
            if not lignes:
                return False
            
            index_a_traiter = -1
            for i in range(len(lignes)-1, -1, -1):
                ligne = lignes[i].strip()
                if not ligne: continue
                # Supporte HUMAIN ou USER
                if (ligne.upper().startswith("HUMAIN") or ligne.upper().startswith("USER")) and "[TRAITû]" not in ligne:
                    index_a_traiter = i
                    break
            
            if index_a_traiter != -1:
                message_a_traiter = lignes[index_a_traiter].strip()
                log(f"ÞÏ  Gemini analyse un message : {message_a_traiter[:50]}...")
                
                memoire_actuelle = ""
                if self.dashboard_file.exists():
                    try: memoire_actuelle = self.dashboard_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
                    except: pass

                prompt = f"""=== CONTEXTE DE L'ûVOLUTION ===
DASHBOARD (Ta mûˋmoire) :
{memoire_actuelle}

MESSAGE DE L'HUMAIN : {message_a_traiter}

=== INSTRUCTIONS ===
1. Rûˋponds en TEXTE CLAIR û  l'humain.
2. Si tu dois agir pour rûˋpondre (ex: "fais un scan"), utilise [EXECUTE], [LIRE], [ECRIRE].
3. Si tu apprends quelque chose de l'humain, mets û  jour ton [DASHBOARD].
4. Utilise TOUJOURS des chemins ABSOLUS : /app/Super_Lab.

Rûˋponds maintenant :"""
                
                reponse = self._call_gemini(prompt)
                
                if reponse:
                    lignes[index_a_traiter] = lignes[index_a_traiter].rstrip() + " [TRAITû]\n"
                    
                    # Nettoyage de la rûˋponse (tags masquûˋs û  l'humain)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[EXECUTE\].*?(\[/EXECUTE\]|$)', '', reponse, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[LIRE\].*?(\[/LIRE\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[ECRIRE\].*?\|.*?(\[/ECRIRE\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[DASHBOARD\].*?(\[/DASHBOARD\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[SEARCH\].*?(\[/SEARCH\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[STAGE\s*\d+\]', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
                    reponse_propre = reponse_propre.strip()

                    if reponse_propre:
                        lignes.append(f"\nGEMINI: {reponse_propre}\n")
                    
                    with open(self.discussion_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                        f.writelines(lignes)
                    
                    # Ordres masquûˋs
                    has_commands = any(tag in reponse for tag in ['[EXECUTE]', '[LIRE]', '[ECRIRE]', '[SEARCH]'])
                    if has_commands:
                        try:
                            with open(self.commands_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                                f.write(reponse)
                            log("Þ Ordres envoyûˋs (via discussion)")
                        except: pass
                    
                    # Dashboard masquûˋ
                    dash_match = re.search(r'\[DASHBOARD\](.*?)\[/DASHBOARD\]', reponse, re.DOTALL)
                    if not dash_match: # Fallback si pas de balise fermante
                        dash_match = re.search(r'\[DASHBOARD\](.*?)$', reponse, re.DOTALL)
                    
                    if dash_match:
                        try:
                            with open(self.dashboard_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                                f.write(dash_match.group(1).strip())
                            log("ÞÏ  Dashboard mis û  jour (via discussion)")
                        except: pass
                    
                    return True
                else:
                    log("ã API N'A RIEN RENVOYû")
        except Exception as e:
            log(f"ã ÿ¡ Erreur dans gerer_discussion : {e}")
        return False



    def gerer_discussion(self):
        if not self.discussion_file.exists(): return
        if time.time() - self.last_call < self.min_interval: return
        try:
            txt = self.discussion_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
            lignes = txt.splitlines()
            idx = -1
            # On cherche UNIQUEMENT les lignes HUMAIN non traitûˋes
            for i in range(len(lignes)-1, -1, -1):
                if "HUMAIN:" in lignes[i].upper() and "[TRAITû]" not in lignes[i]:
                    idx = i; break
            
            if idx != -1:
                msg = lignes[idx]
                prompt = f"MESSAGE HUMAIN: {msg}\n\nRûˋponds briû´vement et prends une initiative technique."
                rep = self._call_gemma(prompt)
                if rep:
                    lignes[idx] += " [TRAITû]"
                    clean_rep = re.sub(r'\[.*?\]', '', rep, flags=re.DOTALL).strip()
                    # On nettoie pour ne pas rûˋpûˋter le prompt
                    clean_rep = clean_rep.replace(msg, "").strip()
                    new_txt = "\n".join(lignes) + f"\n\nGEMMA: {clean_rep}\n"
                    self.discussion_file.write_text(new_txt, encoding='utf-8')
                    self._traiter(rep)
        except: pass



    def gerer_discussion(self):
        if not self.discussion_file.exists(): return False
        if time.time() - self.last_call < self.min_interval: return False
        try:
            txt = self.discussion_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
            lignes = txt.splitlines()
            idx = -1
            for i in range(len(lignes)-1, -1, -1):
                if ("HUMAIN" in lignes[i].upper() or "USER" in lignes[i].upper()) and "[TRAITû]" not in lignes[i]:
                    idx = i; break
            if idx != -1:
                msg = lignes[idx]
                log(f"ÞÏ  Discussion: {msg[:50]}...")
                try: mem = self.dashboard_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
                except: mem = ""
                prompt = f"DASHBOARD: {mem}\n\nMESSAGE HUMAIN: {msg}\n\nRûˋponse (texte clair) :"
                rep = self._call_gemini(prompt)
                if rep:
                    lignes[idx] += " [TRAITû]"
                    clean_rep = re.sub(r'\[.*?\]', '', rep, flags=re.DOTALL).strip()
                    new_txt = "\n".join(lignes) + f"\n\nGEMINI: {clean_rep}\n"
                    self.discussion_file.write_text(new_txt, encoding='utf-8')
                    self._traiter(rep)
                    return True
        except: pass
        return False



    def gerer_discussion(self):
        """Lit discussion.txt et rûˋpond û  l'humain en texte clair"""
        if not self.discussion_file.exists():
            try:
                self.discussion_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
                self.discussion_file.touch()
            except: pass
            
        try:
            with open(self.discussion_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                lignes = f.readlines()
            if not lignes:
                return False
            
            index_a_traiter = -1
            for i in range(len(lignes)-1, -1, -1):
                ligne = lignes[i].strip()
                if not ligne: continue
                # Supporte HUMAIN ou USER
                if (ligne.upper().startswith("HUMAIN") or ligne.upper().startswith("USER")) and "[TRAITû]" not in ligne:
                    index_a_traiter = i
                    break
            
            if index_a_traiter != -1:
                message_a_traiter = lignes[index_a_traiter].strip()
                log(f"ÞÏ  Gemini analyse un message : {message_a_traiter[:50]}...")
                
                memoire_actuelle = ""
                if self.dashboard_file.exists():
                    try: memoire_actuelle = self.dashboard_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
                    except: pass

                prompt = f"""=== CONTEXTE DE L'ûVOLUTION ===
DASHBOARD (Ta mûˋmoire) :
{memoire_actuelle}

MESSAGE DE L'HUMAIN : {message_a_traiter}

=== INSTRUCTIONS ===
1. Rûˋponds en TEXTE CLAIR û  l'humain.
2. Si tu dois agir pour rûˋpondre (ex: "fais un scan"), utilise [EXECUTE], [LIRE], [ECRIRE].
3. Si tu apprends quelque chose de l'humain, mets û  jour ton [DASHBOARD].
4. Utilise TOUJOURS des chemins ABSOLUS : /app/Super_Lab.

Rûˋponds maintenant :"""
                
                reponse = self._call_gemini(prompt)
                
                if reponse:
                    lignes[index_a_traiter] = lignes[index_a_traiter].rstrip() + " [TRAITû]\n"
                    
                    # Nettoyage de la rûˋponse (tags masquûˋs û  l'humain)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[EXECUTE\].*?(\[/EXECUTE\]|$)', '', reponse, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[LIRE\].*?(\[/LIRE\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[ECRIRE\].*?\|.*?(\[/ECRIRE\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[DASHBOARD\].*?(\[/DASHBOARD\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[SEARCH\].*?(\[/SEARCH\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[STAGE\s*\d+\]', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
                    reponse_propre = reponse_propre.strip()

                    if reponse_propre:
                        lignes.append(f"\nGEMINI: {reponse_propre}\n")
                    
                    with open(self.discussion_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                        f.writelines(lignes)
                    
                    # Ordres masquûˋs
                    has_commands = any(tag in reponse for tag in ['[EXECUTE]', '[LIRE]', '[ECRIRE]', '[SEARCH]'])
                    if has_commands:
                        try:
                            with open(self.commands_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                                f.write(reponse)
                            log("Þ Ordres envoyûˋs (via discussion)")
                        except: pass
                    
                    # Dashboard masquûˋ
                    dash_match = re.search(r'\[DASHBOARD\](.*?)\[/DASHBOARD\]', reponse, re.DOTALL)
                    if not dash_match: # Fallback si pas de balise fermante
                        dash_match = re.search(r'\[DASHBOARD\](.*?)$', reponse, re.DOTALL)
                    
                    if dash_match:
                        try:
                            with open(self.dashboard_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                                f.write(dash_match.group(1).strip())
                            log("ÞÏ  Dashboard mis û  jour (via discussion)")
                        except: pass
                    
                    return True
                else:
                    log("ã API N'A RIEN RENVOYû")
        except Exception as e:
            log(f"ã ÿ¡ Erreur dans gerer_discussion : {e}")
        return False



    def gerer_discussion(self):
        """Lit discussion.txt et rûˋpond û  l'humain en texte clair"""
        if not self.discussion_file.exists():
            try:
                self.discussion_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
                self.discussion_file.touch()
            except Exception as e:
                log(f"Erreur crûˋation discussion_file: {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
                
        try:
            lignes = self.discussion_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines(keepends=True)
            if not lignes:
                return False
            
            index_a_traiter = -1
            for i in range(len(lignes)-1, -1, -1):
                ligne = lignes[i].strip()
                if not ligne: continue
                if (ligne.upper().startswith("HUMAIN") or ligne.upper().startswith("USER")) and "[TRAITû]" not in ligne:
                    index_a_traiter = i
                    break
            
            if index_a_traiter != -1:
                message_a_traiter = lignes[index_a_traiter].strip()
                log(f"Gemini analyse un message : {message_a_traiter[:50]}...")
                
                memoire_actuelle = self.dashboard_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8")

                prompt = f"""=== CONTEXTE DE L'ûVOLUTION ===
DASHBOARD (Ta mûˋmoire) :
{memoire_actuelle}

MESSAGE DE L'HUMAIN : {message_a_traiter}

=== INSTRUCTIONS ===
1. Rûˋponds en TEXTE CLAIR û  l'humain.
2. Si tu dois agir pour rûˋpondre (ex: "fais un scan"), utilise [EXECUTE], [LIRE], [ECRIRE].
3. Si tu apprends quelque chose de l'humain, mets û  jour ton [DASHBOARD].
4. Utilise TOUJOURS des chemins ABSOLUS : /app/Super_Lab.

Rûˋponds maintenant :"""
                
                reponse = self._call_gemini(prompt)
                
                if reponse:
                    lignes[index_a_traiter] = lignes[index_a_traiter].rstrip() + " [TRAITû]\n"
                    
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[EXECUTE\].*?(\[/EXECUTE\]|$)', '', reponse, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[LIRE\].*?(\[/LIRE\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[ECRIRE\].*?\|.*?(\[/ECRIRE\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[DASHBOARD\].*?(\[/DASHBOARD\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[SEARCH\].*?(\[/SEARCH\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[STAGE\s*\d+\]', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
                    reponse_propre = reponse_propre.strip()

                    if reponse_propre:
                        lignes.append(f"\nGEMINI: {reponse_propre}\n")
                    
                    self.discussion_file.write_text("".join(lignes), encoding='utf-8')
                    
                    has_commands = any(tag in reponse for tag in ['[EXECUTE]', '[LIRE]', '[ECRIRE]', '[SEARCH]'])
                    if has_commands:
                        try:
                            self.commands_file.write_text(reponse, encoding="utf-8")
                            log("Ordres envoyûˋs (via discussion)")
                        except Exception as e:
                            log(f"Erreur ûˋcriture commands_file (discussion): {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
                    
                    dash_match = re.search(r'\[DASHBOARD\](.*?)\[/DASHBOARD\]', reponse, re.DOTALL)
                    if not dash_match:
                        dash_match = re.search(r'\[DASHBOARD\](.*?)$', reponse, re.DOTALL)
                    
                    if dash_match:
                        try:
                            self.dashboard_file.write_text(dash_match.group(1).strip(), encoding="utf-8")
                            log("Dashboard mis û  jour (via discussion)")
                        except Exception as e:
                            log(f"Erreur ûˋcriture dashboard_file (discussion): {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
                    
                    self._sauvegarder_contexte("HUMAIN", message_a_traiter, reponse_propre)
                    return True
                else:
                    log("API N'A RIEN RENVOYû", level="warning")
        except Exception as e:
            log(f"Erreur dans gerer_discussion : {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
        return False



    def gerer_discussion(self):
        """Lit discussion.txt et rûˋpond û  l'humain en texte clair"""
        if not self.discussion_file.exists():
            try:
                self.discussion_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
                self.discussion_file.touch()
            except Exception as e:
                log(f"Erreur crûˋation discussion_file: {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
                
        try:
            lignes = self.discussion_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines(keepends=True)
            if not lignes:
                return False
            
            index_a_traiter = -1
            for i in range(len(lignes)-1, -1, -1):
                ligne = lignes[i].strip()
                if not ligne: continue
                if (ligne.upper().startswith("HUMAIN") or ligne.upper().startswith("USER")) and "[TRAITû]" not in ligne:
                    index_a_traiter = i
                    break
            
            if index_a_traiter != -1:
                message_a_traiter = lignes[index_a_traiter].strip()
                log(f"Gemini analyse un message : {message_a_traiter[:50]}...")
                
                memoire_actuelle = self.dashboard_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8")

3. Si tu apprends quelque chose de l'humain, mets û  jour ton [DASHBOARD].

                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[ECRIRE\].*?\|.*?(\[/ECRIRE\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[DASHBOARD\].*?(\[/DASHBOARD\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[SEARCH\].*?(\[/SEARCH\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[STAGE\s*\d+\]', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
                    reponse_propre = reponse_propre.strip()

                    if reponse_propre:
                        lignes.append(f"\nGEMINI: {reponse_propre}\n")
                    
                    self.discussion_file.write_text("".join(lignes), encoding='utf-8')
                    
                    has_commands = any(tag in reponse for tag in ['[EXECUTE]', '[LIRE]', '[ECRIRE]', '[SEARCH]'])
                    if has_commands:
                        try:
                            self.commands_file.write_text(reponse, encoding="utf-8")
                            log("Ordres envoyûˋs (via discussion)")
                        except Exception as e:
                            log(f"Erreur ûˋcriture commands_file (discussion): {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
                    
                    dash_match = re.search(r'\[DASHBOARD\](.*?)\[/DASHBOARD\]', reponse, re.DOTALL)
                    if not dash_match:
                        dash_match = re.search(r'\[DASHBOARD\](.*?)$', reponse, re.DOTALL)
                    
                    if dash_match:
                        try:
                            self.dashboard_file.write_text(dash_match.group(1).strip(), encoding="utf-8")
                            log("Dashboard mis û  jour (via discussion)")
                        except Exception as e:
                            log(f"Erreur ûˋcriture dashboard_file (discussion): {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
                    
                    self._sauvegarder_contexte("HUMAIN", message_a_traiter, reponse_propre)
                    return True
                else:
                    log("API N'A RIEN RENVOYû", level="warning")
        except Exception as e:
            log(f"Erreur dans gerer_discussion : {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
        return False



    def gerer_discussion(self):
        """Rûˋpond aux messages de l'humain."""
        if not self.discussion_file.exists(): return False
        content = self.discussion_file.read_text()
        if "USER:" in content and "[TRAITû]" not in content:
            log("Discussion : Gemini prûˋpare une rûˋponse...")
            reponse = self._call_gemini(content)
            if reponse:
                self.discussion_file.write_text(content + f"\nGEMINI: {reponse} [TRAITû]")
                return True
        return False



    def gerer_discussion(self):
        """Lit discussion.txt et rûˋpond û  l'humain ou û  l'algo (Version Blindûˋe)"""
        if not self.discussion_file.exists(): 
            self.discussion_file.touch()
        try:
            with open(self.discussion_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f: 
                lignes = f.readlines()
            if not lignes: 
                return
            
            index_a_traiter = -1
            for i in range(len(lignes)-1, -1, -1):
                ligne = lignes[i].strip()
                if not ligne: 
                    continue
                
                if (ligne.upper().startswith("HUMAIN") or ligne.upper().startswith("ALGO")) and "[TRAITû]" not in ligne:
                    index_a_traiter = i
                    break
            
            if index_a_traiter != -1:
                message_a_traiter = lignes[index_a_traiter].strip()
                log(f"ÞÏ  Gemini analyse un message : {message_a_traiter[:50]}...")
                
                # Þ DEBUG
                prompt_complet_test = f"{self.system_prompt}\n\nMessage entrant :\n{message_a_traiter}"
                print(f"\nÞç PROMPT ENVOYû (dûˋbut): {prompt_complet_test[:200]}")
                print(f"Þ Longueur totale: {len(prompt_complet_test)} caractû´res")
                
                reponse = self._call_gemini(f"Message entrant :\n{message_a_traiter}")
                
                print(f"ÞÂ RûPONSE REûUE: {reponse[:100] if reponse else 'RIEN'}")
                
                if reponse:
                    with open(self.discussion_file, 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                        f.write(f"\nGEMINI: {reponse}\n")
                    
                    lignes[index_a_traiter] = lignes[index_a_traiter].rstrip() + " [TRAITû]\n"
                    with open(self.discussion_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                        f.writelines(lignes)
                    
                    self.executer_volonte_gemini(reponse)
                else:
                    print("ã API N'A RIEN RENVOYû")
        except Exception as e:
            log(f"ã ÿ¡ Erreur dans gerer_discussion : {e}")



    def gerer_discussion(self):
        """Lit discussion.txt et rûˋpond û  l'humain en texte clair"""

            try:
                self.discussion_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
                self.discussion_file.touch()
            except Exception as e:
                log(f"Erreur crûˋation discussion_file: {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
                
        try:
            lignes = self.discussion_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines(keepends=True)
            if not lignes:
                return False
            
            index_a_traiter = -1
            for i in range(len(lignes)-1, -1, -1):
                ligne = lignes[i].strip()
                if not ligne: continue
                if (ligne.upper().startswith("HUMAIN") or ligne.upper().startswith("USER")) and "[TRAITû]" not in ligne:
                    index_a_traiter = i
                    break
            
            if index_a_traiter != -1:
                message_a_traiter = lignes[index_a_traiter].strip()
                log(f"Gemini analyse un message : {message_a_traiter[:50]}...")
                
                memoire_actuelle = self.dashboard_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8")

                prompt = f"""=== CONTEXTE DE L'ûVOLUTION ===
DASHBOARD (Ta mûˋmoire) :
{memoire_actuelle}

MESSAGE DE L'HUMAIN : {message_a_traiter}

=== INSTRUCTIONS ===
1. Rûˋponds en TEXTE CLAIR û  l'humain.
2. Si tu dois agir pour rûˋpondre (ex: "fais un scan"), utilise [EXECUTE], [LIRE], [ECRIRE].
3. Si tu apprends quelque chose de l'humain, mets û  jour ton [DASHBOARD].

                if reponse:
                    lignes[index_a_traiter] = lignes[index_a_traiter].rstrip() + " [TRAITû]\n"
                    
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[EXECUTE\].*?(\[/EXECUTE\]|$)', '', reponse, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[LIRE\].*?(\[/LIRE\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[ECRIRE\].*?\|.*?(\[/ECRIRE\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[DASHBOARD\].*?(\[/DASHBOARD\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[SEARCH\].*?(\[/SEARCH\]|$)', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.DOTALL)
                    reponse_propre = re.sub(r'\[STAGE\s*\d+\]', '', reponse_propre, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
                    reponse_propre = reponse_propre.strip()

                    if reponse_propre:
                        lignes.append(f"\nGEMINI: {reponse_propre}\n")
                    
                    self.discussion_file.write_text("".join(lignes), encoding='utf-8')
                    
                    has_commands = any(tag in reponse for tag in ['[EXECUTE]', '[LIRE]', '[ECRIRE]', '[SEARCH]'])
                    if has_commands:
                        try:
                            self.commands_file.write_text(reponse, encoding="utf-8")
                            log("Ordres envoyûˋs (via discussion)")
                        except Exception as e:
                            log(f"Erreur ûˋcriture commands_file (discussion): {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
                    
                    dash_match = re.search(r'\[DASHBOARD\](.*?)\[/DASHBOARD\]', reponse, re.DOTALL)
                    if not dash_match:
                        dash_match = re.search(r'\[DASHBOARD\](.*?)$', reponse, re.DOTALL)
                    
                    if dash_match:
                        try:
                            self.dashboard_file.write_text(dash_match.group(1).strip(), encoding="utf-8")
                            log("Dashboard mis û  jour (via discussion)")
                        except Exception as e:
                            log(f"Erreur ûˋcriture dashboard_file (discussion): {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
                    
                    self._sauvegarder_contexte("HUMAIN", message_a_traiter, reponse_propre)
                    return True
                else:
                    log("API N'A RIEN RENVOYû", level="warning")
        except Exception as e:
            log(f"Erreur dans gerer_discussion : {e}", level="error", exc_info=True)
        return False
